sessions.title: "Self-Driving" SOC: Why AI Needs a Human Pilot
sessions.description:
The industry is buzzing about the “Autonomous SOC”, but the “AI-only” narrative often falls short of reality. In this session, Deepwatch dissects the true division of labor in a modern defense strategy: where AI shines (massive data synthesis, query generation) and where humans are non-negotiable (nuanced decision-making, critical risk acceptance). Learn why the future of SecOps isn't about replacing analysts and how Deepwatch MDR combines its Agentic AI Ecosystem with elite human experts to deliver outcomes that algorithms alone cannot match.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: [U.S. Military & Veterans]  Leading AI & Cloud from Uniform to Corporate
sessions.description: Join veteran leaders from Google Cloud and Google Public Sector—including CEO Karen Dahut (Navy Veteran), CTO Will Grannis (Army Veteran), and Managing Director Earl Matthews (Air Force Veteran)—for a dynamic panel exploring the transition from military service to tech leadership. This session, tailored for active service members and veterans, bridges mission-first experience with market demands. The discussion will cover three critical areas: translating military discipline into corporate strategy, diving into technical scaling and compliance challenges, and providing a career roadmap for senior leaders looking to manage large-scale digital transformation and AI initiatives

sessions.title: [U.S. Military & Veterans] AI, Cloud, and Your Career Transition Roadmap
sessions.description: Accelerate your military and post-military career by mastering high-demand "Cloud + AI" skills. This session for U.S. Service Members and Veterans covers Google Cloud Certifications, building a portfolio with the Gen AI Learning Path, and the GEAR program. Experience a live demo of Career Dreamer to explore career options.

sessions.title: 10X innovation: Moonshot thinking for the AI-first startup
sessions.description: Why compete for the present when you can build the future? Learn to apply Google’s 10X innovation philosophy to your own roadmap. This session provides the blueprint for planning exponential impact, identifying high-leverage AI opportunities, and fostering a culture that prioritizes breakthroughs over marginal improvements. Get inspired!

sessions.title: 10x productivity with the Gemini CLI
sessions.description: Learn how to create and automate complex workflows using the Gemini CLI. Join this session to explore how to use features like Agent Skills and subagents to boost team productivity, and how to iterate through all phases of the software development life cycle with greater speed and efficiency.

sessions.title: 2026 M-Trends Report
sessions.description: Stay ahead of the latest cyberthreats with frontline insights from Mandiant incident response investigations. In this 17th edition of M-Trends, we share our observations and analysis of the dynamic threat landscape, and aim to provide you with actionable guidance to enhance your security posture.

sessions.description: Stay ahead of the latest cyberthreats with frontline insights from Mandiant incident response investigations. In this 17th edition of M-Trends, we share our observations and analysis of the dynamic threat landscape, and aim to provide you with actionable guidance to enhance your security posture.

sessions.description: Stay ahead of the latest cyberthreats with frontline insights from Mandiant incident response investigations. In this 17th edition of M-Trends, we share our observations and analysis of the dynamic threat landscape, and aim to provide you with actionable guidance to enhance your security posture.

sessions.title: 3 quick wins across your small team with a unified AI workplace
sessions.description: Small teams are often expected to deliver big results with limited resources. In this practical session, we’ll demo how Gemini Enterprise can act as a force multiplier for your business, enabling you to deploy low-risk, high-reward AI solutions immediately. We’ll move beyond the hype to show you 3 concrete quick wins that streamline operations, unlock data insights, and accelerate content creation – empowering your team to focus on what matters most.

sessions.title: 5 embedding decisions every cloud developer needs to know
sessions.description: Latency, accuracy, and retrieval costs are make-or-break metrics for AI applications on Google Cloud. In this deep dive, Pete Johnson, MongoDB’s AI field CTO, will explore the “Big 5” configuration decisions that define the success of retrieval-augmented generation: chunking, similarity functions, dimensionality, quantization, and reranking. Learn how Voyage AI’s cutting-edge models and MongoDB Atlas let you optimize these parameters while hosting data in any Google Cloud data center. You’ll gain the technical know-how to fine-tune your embedding strategy for maximum efficiency. By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: 5 minutes to launch: Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience essentials
sessions.description: Transform the consumer experience with an instant AI agent built for search, shopping, and support. By replacing months of engineering with a zero-code setup, you can launch a customized agent that captures your brand voice in under five minutes. Operating seamlessly across Instagram, WhatsApp, and the Web, this agent leverages real-time conversation data to move beyond basic chat and proactively drive conversions. Join us as we interview The Honest Kitchen, an AI pioneer, on their firsthand experience with this agent.

sessions.title: 8 Tips to Agentic Security Operations in 18 Minutes
sessions.description:
We’ve taken Agentic SOC from potential to reality with Google SecOps - which means we’ve already paid the innovation tax so you don’t have to.

Join us for a backstage view into our lessons learned through real-world deployments of agentic workflows and by developing our own custom threat hunting agent. Learn 8 tips, tricks, and even what pitfalls to avoid so you can build smarter, move faster, and finally achieve proactive, human-led security at scale.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: A deep dive into Gemini Enterprise governance, security, and compliance
sessions.description: As enterprises graduate from initial AI pilots to full-scale production, the focus shifts from “What can generative AI do?” to “How do we govern and secure it at scale?” Join this technical deep dive that unpacks the multilayered security architecture of Gemini Enterprise, providing a blueprint for deploying, orchestrating, and governing complex agent ecosystems. We’ll go beyond theory into the practical implementation of defense-in-depth strategies, dissecting the three critical AI security layers – content, network, and identity – and demonstrating how to implement centralized governance. You’ll leave with a comprehensive enterprise-readiness checklist, equipping you with the specific controls needed to launch secure, compliant AI agents today.

sessions.title: A discussion on securing Vertex AI
sessions.description: Join this discussion group to learn more about how to secure Vertex AI.

sessions.title: A framework for government genAI
sessions.description: Everyone has an AI mandate, but few have a clear roadmap for secure adoption. Join Federal and SLED peers for a candid conversation on the realities of deploying genAI. We will focus on the hard questions: tackling data sovereignty, mitigating "Shadow AI," and leveraging Google Workspace’s advanced controls to maintain strict security compliance.

sessions.title: A guide for production AI: Insights from ElevenLabs, Glean, and Lovable
sessions.description: Join leaders from ElevenLabs, Glean, and Lovable as they open their playbooks on how enterprise customers are building and scaling AI workloads in production. Gain must-have strategies for solving complex deployment challenges and leave with actionable, real-world insights for navigating the 'last mile' of AI implementation.

sessions.title: A masterclass in managing billions of GCS objects and beyond
sessions.description: Are hidden costs and security risks lurking in your storage? Join us to discover how Storage Intelligence transforms metadata into actionable value. We’ll debut new dashboards that automatically surface anomalies, alongside security dashboards featuring DSPM integration for granular risk posture. Learn directly from customers how they maintain total visibility over petabytes of data. You'll leave with a roadmap to shift from reactive monitoring to proactive, AI-driven optimization.

sessions.title: A peek into the future: How agents transform SRE
sessions.description: Site reliability engineering (SRE) teams can no longer scale linearly to manage the complexities of modern microservices. Agents are evolving from simple chatbots into an autonomous “AI army” capable of managing the entire service life cycle. This session provides a technical playbook for deploying a swarm of specialized agents – from architect and rollout agents to troubleshooting and maintenance agents. Learn how Google and PayPal use an SRE orchestrator agent to correlate signals and reduce blast radius. Join this session and leave with a blueprint for transitioning from human-in-the-loop oversight to fully autonomous, self-healing operations.

sessions.title: Accelerate agent development with Gemini CLI, MCP, and Weave
sessions.description:
Manual tuning slows down AI development. Learn how to accelerate your iteration loop using the Gemini CLI and Weights & Biases Model Context Protocol (MCP). We’ll demonstrate optimizing a tool integrated chatbot agent, using Gemini to analyze traces, spot failure modes, and generate synthetic evaluation data. Learn to implement a dual optimization workflow that improves both your dataset and agent prompts, turning days of manual engineering into minutes of automated hill-climbing.





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Accelerate AI adoption: Strategies for upskilling and managing change
sessions.description: Buying AI is easy; getting people to use it is the challenge. This session will provide a leader’s playbook for driving AI fluency and a culture of innovation. Learn from leaders who have navigated the human side of learning AI skills. Discover proven programs ranging from “Gemini Stars” champion networks to role-based AI training. You’ll leave with change-management frameworks, measurement tactics, and new Google resources to fast-track your teams to accomplish more with Gemini Enterprise and Google Workspace.

sessions.title: Accelerate app development using Gemini AI and cloud tools
sessions.description: Discover how to speed up app development using Gemini AI and Google Cloud tools. In this session, you will see how AI-assisted coding can help you write and debug faster, how multiple AI agents can collaborate to complete tasks, and how to deploy scalable apps with Firebase. Learn practical, hands-on techniques to take your ideas from prototype to production more efficiently.

sessions.title: Accelerate CI/CD with coding agents
sessions.description: Learn how generative AI transforms platform engineering through a zero-to-hero workflow. In this session, we’ll demonstrate how to use natural language to scaffold continuous integration and deployment (CI/CD) pipelines, manage Artifact Registry repositories, and streamline Identity and Access Management (IAM) authentication – all from the Gemini CLI and Google Antigravity. Discover how to automate containerization with Cloud Build and how to define promotion strategies in Cloud Deploy. Join us to learn how to trigger vulnerability scanning with simple prompts, and explore the architecture for translating prompts into Terraform.

sessions.title: Accelerate data science and analytics with GPUs
sessions.description: Data teams rely on pandas and scikit-learn for their simplicity, but performance degrades as datasets grow. This session reveals how to break those barriers without abandoning the tools you know. We will show you how to use GPUs in Colab Enterprise to accelerate standard Python workflows. Using NVIDIA libraries like cuDF and cuML, we will demonstrate how to drop-in replace libraries to achieve massive speedups. Join us for a live demo where we flip the switch to GPUs with zero code changes.

sessions.title: Accelerate domain AI agents on Google Cloud Vertex AI with NVIDIA NeMo and NVIDIA Nemotron
sessions.description:
Join NVIDIA experts to explore how the NVIDIA NeMo framework and Nemotron models integrate with Google Cloud Vertex AI to deliver a frontier-scale  platform for building and deploying domain-specialized AI agents. We'll cover the technology stack, showing how NVIDIA’s models,  libraries, and Blackwell GPUs, combined with Vertex AI made for efficient training, fine-tuning, RL, and scalable inference

The session will feature a real-world case study from leading cybersecurity provider CrowdStrike, illustrating how they use this suite of solutions on Vertex with NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs to fine-tune LLMs for cybersecurity, accelerating threat detection and response.

We’ll close by offering learnings and best practices to customize Nemotron and other open models from the Vertex AI Model Garden.

sessions.title: Accelerate large-scale model pretraining and reinforcement learning fine-tuning
sessions.description: Join this session to dive deep into the engineering behind training large, dense models for complex tasks like mathematical reasoning. We’ll take you through a specific case study of an end-to-end pipeline, highlighting the gotchas of convergence and tuning at this scale. Bring your questions and challenges for an interactive discussion on optimizing training loops, reducing computational overhead, and the future of compact model architectures.

sessions.title: Accelerate R&D with Gemini-based agents Co-Scientist and AlphaEvolve
sessions.description: Gemini-based agents like Co-Scientist and AlphaEvolve enable research and development organizations to accelerate knowledge discovery and scientific innovation. In this session, learn how customers have been using Co-Scientist and AlphaEvolve to accelerate the R&D process while staying fully integrated in their secure Google Cloud environment.

sessions.title: Accelerate research at scale with Gemini and Google AI infrastructure
sessions.description: In research, an often overlooked but critical metric is the time it takes to go from data to discovery. This session will dive deeper into AI and the supercomputing architectures and ecosystems that can turn massive datasets into breakthroughs. Learn how Google’s AI-optimized hardware and powerful models like Gemini come together to accelerate research, leading to new discoveries and scientific breakthroughs. Encounter leaders who are building a new engine for scientific discovery marked by greater efficiency and unprecedented innovation.

sessions.title: Accelerate to innovate: How AI is rewriting the rules of data migration
sessions.description: In order to meet today’s AI moment, organizations are racing to modernize their data estates to unlock the transformative potential of generative AI. Lengthy and risky migrations are now a thing of the past, thanks to AI-powered migration services that dramatically reduce manual effort and de-risk migrations. In this session, industry leaders will share their migration journeys and how they’ve transformed data and AI innovation by modernizing their data platform with Google Cloud.

sessions.title: Accelerate your most demanding AI workloads with Managed Lustre
sessions.description: Don't let storage input/output starve your AI and ML workloads. Google Cloud Managed Lustre is a fully managed high-performance parallel file system designed to keep accelerators productive and saturated with data. Join us to explore new capabilities enabling next-generation hardware and cost-efficient training. Some of our successful customers will share how they use Managed Lustre for purposes ranging from high performance computing to AI. Come learn architecture best practices for key-value cache inference and training – and how to maximize your compute resources and eliminate operational overhead with Managed Lustre.

sessions.title: Accelerate your path to AI readiness with Google Cloud VMware Engine
sessions.description: Legacy systems are throttling AI ambitions. Your journey to becoming an AI-driven, innovation-first business must begin with a foundational shift. Learn how Google Cloud VMware Engine provides a low-friction solution for fast, easy migration and modernization. VMware Engine transforms your VMware estate with speed and confidence, enabling you to move existing systems without re-architecting apps and to continue using familiar tools and skill sets. Join us for exciting new announcements and to learn how to rapidly accelerate your cloud-to-AI transformation.

sessions.title: Accelerate, automate, earn: Partner incentives in the agentic era
sessions.description: Your path to profit is about to become more predictable and powerful. Discover how we’re redefining “partnership” for 2026 by introducing AI-driven incentive automation across our ecosystem. This session will unveil the new, automated framework that allows you to accelerate, automate, and earn more easily in the Agentic Era . You'll leave with a clear go-to-market plan for maximizing your profitability with Google Cloud.

sessions.title: Accelerated modernization: Navigating the journey from SQL Server to PostgreSQL
sessions.description: Legacy SQL Server environments often anchor organizations to high licensing costs and rigid infrastructure, stifling the agility needed for modern growth. This session explores the technical and strategic roadmap for escaping those constraints by migrating to AlloyDB. Through the lens of Extric (Towbook), you will see how they modernized their application and transitioned away from restrictive legacy systems. By adopting AlloyDB’s built-in AI, Extric catalyzed innovation and slashed TCO, providing a proven blueprint for enhancing performance.

sessions.title: Accelerating alpha: Citadel's hybrid HPC and AI strategy
sessions.description: In the high-stakes world of quantitative finance, faster time to insight is the ultimate competitive advantage. Join leaders from Citadel and Google Cloud to explore how top financial services firms are redefining speed using large-scale Tensor Processing Units (TPUs). We’ll dissect Citadel’s “agentic engineering” approach to automating developer workflows and the architectural realities of evolving from on-premises to a hybrid, cloud-first high performance computing (HPC) environment. Discover strategies to balance extreme performance with agility to accelerate your own research infrastructure.

sessions.title: Accelerating the agent lifecycle: From concept to commercialization
sessions.description: In the race for the agentic enterprise, speed is your competitive advantage. Explore how to drastically reduce time-to-market for high-quality AI agents, transforming complexity into repeatable processes. Learn to fast-track the lifecycle using the Agent Development Kit and Gemini Enterprise for efficient, governed deployment. Leave with a strategic roadmap for validating solutions on Google Cloud Marketplace and turning innovation into revenue.
sessions.room: Partner Summit Lounge Lightning Talk Theater 2

sessions.title: Accelerating the next wave of intelligent innovation with NVIDIA and Google Cloud
sessions.description:
AI is transforming every industry, and NVIDIA and Google Cloud are delivering the foundation for it. By combining NVIDIA’s performance-optimized accelerated computing stack with Google Cloud’s AI platform—including Google Kubernetes Engine, Vertex AI, Cloud Run, and Google Distributed Cloud—we’re enabling enterprises, startups, and developers to train and serve frontier models, power agentic AI applications, accelerate analytics, and run industrial and physical AI at scale —across all models, modalities, and workloads, to solve real business challenges and build new products.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Achieve multicloud security at scale with Google Unified Security
sessions.description: The divide between proactive risk management and reactive threat response has become a critical vulnerability. For chief information security officers today, the challenge is no longer just seeing the threat – it’s understanding its business context fast enough to matter. In this breakout, we’ll share how Google is redefining security operations by fusing world-class threat detection and response with deep environmental context. You’ll learn how we’re breaking down silos by integrating rich risk insights from leading partners directly into the security operations center workflow, empowering teams to prioritize incidents based on real-world business risk rather than just technical severity.

sessions.title: Achieve sovereign control over your AI with Google Workspace
sessions.description: Rapid adoption of generative AI is essential for enterprise innovation, but it must not come at the expense of data security and sovereignty. That’s why Google offers the most compliant, enterprise-ready AI capabilities designed for regulated industries and global organizations. Discover how institutions are innovating at pace while maintaining absolute privacy and sovereignty over their AI data through hyperlocal operations and controls. Turn sovereignty into a competitive advantage and secure your AI deployment.

sessions.title: Achieve state-of-the-art inference: High performance on TPUs and GPUs with llm-d
sessions.description: Proprietary stacks and generic open source solutions often lack deep hardware integration. Break free from proprietary constraints with llm-d, an open source stack that delivers state-of-the-art performance across Tensor Processing Units (TPUs) and NVIDIA GPUs. This session dives deep into how to architect disaggregated serving and automatic key-value cache storage tiering on Ironwood (TPU7x). Learn to implement routing optimized for service-level objectives and build a portable, high-performance inference fleet that scales automatically based on real-time server conditions. Leave with a reference architecture for hardware-optimized LLM serving.

sessions.title: Activate an AI-native workforce and drive enterprise productivity
sessions.description: Discover how SIGNAL IDUNA is redefining insurance by deploying an enterprise-scale digital workforce to drive productivity. This session explores how the work between SIGNAL IDUNA and Deloitte enabled the rapid launch of thousands of Gemini Enterprise seats, empowering departments with tools like the Health Assistant. Learn how we archived high active usage and continue to build and scale an agentic AI framework, bridging the gap between regulatory requirements and agentic innovations.

sessions.title: ADK & A2A in Action
sessions.description: Orchestrate a studio swarm via ADK. Witness the A2A protocol drive real-time consensus as agents autonomously negotiate budget, pivot on trends, and align design constraints to ship a complete game pitch in 5 minutes.

sessions.title: Adoption hurdles for AI at the workplace
sessions.description: For any IT or business leaders trying to scale AI adoption at the workplace, join this peer-to-peer rountable to discuss how to tackle the common, non-technical challenges of deploying AI, such as user training, change management, and internal resistance. Our Google expert will share the real-world stories they’ve seen in our Gemini Enterprise customers.

sessions.title: Advance medicine and healthcare outcomes with Gemini
sessions.description: Healthcare leaders are tasked with advancing patient care and outcomes while navigating a maze of data silos, regulatory hurdles, administrative burdens, and legacy systems. Join leaders who are turning those challenges into opportunities for innovation, equity, and improved patient outcomes – reimagining the future of healthcare by harnessing the power of Gemini. This session will provide the blueprint for building a more connected, intelligent, and secure healthcare ecosystem that drives meaningful and lasting change in public health.

speakers.name: Eric Elster
speakers.company: Uniformed Services University of the Health Sciences

sessions.title: Advancements in generative media with Google DeepMind and Google Cloud
sessions.description: Join Google DeepMind experts for a technical update on the latest generative media models – Nano Banana, Veo, and Lyria – and to learn about their powerful capabilities. In this session, we’ll explore how Google DeepMind builds models with remarkable visual consistency, synchronized audio, and fine-grained creative control. And our partners from Canva and Figma will share how they’re empowering their users to build powerful new creative workflows.

sessions.title: After software: Anthropic's vision for the next era of enterprise AI
sessions.description:
Enterprise software will change more in the next two years than it has in the last twenty. The model is inverting: top-down planning, where organizations define and prioritize what gets built, is giving way to bottom-up execution, where AI agents help teams solve problems as fast as they find them. Anthropic shares what we're seeing at the frontier. Teams are already deploying agents on Vertex AI that define, build, and iterate autonomously. We'll ground the vision in real examples and practical frameworks for readiness.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Agent Challenge
sessions.description: Team up with agents, connect them across platforms, and solve missions with Gemini Enterprise. Track real-time insights, explore industry-specific demos, and go hands-on with Agent Designer to see how connecting your entire enterprise stack automates complex workflows and unlocks new levels of productivity.

sessions.title: Agent context engineering for production
sessions.description: Homegrown sessions and state management can get you started, and local development environments can rely on filesystems and Git. But for scalable, maintainable deployed agents, you need more. Every LLM turn is a compiled view across the current state, ongoing session context, memory, various artifacts, tool responses, examples, and instructions. Join this session to discover how to go from “it works” to “it works great at scale” with context engineering best practices, architectures, and services.

sessions.title: Agent development and AgentOps with BigQuery, ADK, and MCP
sessions.description: Join this session to discuss building data agents with ADK and MCP. Learn how these integrations standardize data connections, removing the need for custom connectors. We’ll explore creating agents that seamlessly access BigQuery for data analysis and insights. The group will review how to implement AgentOps for deep observability into performance and cost with just one line of code.

sessions.title: Agent development and AgentOps with BigQuery, ADK, and MCP
sessions.description: Join this session to learn about Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integration methods that standardize how agents connect to your data while removing the need to build custom database connectors from scratch. Discover how to build agents with the ADK that accesses BigQuery for analysis, Google Maps for geospatial insights, and AlloyDB for transactions – all in a single workflow. Learn how to implement agent operations (AgentOps) for deep observability into both agent performance and cost with a single line of code.

sessions.title: Agent development framework for the agentic enterprise
sessions.description:
Moving Agentic AI from experiment to enterprise reality requires a structured path to production. Join 66degrees to explore our Agent Development Framework, designed to accelerate the development of secure multi-agent systems. We’ll demonstrate how to leverage Gemini Enterprise and Vertex AI to unlock next-generation business value through Agentic Teams. Discover how this "AI Factory" model acts as a force multiplier for enterprise clients, using modular architecture and governance to scale talent







By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Agent Identity as the backbone for secure AI innovation
sessions.description: The rise of agents demands a fundamental shift in how we define identity. In this session, we’ll share how Google Cloud is unifying agent, human, and nonhuman identity into a standards-based platform designed for a new AI landscape. We’ll also explore how to move beyond the security risks of long-lived, impersonable keys to a future built on open standards like Secure Production Identity Framework for Everyone (SPIFFE). Learn how we’re elevating agents to first-class citizens in the identity and access management world, giving them verifiable, cryptographic identities that allow them to operate with autonomy, security, and full governance. Get the blueprint for securing the transition from human-driven tasks to agent-driven innovation.

sessions.title: Agent security at scale: Protect against the OWASP Top 10 application risks
sessions.description: Agentic applications can include multiple agents, tools, and model calls, creating a broad and complex attack surface. As developers move into production with these applications, security teams need to make sure they are thoroughly secured from critical threats identified by the Open Worldwide Application Security Project (OWASP), including tool misuse and exploitation, prompt injection, and code hallucination, among others. In this session, we will help you understand new risks associated with agents, as well as key mitigation strategies and ways to implement those strategies using Google Cloud platform controls and security capabilities.

sessions.title: Agent value
sessions.description: Get excited and drive interest in Gemini Enterprise and its agent-building capabilities and learn about the practical, everyday applications about AI agents. Get inspired to think creatively about building agents to solve unique challenges and leave with a chief of staff agent!

sessions.title: Agentic AI & Gemini: Optimal serverless infrastructure for developers
sessions.description: This Technical-200 session explores automating serverless infrastructure deployment using a Gemini-powered AI agent and the Gemini CLI. Learn to generate, manage, and secure configurations, focusing on sensitive .env files. We'll demonstrate integrating these agents with the Cloud SDK to build robust CI/CD pipelines for Cloud Run. Walk away with Python and shell script examples to achieve faster, safer infrastructure rollouts.

sessions.title: Agentic AI for finance: From closing books to crushing forecasts
sessions.description:
Ready to unlock the next level of financial performance? Join us to explore how KPMG and Google’s Agentic AI platform are redefining what’s possible for finance teams. Discover intelligent AI agents that optimize critical processes—delivering faster closes, smarter forecasts, and sharper insights. Join us to see a real-world demo of how KPMG can help you accelerate your financial close, to drive efficiency, agility, and strategic impact across your organization.







By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Agentic AI in action for financial services and insurance
sessions.description: The Financial Services and Insurance (FSI) industry faces pivotal challenges in data unification, risk management, and personalized experiences. While AI’s promise is clear, many struggle to move from concept to reality. This session explores how Agentic AI provides tangible solutions across capital markets and banking. We demonstrate precisely how to leverage Google's Agentic Transformation Framework to turn your vision into an operational reality. Learn to scale agents that address pressing FSI issues while maintaining strict compliance.

sessions.title: Agentic AI in action for financial services and insurance
sessions.description: The Financial Services and Insurance (FSI) industry faces pivotal challenges in data unification, risk management, and personalized experiences. While AI’s promise is clear, many struggle to move from concept to reality. This session explores how Agentic AI provides tangible solutions across capital markets and banking. We demonstrate precisely how to leverage Google's Agentic Transformation Framework to turn your vision into an operational reality. Learn to scale agents that address pressing FSI issues while maintaining strict compliance.

sessions.title: Agentic AI in action: Live demo
sessions.description:
See Dialpad’s agentic AI platform in action: no-code AI agents built and launched at the speed of thought, powered by a unified data plane that keeps customer history and business logic in sync. This fast-paced demo shows how autonomous agents and humans work together with shared context across telephony, contact centers, and business communications—eliminating repetition, breaking down silos, and turning every conversation into real-time action and measurable outcomes.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Agentic AI in CX — Now and next with Dialpad and Randstad
sessions.description:
CX is entering a new era defined by agentic AI—systems that can act, decide, and optimize in real time. Dialpad’s CTO outlines what this means for the future of customer experience and is joined by Randstad’s CIO to share how these concepts are taking shape at scale. Explore how leading organizations are unifying CX and building for an AI-driven future.


By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Agentic AI Transformation for Leaders
sessions.description: Join this interactive workshop for leaders to master agentic transformation strategy. In this session, we will collaboratively walk through a strategy scenario for "Cymbal Meet," a video conferencing company, to pinpoint high-value business problems and apply a powerful framework for reimagining processes with AI agents. This workshop is ideal for Senior Executives ready to turn business challenges into intelligent, automated solutions and lead their company's AI innovation.

sessions.title: Agentic AI: social commerce, webtoons, and the future of personalized experiences
sessions.description:
The era of the ""single prompt"" is over. To solve complex, real-world problems—from automating creator engagement to localizing artistic webcomics—industry leaders are moving toward sophisticated agent architectures. Join Stan and Toonsutra for an inside look at how they orchestrated specialized AI agents to automate creativity, commerce, and personalization at scale on Google Cloud.

Presenting Companies
Stan | The Creator Economy Agent: Discover how Stan (getstan.app) is revolutionizing how creators manage their businesses. Learn how they deployed agentic workflows to automate high-intent interactions, turning a creator's link-in-bio into a proactive sales engine. We’ll break down the architecture behind their ""AI Assistant"" agents that handle everything from lead qualification to personalized product recommendations, allowing creators to scale their impact without increasing their workload.
Toonsutra | The Multimodal Localization Pipeline: India’s #1 webtoon platform reveals their four-agent automated engine for vision-based text extraction and ""chapter-aware"" character profiling, alongside in-context image editing—replacing dialogue inside speech bubbles while perfectly preserving original typography, alignment, and character voice across Indian languages.

sessions.title: Agentic analytics for Looker developers
sessions.description: Writing LookML for humans is one thing; writing it for Conversational AI agents is another. During this roundtable, we'll invite ideas for best practices for grounding LLMs in the semantic layer. Participants will brainstorm "wishlist" features and metadata strategies that help agents provide more accurate, trustworthy answers. Attendees will gain a peer-vetted framework for optimizing LookML for AI.

sessions.title: Agentic commerce: How Ulta and Bunnings re-imagined the shopping experience
sessions.description: Shopping is deeply personal and often complex, whether a customer is building a customized skincare routine or tackling a major home improvement project. Join this session to discover how industry leaders are redefining the digital customer experience by using Google Cloud’s Shopping Agents to move beyond simple search filters and basic transactions. You'll learn how implementing an intelligent, conversational shopping agent can elevate your brand's customer journey from a simple catalog search to a deeply personalized, highly consultative experience that drives both revenue and long term trust.

sessions.title: Agentic commerce: The new automation curve reshaping markets
sessions.description:
For decades, commerce was optimized for humans clicking, scrolling, and comparing. Now AI agents are reshaping discovery, decisions, and transactions, with the potential to influence $3-5 trillion in B2C sales by 2030. This isn’t fully autonomous shopping; it’s consumer-controlled delegation along a new automation curve. In this era of agentic commerce, power shifts to customers and the agents they deploy. Learn how leaders can prepare their organizations and architectures for growth and resilience in this third commerce revolution.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Agentic commerce: Transform the shopping experience with Google agents and open standards
sessions.description: Imagine an AI agent that can find the perfect product, answer fit questions, verify inventory in real time, and securely complete a purchase – all within a single chat. This session shows how to make that vision a reality and set your business up for success on your own site, AI Mode in Google Search, Gemini, and beyond. Learn to build state-of-the-art agents with product discovery, equipped with user-event optimized recommendations and deep user context. Dive into how to connect your agents to store catalogs, payment processors, and any conversational UI via the Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP). Discover how to establish irrefutable proof of user authorization using the Agent Payments Protocol (AP2). Join us to learn how these protocols – built on the foundations of Model Context Protocol (MCP) and the Agent2Agent (A2A) protocol – are creating a seamless, secure, and open ecosystem for the next generation of online and in-store retail and commerce.

sessions.title: Agentic defense: Security operations at machine speed
sessions.description: Is your security operations center (SOC) drowning in alerts? Join this session for an in-depth look at how you can uplevel your SOC team with a system of AI agents in Google Security Operations. From conducting autonomous investigations before an analyst ever gets involved to new response actions, we’ll share our vision for agentic defense and demo how our Triage, Investigation, Enrichment, and Response Plan agents work together to help you cut through the noise, accelerate mean time to response, and shift your focus to high-priority threats.

sessions.title: Agentic FinOps for BigQuery cost optimization
sessions.description: This talk draws from multi-year BigQuery optimization engagements with a leading hyperscaler enterprises. While traditional methods are reactive, this session architects the next evolution: the Agentic BigQuery FinOps Framework, a platform designed to manage petabyte-scale costs. We'll show how this agentic solution automates data collection into a centralized source of truth. The key innovation is integrating Generative AI-powered agents, elevating the platform from a static reporting tool to an interactive, on-demand analytics service. Learn how to empower users to ask natural-language questions—like "Identify large tables unused for over 90 days"—and receive data-driven optimization recommendations.

sessions.title: Agentic Logistics: Powering GXO IQ with Google Cloud, Vertex AI, and Gemini
sessions.description:
GXO, the world’s largest third-party, pure-play contract logistics provider, built GXO IQ to give customers enterprise‑grade logistics performance without enterprise‑level complexity. GXO IQ is an AI‑powered, agentic operating system that unifies billions of operational signals and decades of expertise into a single orchestration layer. Built on Google Cloud using GKE, Apigee, and Vertex AI with Gemini, it predicts demand, optimizes labor and pick paths, and triggers replenishment before orders drop. With an embedded conversational agent for real‑time insights, GXO IQ accelerates onboarding to weeks, reduces operational effort through automation, and delivers scalable end‑to‑end execution across the supply chain.
Use the GXO logo in the attached deck for the solution talk

sessions.title: Agentic payments: A hands-on workshop for Web3 startups
sessions.description: Design the next generation of Web3 payments. In this interactive session, you’ll prototype AI agents that intelligently route payments and automatically reconcile transactions in real time. Walk away with a practical blueprint for secure, scalable, cross-chain payment flows.

sessions.title: Agentic playbook: Scale and govern AI agents with Gemini Enterprise
sessions.description: Operationalizing a fleet of autonomous agents requires moving beyond simple development to a robust, governed architectural framework. This discussion group deep dives into the technical niches of the AI agent lifecycle, focusing on secure management and centralized oversight using Gemini Enterprise. Bring your specific troubleshooting questions as we analyze strategies for maintaining reliability across a complex AI workforce through peer-to-peer dialogue. Walk away with a technical governance checklist and actionable blueprints for scaling enterprise-wide agentic adoption.

sessions.title: Agentic service resolution
sessions.description: Field operations are a major cost and a source of customer dissatisfaction for CSPs. This demo showcases an AI agent using Google Maps Route Optimization, customer, and inventory data to ensure the right tech arrives with the right parts at the lowest cost. We demonstrate automated ticket creation via ServiceNow and leverage Gemini’s multimodal capabilities to assist technicians and validate the completeness of their work. See how AI transforms field services into a driver of efficiency and superior customer experience.

sessions.title: Agentic SOC Experience
sessions.description: Let’s move beyond the AI hype, and experience AI that actually helps! Google Cloud Security enables the Agentic SOC with purpose built agents that helps you navigate the complex world of modern security operations, so you can focus on security where it matters most. Explore our most recent innovations - the SecOps Alert Triage Agent and Agentic Google Threat Intelligence in a hands-on session led by our Google Cloud Security experts. You’ll acquire real-world skills and practical knowledge to transform your organization’s defenses with Agentic AI.

sessions.title: Agentic SOC Experience
sessions.description: Let’s move beyond the AI hype, and experience AI that actually helps! Google Cloud Security enables the Agentic SOC with purpose built agents that helps you navigate the complex world of modern security operations, so you can focus on security where it matters most. Explore our most recent innovations - the SecOps Alert Triage Agent and Agentic Google Threat Intelligence in a hands-on session led by our Google Cloud Security experts. You’ll acquire real-world skills and practical knowledge to transform your organization’s defenses with Agentic AI.

sessions.title: Agentic SOC Experience
sessions.description: Let’s move beyond the AI hype, and experience AI that actually helps! Google Cloud Security enables the Agentic SOC with purpose built agents that helps you navigate the complex world of modern security operations, so you can focus on security where it matters most. Explore our most recent innovations - the SecOps Alert Triage Agent and Agentic Google Threat Intelligence in an immersive session led by our Google Cloud Security experts. You’ll acquire real-world skills and practical knowledge to transform your organization’s defenses with Agentic AI.

sessions.title: Agentic Threat Intelligence: Your new AI security teammate
sessions.description: Grow your security team without adding head count. The Agentic Threat Intelligence feature unlocks Google Threat Intelligence’s vast repository of insights via a specialized, conversational AI interface, transforming data into a dynamic security partner. Find out how specialized AI agents assist with threat hunting, intelligence reporting, and malware analysis, and learn how to use conversational AI to automate complex tasks and reduce manual data sifting. You’ll gain insights into how autonomous agents can handle the heavy lifting, making your security operations faster and more efficient.

sessions.title: Agentic transformation in the public sector
sessions.description: Today, the conversation around AI has fundamentally shifted from exploration and pilots to real-world, scaled deployments that drive impact. This session will spotlight leaders from across the public sector who are deploying AI across their organizations to empower their workforce, unlock new levels of productivity, and transform how services are delivered. This session provides a leadership blueprint for anyone looking to harness agentic AI to create lasting and measurable impact, right now.

sessions.title: Agentic workspace: Scale from Cloud Shell to Cloud Workstations
sessions.description: The future of development is agentic – but for enterprise organizations, it must also be governed. Learn how developers can get immediate access to assistance from Gemini in Cloud Shell, while keeping a clear, manual path to the high-performance, secure environment of Cloud Workstations. Join this session to discover how we’re building the foundation for an agentic loop where AI helps write the code, and our cloud infrastructure provides the secure perimeter to run it.

sessions.title: AgentOps Cockpit: Architecting Agents at Scale with Governance-as-Code
sessions.description: Transition AI agents from Wild West prototypes to reliable production services. This session introduces AgentOps Cockpit, a framework-agnostic Control Plane bridging raw reasoning with enterprise governance. Learn to secure, optimize, and auto-patch multi-cloud fleets (GCP and other cloud providers) using Governance-as-Code for automated Red Team attacks, Zero-Trust PII scrubbing, and Human-in-the-Loop approvals. We also explore FinOps via Hive Mind Semantic Caching and A2A trust. Walk away with a complete blueprint for a resilient, governed AI workforce.

sessions.title: Agents 101
sessions.description: Not sure how to get started with agents? Let's talk about it! Join this roundtable to get your agent-related questions answered. We'll focus our conversation on removing blockers and finding the easiest way for developers to get agents up and running.

sessions.title: Agents in action: Startup breakthroughs across industries
sessions.description: AI agents are transforming operations across every sector. Learn how innovative startups across fintech, legaltech, healthcare, and manufacturing are automating complex workflows, generating insights, and delivering personalized experiences with their agents.

sessions.title: Agents in the CLI: Planning, delegation, and multi-agent execution
sessions.description:
A lot of developers are trying agent-driven workflows in the terminal only to find some patterns don’t scale past small experiments. This talk examines which CLI-based agent patterns hold up in practice using GitHub Copilot CLI as a case study. We’ll look at how developers can plan work, delegate steps, and coordinate multi-step tasks while staying in control. We’ll also look at the tradeoffs that matters when deciding whether these workflows belong in your day-to-day development process (and when switching to your IDE may be more helpful).





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Agents that deliver outcomes
sessions.description:
Focus on outcome-Pitfalls to avoid while scaling agentic with focus on right design, governance, change management and operational readiness. our experts will cover 5 customer engagements, challenges faced by customers, mitigation strategy and outcomes.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: AI adoption at workplace: A discussion on real-world journey
sessions.description: Join this discussion group to learn about real-world workplace AI adoption stories from your peers; and share your own experiences, challenges, and tips. This interactive discussion will cover the practical journey of bringing AI into the workplace. Participants will explore the human side of AI, focusing on the cultural and operational shifts necessary for successful implementation. We'll cover bridging the gap between executive vision and employee reality and dive into proven steps and frameworks for accelerating AI maturity within an organization. We'll explore strategies for skilling, upskilling, and change management to drive AI fluency and discuss developing internal "champion networks" while sharing best practices that spark innovation. Whether you are navigating initial pilots or scaling toward an AI-powered organization, this session will provide a practical leader's playbook for turning AI potential into tangible workplace results.

sessions.title: AI Agent Developer Meetup
sessions.description: Everyone has a prototype, but who is actually running agents in production? This meetup moves beyond simple prompting to tackle the engineering reality of autonomous systems. No presentations, just peer-to-peer conversations on the hard parts of agentic AI: reliability, multi-agent orchestration, memory management, and cost control. Whether you’re debugging infinite loops or architecting for scale, come trade strategies and connect with peers building systems that actually work. No hype, just engineering.

sessions.title: AI Agents across Clouds: Bridging Google Cloud AI and Third-Party Contact Centers for Healthcare Outreach
sessions.description:
Effective healthcare outreach requires an AI agent that can navigate the reality of legacy telephony systems and multi-cloud environments. In this technical deep-dive, we showcase a production-ready architecture that bridges Google Cloud conversational AI with third-party contact center platforms to power secure, scalable, and HIPAA-compliant member outreach.
We will analyze the end-to-end architecture, highlighting how Google Cloud Cross-Cloud Interconnect enables secure connectivity while maintaining a strong security posture. You will learn how we engineered AI "playbooks" to manage complex conversational workflows, including seamless IVR-to-IVR communication and high-fidelity Answering Machine Detection (AMD). We will also demonstrate how the AI agent intelligently navigates external legacy IVR systems, automating workflows traditionally handled by human agents.

Attendees will leave with a reference architecture and practical design patterns for building secure, multi-cloud AI solutions for contact center automation and beyond.

sessions.title: AI Application Developer Meetup
sessions.description: Bring your topics to this builder-to-builder exchange as we map the modern, responsible AI stack together. Join small-group conversations on the latest shifts in AI development. This collaborative space is for developers tackling the engineering hurdles of production: ensuring accuracy while navigating data privacy, security, and managing costs. Whether you're building a brand new application or adding AI to your existing applications, come share your ideas about modern app development in a casual, relaxed, and fun hangout.

sessions.title: AI at enterprise scale: Williams Sonoma, Smyths Toys, and Northwell Health
sessions.description: How do you move AI from pilot to production? Join industry leaders for a raw look at the journey to enterprise innovation. Find out how Williams Sonoma leverages Google Cloud’s AI to transform its “Olive” agent from a web-based tool to a proactive, multimodal culinary companion. We’ll also explore how Gemini empowers Northwell Health to analyze resuscitation footage and surgical video to refine lifesaving care. And finally, we’ll uncover how Smyths Toys uses BigQuery for inventory intelligence and personalized play. Together, these leaders will show you how to build and innovate across Salesforce, SAP, and NetApp.

sessions.title: AI at Snap's scale: Building a global compute fabric with GKE custom compute classes
sessions.description: Hyperscale infrastructure hits a wall when integrating AI into global service meshes. To orchestrate obtainability-constrained accelerators, Snap and Google Cloud engineered a fundamental shift in Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) scaling. In this session, we’ll reveal the architecture of custom ComputeClasses, a feature born from Snap’s requirements that is now a standard part of GKE. Join us to learn to architect a mesh that mixes diverse AI compute resources to overcome supply constraints and scale workloads. And leave with the blueprint for optimizing performance and capacity at planetary scale on GKE.

sessions.title: AI at the edge: Transform operations with Google Distributed Cloud
sessions.description: There are many advantages to AI at the edge: faster decision times, increased fault tolerance, reduced customer bandwidth requirements, lower total solution cost, and improved physical and data security. Come explore how organizations are transforming business operations at the edge with AI on Google Distributed Cloud (GDC). We’ll cover how GDC addresses the challenges associated with modernizing the edge, the power of Google Cloud regions – low latency, data privacy (regulatory, IP), retail locations, distribution centers, and manufacturing – and how to streamline your transition from cloud-based AI development to massive-scale edge deployment.

sessions.title: AI Co-Pilot for Migrations: Deep Graph Assessment to Auto-Refactoring
sessions.description: Manual assessment and refactoring consume massive engineering time and divert teams from strategic work during app and data migrations. This session unveils an end-to-end AI-assisted framework designed to slash this toil. First, see how MigSight uses static code analysis and a Graph RAG agent to build a deep knowledge graph of your code dependencies. Then, discover how MigConvert uses a human-in-the-loop approach, orchestrating deterministic tools and fine-tuned models to automate complex code conversion. Join us to learn how to seamlessly move from intelligent assessment to accurate code translation in your agent-driven modernization journey.

sessions.title: AI DevOps velocity: Self-service platform on Google Cloud
sessions.description: Struggling to scale AI development? Discover how to build an intelligent, self-service Internal Developer Platform (IDP) on Google Cloud. We'll show you how to leverage managed services, Vertex AI, and Cloud Native solutions to streamline traditional and AI workflows. Learn actionable steps for automated pipelines and integrated toolkits that enhance developer experience and accelerate deployment. Expect to see how this approach can achieve a 40-60% ROI by empowering your teams and accelerating innovation.

sessions.title: AI driven, human led: Accelerate security outcomes with an agentic SOC
sessions.description: As agentic attacks increase in frequency and complexity, organizations must transform their security strategies to stay ahead of evolving threats. Learn how an agentic security operations center (SOC) can enable faster threat detection and response, boost productivity, and harden defenses. Join security leaders from Foresite, Netenrich, and TENEX.AI as they share how AI agents will continue to transform security operations, and how AI agents in Google Security Operations are supercharging security teams.

sessions.title: AI Hypercomputer: Resilient AI infrastructure at scale
sessions.description: Generative and agentic AI inference and training demand extreme performance and uptime. Join us to explore new updates to Google Cloud’s AI Hypercomputer, an integrated supercomputing system optimized to serve your models and agents with industry-leading throughput and latency. In this session, AppLovin will share their real-world experience architecting high-scale model serving on Google Cloud. We’ll also share new capabilities for resiliency and reliability. Leave with a blueprint for building an inference infrastructure that delivers speed without sacrificing stability.

sessions.title: AI in the Physical World with Gemini Robotics
sessions.description: The robotics field is in the middle of an explosion of new developments with a projected $5 trillion in market opportunity by 2050. Come learn about Google's efforts with Gemini Robotics and how our models are being applied today by trusted tester companies ranging from social humanoids to automated heavy construction equipment.

sessions.title: AI inference: Performance when you need it, economy when you don't
sessions.description: As Generative AI moves from pilot to production, the 'one-size-fits-all' approach to serving is no longer viable. Platform teams face the dual challenge of meeting stringent SLOs for real-time applications while minimizing TCO for high-volume, cost-sensitive tasks. In this session, we unveil GKE Inference Gateway innovations designed to solve this equation. Explore how GKE delivers multi-accelerator flexibility and disaggregated serving for optimal price-performance. We’ll demonstrate how to fortify models using Model Armor, agent identity, and token-based quota protections. Finally, discover how to optimize inference with accelerators spread across multiple cloud regions

sessions.title: AI Infrastructure Engineer Meetup
sessions.description: Join fellow AI engineers and researchers for a deep dive into the hardware and orchestration powering the AI revolution. We will discuss optimizing AI workloads on GKE and Slurm, managing high-performance GPU and TPU clusters, and navigating the complexities of networking and storage for massive datasets. Whether you are fine-tuning resource allocation or architecting for global scale, come share your strategies and solve infrastructure bottlenecks with the community.

sessions.title: AI migration master class: Architecting whole-estate modernization on GKE
sessions.description: Join this session and move beyond the breakout session to debate the "Gemini for Migrations" strategy in this high-density technical discussion. We'll deconstruct the architecture behind whole-estate migration - apps, infra, and data - using AI to collapse traditional timelines. Bring your specific migration blockers as we will analyze the real-world application of the App Migration Planner, .NET Modernizer, and Gemini Code Assist. We’ll discuss the trade-offs of automated code transformation and developer productivity gains seen at Sonae. You'll leave with a peer-vetted migration playbook and the RAMP framework for GKE.

sessions.title: AI on the frontlines: Experiences leveraging Gemini
sessions.description: Joint this discussion group to expand your understanding of AI security best practices and how organizations are using AI to enhance cyber defenses.

sessions.title: AI SOC vs. AI in your SOC: What is real today and what is coming
sessions.description: Join Anton Chuvakin and Allie Mellen, principal analyst at Forrester, to discuss AI’s role in the future of security operations. Explore how AI currently impacts the security operations center (SOC) and how team roles will evolve. Chuvakin and Mellen will outline strategies for successfully adopting agentic technologies, including the nonnegotiable prerequisites for building a truly AI-ready SOC.

sessions.title: AI Software Lifecycle Meetup
sessions.description: AI is an amplifier for your entire engineering system, not just a coding tool. Connect with fellow builders for a highly interactive meetup exploring AI’s impact across the full software development lifecycle. We will break into discussion stations focused on specific stages—from planning and testing to deploying and operating. Grounded in DORA’s latest research, this session welcomes everyone, whether you are an AI expert or just starting. Share real-world strategies, discuss challenges like trust, and learn how high-performing teams use AI to build better software.

sessions.title: AI training and inference
sessions.description: Accelerate AI training and workloads with Google Cloud Managed Lustre, a high-performance, parallel file system delivering high performance throughput.

sessions.title: AI upskilling strategies from the world's most innovative retailers
sessions.description: The AI transformation has changed the rules of business. The most successful organizations are winning because they’ve prioritized their people. Join us, along with Wayfair and Woolworths panelists, for a look into how they’re transforming their organizations by providing the skills needed to succeed with AI. You’ll get insights directly from leaders bridging the AI talent gap to drive real-world impact in the retail space – from accelerating digital transformation to boosting associate empowerment and retention. Get a behind-the-scenes look at how the world’s most innovative retailers are staying ahead of the competition.

sessions.title: AI velocity vs. security
sessions.description: Does security act as a launchpad or a parking brake for your AI projects? Join this interactive roundtable to debate the reality of rolling out safe, agentic AI. We’ll dig into the friction between developers and security, and tackle the "truth gap" between executive vision and ground-level reality. Bring your war stories and best practices for aligning velocity with governance.

sessions.title: AI with a mission: From strategy to high-stakes impact
sessions.description:
Mission-driven AI is transforming today’s most high-stakes domains by turning strategy into real-world outcomes. Join leaders from the Cancer AI Alliance (CAIA), PayPal, and Deloitte to hear how CAIA’s federated platform accelerates cancer research and how PayPal leverages Google Cloud to power trusted commerce. You will leave with proven strategies for building resilient data foundations, operationalizing responsible AI, and turning purpose into practice within a complex, highly regulated ecosystem.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: AI-driven SecOps: From reactive patching to proactive threat modeling
sessions.description: Traditional security is reactive and alert-heavy. Join this developer-focused session to co-create an AI-driven framework for mission-critical workloads. We’ll design an architecture using Vertex AI, BigQuery, and Chronicle to unify logs with identity signals for universal context. Learn to build predictive ML baselines that stop threats before escalation and trigger automated, self-healing responses—like user suspension—via Gemini API and Cloud Functions. Leave with a blueprint for a resilient, AI-powered posture.

sessions.title: AI-enabled government professional
sessions.description: In this small roundtable, IT and business leaders will pressure-test how Gemini, NotebookLM, and Canvas cut the time spent searching policies, emails, and docs, turn messy program data into cited briefs, and rapidly draft artifacts like SOPs, RFP responses, and stakeholder updates. You’ll leave with 2–3 repeatable workflows, prompt guardrails, and a rollout checklist.

sessions.title: AI-Powered Google Cloud Platform architecture diagramming platform
sessions.description: Stop drawing, start designing. This is the autonomous platform that uses a team of AI agents to design, validate, and diagram your GCP architecture in minutes. Enforce enterprise best practices and generate production-ready blueprints instantly, freeing your engineers to innovate. This solution goes beyond simple diagramming to create a truly intelligent design-to-deployment workflow.

sessions.title: AI-powered media management: Fox Sports, EPAM & Google Cloud Transform Workflows
sessions.description:
Fox Sports partnered with EPAM and Google Cloud to modernize media asset management with the Intelligent Asset Service (IAS).

Powered by Vertex AI Vision, IAS enables fast, AI-driven search across 1.9 million videos.

This cloud-native platform, built and enhanced by EPAM, delivers real-time global content and demonstrates EPAM’s strength in turning advanced Google technology into scalable, client-ready solutions.





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: AIOps at scale: Production-ready infrastructure with Cluster Director
sessions.description: Advanced AI workloads demand absolute reliability, yet teams are routinely slowed by complex configurations and unpredictable hardware failures. Join us to discover how Google Cloud’s Cluster Director is fundamentally changing large-scale distributed AI. Explore how to automate the full infrastructure life cycle, deploying reliable, topology-aware clusters in minutes and optimizing “Day 2” operations with automated health checks. Learn how Cluster Director integrates Google’s most advanced compute, networking, and storage into a unified managed control plane.

sessions.title: Align stakeholders on a path forward
sessions.description: Drive progress with Gemini for Google Workspace. Discover how AI manages the meeting lifecycle - from effortless scheduling to focused participation and instant summaries that turn conversations into clear, actionable results.

sessions.title: All about agents with Google Cloud databases
sessions.description: Discuss the end-to-end experience of building agentic workflows using AI features in Google Cloud databases. This session explores how to unblock development roadblocks by mastering key capabilities. We will examine the best applications for Graph RAG, vector search, and multi-model queries. Learn how to execute complex queries that join SQL, examine complex relationships with graphs, and vector similarity searches in a single transaction, reducing latency and operational overhead.

sessions.title: AlloyDB AI in action: Powering next-gen search and intelligent agents
sessions.description: Discover the latest breakthroughs in enterprise AI. This session explores how AlloyDB AI delivers the extreme scale and precision required for sophisticated enterprise applications. We’ll also unveil the next generation of AlloyDB AI capabilities, including advanced hybrid search, seamless conversational interfaces for building intelligent agents, automated vector operations, and intelligent AI functions.

sessions.title: Always-on agentic life cycle: Connecting the development environment directly to production
sessions.description: The traditional software development life cycle (SDLC) is linear, but the agentic SDLC is circular. We propose a harness-first approach that builds durable deep agents in production and connects them directly to Gemini CLI environments. This session demonstrates how a production agent running in a hardened harness with sub-agent swarms serves as a local collaborator. Using Model Context Protocol (MCP) and the Agent2Agent protocol, this approach brings live enterprise telemetry into your inner loop. Join this session to observe how we bootstrap a project from a production harness, use it to refactor code locally, and deploy changes that the agent then monitors in the background.

sessions.title: An inside look at the evolution of agent development
sessions.description: Generative AI has evolved from collaborator to strategic partner. But the leap from “cool demo” to production accuracy meant overcoming hallucinations and context boundaries. In this session, learn how Google built our autonomous workforce. We’ll deconstruct our shift from reactive prompting to strategic planning. Whether you’re building your own agents or deploying ours, join us to gain the architectural principles for the next era of agency. The time for mere assistance is over, and the era of autonomous action is here.

sessions.title: Analyze data and make an informed decision
sessions.description: Make informed, strategic decisions with Google Sheets and Slides. Discover how Google Workspace with Gemini helps you synthesize scattered data and turn complexity into clarity.

sessions.title: Antigravity Developer Meetup
sessions.description: Connect with builders, developers, and architects in an interactive Antigravity meetup focused on the agent-led era. This session prioritizes peer-to-peer dialogue over traditional presentations to explore building trust and efficiency in codebases large and small. Join small-group discussions about the realities of rapid prototyping, improving existing applications, modernizing legacy applications, and build a network of experts pushing the boundaries. Come with your ideas and leave with practical insights for how to move even faster with confidence.

sessions.title: Antigravity for Enterprise Development
sessions.description: In this lightning talk, we'll deep dive into tips and features to make the most of Antigravity for complex, enterprise development tasks.

sessions.title: Applying agentic framework to real world use cases in regulated industries
sessions.description: Move beyond agent hype into compliant AI for Insurance and Finance. This session provides a blueprint for multi-agent systems on Vertex AI. Using Property Insurance and Mortgage cases, we show how to deconstruct high-stakes processes into specialized tasks. Learn to use the Agentic Design Kit (ADK) for traceability and governance. Attendees will leave with a pragmatic playbook for deploying agentic systems that satisfy the most stringent audit requirements while driving radical gains in operational efficiency.

sessions.title: Apps, automation, and agents: The future of building on Google Workspace
sessions.description: With new AI capabilities in Google Workspace, anyone can turn ideas into intelligent automation and custom solutions. In this session, we’ll unveil the next step in the evolution of the Google Workspace platform. We’ll also show how new agentic tools are making it easier than ever to build integrations, automate tasks, and connect to critical apps – all in a unified and secure environment.

sessions.title: Architect agentic conversational AI: Dialogflow CX & generative playbooks
sessions.description: High-stakes environments require conversational agents that balance deterministic precision with generative fluidity. This session deconstructs a Zero-Trust Hub-and-Spoke architecture merging Dialogflow CX flows with Generative Playbooks. We whiteboard routing logic for regulated industries and deep-dive into secure tool-calling via Cloud Run and VPC-SC. Via a banking-grade demo, we showcase a code-first evaluation strategy (dfcx-scrapi) for metrics, agent-led self-escalation, and robust automated CI/CD to ensure trusted, human-in-the-loop AI.

sessions.title: Architect trust: Enterprise guardrails for Google Workspace Studio
sessions.description: The rise of agentic automation has reached a turning point. Google Workspace Studio now enables users with zero coding experience to architect workflows. For the enterprise, this introduces a new frontier of security and compliance considerations. We’ll explore the critical intersection of user innovation and corporate command, and demonstrate how you and your workforce can safely automate at scale – from mitigating inadvertent data exposure to defending against malicious actors.

sessions.title: Architect with Google Axion: A decision framework for Arm workloads
sessions.description: Moving to Arm shouldn’t be a guessing game. Join experts for a breakdown of the Google Axion custom Arm-based processor family and how to map it to your specific workload requirements. We’ll examine the architectural differences between the cost-optimized N family and the performance-optimized C family, providing you with a definitive decision framework. Discover how to use features like custom machine types to run on the exact compute shape required. Learn from leading customers about how they’ve leveraged Axion for their businesses.

sessions.title: Architect zero-trust security with Cloud Run
sessions.description: Are you hitting the “Day 2” networking and security wall? Learn how to architect a zero-trust foundation for private enterprise apps and agents on Cloud Run. Join us to discover low-code, secure-by-design recipes for identity-based security. This session explores how to simplify human logins using Identity-Aware Proxy (IAP), secure private communication between services, and ensure all calls are centrally observable and traceable across Google Cloud. Leave with actionable strategies to build authenticated, traceable, and protected cloud-first apps.

sessions.title: Architecting a multi-agentic platform for hundreds of thousands users
sessions.description: Moving a multi-agent AI platform from a compelling demo to a production-ready system for thousands of users presents a massive leap in architectural complexity. This session is a practical, 'from the field' case study on how we designed, built, and launched a large-scale agentic platform. We will move beyond theory and dive deep into the specific architectural patterns that ensured stability, security, and performance.We'll cover key architectural capabilities required to launch the solution to production for hundreds of thousands users.

sessions.title: Architecting agentic observability: Scale and optimize agent quality
sessions.description: Multi-agent systems in production often suffer from hidden latency, quality drift, and unmonitored inference costs. This discussion group focuses on debugging agents and monitoring for agent quality using OpenTelemetry instrumentation and integrated evaluation on Agent Engine. We will deep dive into the technical mechanics of debugging ADK-based agents to identify performance bottlenecks. Bring your specific troubleshooting scenarios as we analyze real-time monitoring of agent-to-tool interactions. Walk away with an Agent Observability blueprint and an OTel deployment checklist.

sessions.title: Architecting agents: Scale and govern your AI workforce
sessions.description: Managing enterprise-scale AI ecosystems requires a centralized control plane to eliminate shadow AI and redundant development workflows. This discussion group will focus on AI agents and MCP servers. We'll deep dive into technical strategies for agents on Vertex AI Agent Engine and Cloud Run while enforcing identity-first security. Bring your integration challenges as we will troubleshoot Model Context Protocol (MCP) standards and identity and access management policy enforcement. Walk away with an Agent Registry deployment checklist and an MCP integration blueprint.

sessions.title: Architecting Enterprise GenAI: Building Production-Grade Agents on Vertex AI
sessions.description: Join us to whiteboard the production architecture of a real-world enterprise virtual agent. We’ll reverse-engineer a custom Vertex AI RAG stack, detailing how we used Agent Builder and the Reranker API to master complex retrieval. Learn the code-level patterns for seamless human handoff integration and how to automate quality evaluation with BigQuery. Leave with a blueprint for enterprise agentic AI.

sessions.title: Architecting for data diversity: A blueprint for intelligent cross-cloud retail
sessions.description: Stop wrestling with fragmented data silos and start building agents that actually understand your business. In a session resembling a developer talk show, we’ll solve the e-commerce mess by architecting a unified intelligence layer live. Learn to build a “polyglot brain” that orchestrates AlloyDB for vector search, MongoDB for flexible catalogs, and BigQuery for deep analytics – all tied together via the MCP Toolbox for Databases. We’ll show you how to pick the right tool for the job to eliminate data-diversity friction. You’ll come away with a scalable architectural pattern that turns chaotic Cloud Storage images and logs into real-time, conversational intelligence.

sessions.title: Architecting for memory: A deep dive on context engineering for production agents
sessions.description: A production agent is only as good as the information it has. Join this deep-dive discussion for architects and builders to explore advanced architectural patterns for context engineering, ensuring your agents can maintain stateful, personalized conversations at enterprise scale.

sessions.title: Architecting for the agent and beyond: Inside Mattel's product quality world

Join Insight and Mattel for a deep dive into the engineering journey behind the Conversational Analytics Agent for Product Quality Analysis (PQA). This session moves beyond the code to explore how Mattel integrates Google Cloud AI with Jira to automate complex workflows and drive organizational efficiency. Discover the blueprint for building agents that engineers trust and how this architecture scales to support broader quality goals.

sessions.title: Architecting Gemini Enterprise for regulated industries
sessions.description: "Can we use GenAI without data leaving our perimeter?" For regulated industries, the answer must be a verifiable "Yes." This session whiteboards a Zero Trust GenAI Architecture using Gemini. We design the "Private RAG" pattern for confidential data, tackling three challenges: Perimeter, by configuring VPC-SC and PSC to block public internet traversal; Encryption, via CMEK and Data Residency for sovereignty; and Identity, by architecting ACL propagation to the Vector Database. Leave with a reference architecture that satisfies your CISO.

sessions.title: Architecting high-performance SaaS: Lessons from top ISVs
