Join technical leaders from our top ISV partners as they reveal the architectural decisions behind their technology. We’ll dive into how they use Compute Engine and Google Cloud Hyperdisk to eliminate storage bottlenecks and deliver extreme performance. Whether you’re building next-gen AI applications or protecting critical enterprise data, learn the design patterns that power the world’s most successful software.

sessions.title: Architecting intent-driven operations with Gemini Cloud Assist

Using whiteboards, we collaboratively architect the VPC, high-throughput storage, and performance tuning strategies. Learn from a real-world megaproject to ensure resilience for hardware and leave with practical blueprints for your most demanding AI infrastructure deployments.

sessions.title: Architecting Multi-Agent AI: A 2-Hour Workshop on the Agent Development Kit (ADK)
sessions.description: Step into the world of autonomous AI with this 2-hour Agent Development Kit (ADK) workshop. Move beyond basic chatbots and build sophisticated, multi-agent systems that reason, plan, and use tools. You will learn to create your first Gemini-powered agent, integrate custom APIs, and orchestrate specialized AI teams using Routers, Sequential Chains, and Parallel execution. Finally, master agent memory to manage complex, multi-step workflows seamlessly.

sessions.title: Architecting Multimodal GenAI Applications for Healthcare

We focus on concrete design patterns and architectural best practices using Google Cloud Vertex AI, the ADK, and Agent Engine. sessions.title: Architecting rack-scale AI: Inside Nvidia Blackwell on Google Cloud

We'll debate the tradeoffs of advanced techniques like DPO, PPO, and RLOO, and dissect the architecture required to run them on Cloud TPUs. You'll be able to share your experiences taking workflows from local research to multi-node clusters. Whether you are a JAX expert or curious about the switch, come discuss how to democratize efficient LLM alignment.

sessions.title: Assembling Digital Twins for Physical AI: Accelerate Sim-to-Real using NVIDIA Isaac Sim with Cosmos on Google Cloud
sessions.description: In this hands-on lab, you will explore how to dramatically enhance synthetic training data for Physical AI using NVIDIA’s Cosmos and Isaac Sim, all powered by Google Cloud G4 (RTX Pro 6000) instances. You will step through a complete, simulation-focused data-generation pipeline, starting by exploring a baseline environment in Isaac Sim to capture an initial dataset of robotic demonstrations. Next, you will enrich this baseline data using Cosmos, applying generative AI to create photorealistic, physically consistent variations with diverse lighting, textures, and object placements based on simple text prompts. Finally, you will conduct a side-by-side comparison of the datasets and policy rollouts, evaluating the visual diversity and robustness of models trained purely on standard simulation data versus those trained on the Cosmos-generated dataset to see firsthand how generative modeling on Google Cloud unlocks significant performance gains.

sessions.title: Beyond AI optimism: 5 ways to move from saving time to sparking innovation

While leaders are optimistic about AI, only 3% of companies have truly transformed.* Join our panel as we unpack what the data tells us about what’s required to move from optimism to real business value. We’ll discuss bridging the gap between executive vision and employee reality, and share 5 steps to accelerate AI maturity in your organization.

* Google/Hypothesis Group, Beyond AI Optimism, Global, online survey, n=2,643 decision-makers and knowledge workers at mid-market or enterprise organizations, July 18, 2025–August 11, 2025.

sessions.title: Beyond backup: What cyber recovery actually requires today
sessions.description:
Legacy snapshots, custom scripts, and versioning weren't built for today's cyber threats. When attackers strike, can you identify the blast radius, verify your recovery point is clean, and restore operations with confidence? To actually recover your business, you need three critical capabilities: immutable copies that attackers can't delete, air-gapped storage they can't reach, and verified identities to access them. This session explores what true cyber recovery requires for organizations running critical Google workloads, such as Google Compute Engine, Google Cloud SQL, and Google Workspace. Leave with a framework to evaluate whether your organization is ready to recover from a cyber attack.

By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.description: The rise of agentic software and vibe coding has shifted cloud requirements. For pioneers like Replit, seamless AI requires moving beyond standard configurations. sessions.title: Beyond the simple SELECT: Become an analytics hero with AlloyDB NL2SQL
sessions.description: Writing a simple SELECT is easy but crafting complex joins to get the exact result you want is not. To make matters worse, you can't write effective queries without spending hours understanding your data schema. Let me present the AlloyDB NL2SQL extension. In this session, discover how AlloyDB builds critical layers of metadata that help AI models understand your data context. Learn how to turn natural language into correct SQL execution and become an analytics hero in minutes, not days.

sessions.title: Beyond the warehouse: Architecting BigQuery for the future of analytics
sessions.description: Transitioning from traditional analytics to agent-driven AI requires a robust architecture. This session unpacks the BigQuery serverless engine, covering how it manages workloads from petabyte-scale ELT processes to dashboards with sub-second response times. We’ll explain how decoupled storage and compute enable lag-free autoscaling, and how the autonomous query processor accelerates queries across various formats. Join us to discover the mechanics behind efficient, elastic performance for unpredictable, multimodal workloads.

sessions.title: Beyond vibe coding: Deploy prototypes with Vertex AI and Cloud Run
sessions.description: Vibe coding prototypes has never been easier, but achieving production readiness requires more than just a clever prompt. In this technical deep dive, we’ll go from rapid prototyping in Google AI Studio to enterprise-grade deployments with Vertex AI and Cloud Run. Learn how to migrate logic from Google AI Studio into a governed Vertex AI pipeline, deploy GPU-enabled containers on Cloud Run, secure endpoints with Workload Identity Federation and Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) networking, and automate releases with continuous integration and deployment (CI/CD).

sessions.title: BigQuery and Looker Studio patterns
sessions.description: Many teams struggle to move past basic reporting with BigQuery and Looker Studio. During our conversations, data practitioners will share unique use cases, from building custom alert systems to using BQML results in creative visualizations. Attendees will leave with a toolkit of innovative architecture patterns and a list of common pitfalls to avoid when scaling these tools together.

sessions.title: BigQuery Graph: Uncover complex, hidden relationships in your data
sessions.description: Stop moving your data and start connecting it. BigQuery Graph extends your analytics to include high-performance graph analysis without the need for ETL or standalone databases. We’ll showcase the unified query experience, discuss use cases for fraud and AI, and demonstrate how native visualization makes explaining data investigations easier than ever. You'll learn how we are evolving this foundation into a unified intelligence layer that maps enterprise knowledge and metrics directly onto your data, grounding your agents in your enterprise truth.

sessions.title: BigQuery multimodal analytics with generative AI
sessions.description: Discuss how BigQuery brings AI models directly to your data via simple SQL. We’ll explore using generative AI for deeper semantic understanding of multimodal assets. The group will examine practical workflows for analyzing unstructured content, such as extracting structured entities from PDFs and images. We’ll review frameworks for scaling generative tasks, ranging from sentiment analysis and summarization to synthetic data generation.

sessions.title: BigQuery multimodal embeddings and vector search
sessions.description: Join this session to brainstorm how multimodal vector search unlocks the true meaning of your data. We will explore moving beyond simple text matching to perform similarity searches on images, audio, and video using Google's ScaNN technology. The group will discuss building serverless indexes that scale to billions of embeddings. We will examine how to integrate these semantic insights directly with analytics to power recommendation engines, entity resolution, and personalized experiences.

sessions.title: Blending AI into every café: How Tropical Smoothie is reinventing QSR operations
sessions.description:
What does AI actually look like on the café floor? Learn how Tropical Smoothie is using AI to simplify store operations, accelerate franchisee support, improve multi‑location visibility, and prevent issues before they impact the business, without adding headcount. Walk away with practical insights on scaling smarter while consistently elevating the guest experience, and lessons QSR leaders can apply across their own brands.

By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Blueprint for success: Scale Your business with 2026 priority plays

Each play is built on validated market opportunities, supported by a full bill of materials, and mapped directly to the customer lifecycle. Learn how to unlock maximum impact and accelerate your next win.

sessions.title: Blueprints for production AI: Agentic design patterns and reference architectures

sessions.title: Boost AI context with hybrid search in Spanner
sessions.description: Go beyond keyword search to get the most out of your operational data. In this session, learn to build sophisticated, AI-powered experiences with Spanner. Discover how to combine full-text and vector search into powerful multi-model queries that deeply understand user intent. We’ll unveil new AI innovations that simplify contextual search and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) applications. Explore seamless integrations with Vertex AI to create the next generation of contextual, intelligent, multi-model search.

sessions.title: Boost your resilience posture with native fault injection testing
sessions.description: Join this session to explore strategies for boosting the reliability of enterprise and AI/ML deployments through resilience testing. Learn how to perform failure testing on your services to ensure predictable behavior during disruptions. We’ll unveil a new product designed to automate and simplify these testing processes. Plus, learn firsthand from two customers about their journeys and lessons from building mission-critical applications on Google Cloud.

sessions.title: Boosting productivity with Gemini CLI
sessions.description: Let's continue our conversation on 10x productivity with Gemini CLI in this discussion group. Join this dicussion to dive deeper into how you can create more productive teams.

sessions.title: Branch of the future
sessions.description: The branch of the future uses intelligent location tracking and biometric recognition to help create a streamlined, personalized experience from the moment a customer arrives. By empowering staff with real-time insights and automated follow-ups, the branch helps make interactions efficient, accessible, and highly tailored to the individual’s needs.

sessions.title: Breaking barriers: How Google AI powers multilingual growth
sessions.description: The most recent Gemini advances can help transform your business, making it truly global. You can now answer multilingual support in Google Sheets, have real-time translated conversations in Google Meet, and use Vertex’s translation APIs across all your workflows. Join us for a presentation that will introduce Google’s offering for operating in a multilingual environment, as well as case studies from early adopters of Meet’s speech-translation feature.

sessions.title: Breaking free at scale: The inside story of Candescent's Google Cloud journey
sessions.description: Candescent, the largest independent digital-banking platform in the US, requires one of the most complex cloud transformations in the industry after its divestiture from its previous parent company. Join us to learn how NTT DATA is helping Candescent with the migration of AI-assisted discovery, ensuring compliance, strengthening FinOps, and maintaining operational continuity during and after the migration to Google Cloud. Attendees will gain insight into managing large‑scale migrations, addressing risk in carve‑outs, and applying AI‑driven optimization to boost reliability, security, and efficiency. By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: Breaking the migration bottleneck: AI-agentic code conversion at scale
sessions.description: Converting legacy ETL logic is the "last mile" hurdle stalling cloud adoption. Join Google Cloud PSO to unveil MigConvert, an AI-agentic framework for automated code conversion at scale. Using a "Train-Assess-Convert" methodology with Gemini, we’ll demonstrate hybrid workflows, fine tunned models usage, and "self-healing" validation loops. See how leaders reduced manual refactoring toil by 50% to accelerate their journey to BigQuery and Dataproc. Join us to automate your migration!

sessions.title: Bridge language gaps with AI
sessions.description: Experience how real-time speech translation in Google Meet dissolves language barriers. Enter a private booth and engage in a multilingual conversation where tools built with Google Cloud AI translate your words while preserving your unique voice and tone—making global collaboration feel natural and inclusive.

sessions.title: Bridge the gap: Scale AI readiness with Google certifications
sessions.description: As AI redefines the workforce, higher education must pivot to keep pace. Join this panel discussion, featuring academic leaders and Google certification experts, to explore integrating industry-recognized AI credentials into your curriculum. We’ll discuss actionable strategies for enhancing student employability and modernizing degree programs through strategic industry partnerships. Gain insights into how North American institutions are bridging the skills gap and preparing the next generation of graduates for an AI-augmented economy.

sessions.title: Bridge the operational and analytics gap with Spanner and data lakehouses
sessions.description: Learn how to build and operate a zero-ETL low latency serving platform on Spanner that’s natively integrated with your Apache Iceberg data lakehouses such as BigQuery. Discover how the Spanner columnar engine accelerates high-performance analytics on operational data. Explore seamless integrations with BigQuery, federated queries to data lakes, and high-performance Apache Spark jobs with Spanner Data Boost. Join this session to learn how to unify your entire data landscape, eliminating complex ETL pipelines and unlocking insights for your agentic AI and real-time analytics workloads.

sessions.title: Bridging worlds: Bringing Google Cloud Platform's power to open source data lakes
sessions.description: Migrate petabyte-scale Iceberg data lakes to Google Cloud Platform while retaining format benefits. This interactive session uses a real customer use case to evaluate Lakehouse architecture in GCP. Learn to design pipelines and blueprint an agentic data foundation. We will detail BigQuery/Lakehouse integration with Vertex AI and Gemini, and you will leave with an target blueprint to turn data into a foundation for gen AI and scale-optimized analytics.

sessions.title: Bring AI precision to dark web intelligence
sessions.description: Security teams are drowning in dark web noise because legacy tools rely on brittle keywords that threat actors easily evade. This session will outline the current challenges facing traditional dark web monitoring and how to reclaim the intelligence high ground. We’ll explore a shift toward adaptive systems that use smart automation and AI that understands context to decode threat actor chatter. You’ll learn how to move from manual triage to high-fidelity defense, and to use Gemini to build your organization profile and analyze millions of daily external events with 98% accuracy.

sessions.title: Bring your AI agents to Gemini Enterprise
sessions.description: Did you build your own agent and want to surface it in Gemini Enterprise? You can do it! Join us and we will take you through the process of registering high-code ADK and 3rd-party agents to make them instantly available and discoverable within Gemini Enterprise, and answer any questions you may have along the way.

sessions.title: Build "Living Games" with AI
sessions.description: Evolve beyond Live Services into "Living Games" that rapidly react to player behavior. Google demonstrates how Generative AI closes the loop between player behavior and content creation. Attendees will gain practical strategies for scalable implementation, solving IP challenges, and managing costs to build the next generation of endlessly replayable, responsive experiences.

sessions.title: Build a cross-cloud network to connect apps securely across clouds
sessions.description: Gen AI and agents are revolutionary, and they’ve become integral to business success. But they demand a robust network architecture to support agents, AI services, and data anywhere across clouds. Discover new technologies and architectures to establish secure, reliable, and high-performance connectivity spanning Google Cloud, multicloud, and hybrid networks. We’ll explore how to seamlessly integrate service-centric architectures, accelerating developer velocity without compromising security.

sessions.title: Build a multi-agent PR roaster with Antigravity & ADK
sessions.description: Watch an AI agent build a team of agents live. We will use Antigravity and the Agent Development Kit (ADK) to code a multi-agent PR roaster from scratch. Agent 1 analyzes the GitHub PR code, then Agent 2 uses that analysis to roast the code and generate a custom meme with Gemini Nano Banana Pro. We will build this entire workflow with AI Agents. Bring your worst PRs.

sessions.title: Build a multicloud open data lakehouse
sessions.description: Build your Apache Iceberg lakehouse with multicloud data access and governance. Automate cataloging and pipelines with AI agents. Accelerate Apache Spark with Lightning Engine and integrate with AI agents.

sessions.title: Build advanced AI applications with Spanner Graph
sessions.description: Build next-gen AI applications with Spanner Graph, which offers globally scalable graph capabilities for mission-critical workloads. In this session, dive into Spanner Graph's new capabilities to simplify building with graphs and extracting insights from your connected data. You'll learn how Yahoo! and Target are building generative AI applications at scale by combining graph, text, and vector data to deliver delightful customer experiences and enable agentic workloads.

sessions.title: Build agentic AI with Gemini and developer platforms on GDC
sessions.description: Bring the advanced reasoning of Gemini 3 and next-gen agentic workflows to your most secure, sovereign environments. Powered by the raw performance of Nvidia Blackwell GPUs, Google Distributed Cloud (GDC) is redefining what’s possible at the edge. This session will enable you to turbocharge development using the Gemini command line interface and Antigravity, Google’s new platform for building autonomous agents. You’ll learn how to deploy managed AI inference and unlock the full potential of gen AI, all while keeping your enterprise code, searches, and data strictly local, secure, and under your control.

sessions.title: Build agents at scale: How Shopify powers Sidekick with Claude on Vertex AI
sessions.description: Shopify’s Sidekick is an AI commerce assistant that combines advanced reasoning with the intuition of “vibe entrepreneurship” to help merchants improve product listings, pull performance reports, and make data-driven decisions faster. Join this session to explore how Shopify uses Anthropic’s Claude on Vertex AI to power low-latency, reliable multistep workflows with model updates in under 24 hours. We’ll take you through the architecture and the key choices made on Google Cloud to ensure high reliability without sacrificing performance.

sessions.title: Build AI agents at scale with Google Cloud
sessions.description: This spotlight session focuses on the "how" of scaling: building AI agents that can handle millions of interactions while maintaining peak performance. We will showcase how Google Cloud’s AI agent platform allows businesses to move from prototype to global production faster than ever. You will also learn how to leverage our AI agent platform to manage the entire lifecycle of your agents, while ensuring they grow alongside your business.

sessions.title: Build AI agents on Cloud Run
sessions.description: Move beyond the prototype and scale your AI agents into production with a robust serverless infrastructure. And learn how to use Cloud Run for running distributed multi-agent systems with Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, without managing servers.

sessions.title: Build AI architectures with custom models on Cloud Run
sessions.description: Modern AI architectures use specialized and open models to deliver high-performance features with greater efficiency. Join this session to explore how the Cloud Run serverless GPU architecture provides a scalable, cost-effective runtime, without the complexity of having to manage clusters. We’ll demonstrate a repeatable workflow for hosting custom models on serverless GPU instances, and show you how to harness the power of the NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 GPU to scale your AI with the simplicity and pay-per-use efficiency of Cloud Run. We’ll also cover model fine-tuning with Cloud Run jobs.

sessions.title: Build an agent-ready workforce: The GEAR strategy for 2026
sessions.description: The agentic era is here, and as the leading AI hyperscaler, Google Cloud bridges the gap between idea and impact. How do you turn the pressure to innovate into results? You need a partner who has navigated this shift firsthand. Our driving force is to accelerate your transformation using the same AI infrastructure that fuels Google. To lead this charge, we’re introducing Gemini Enterprise Agent Ready (GEAR) - a premier program designed to future-proof your workforce. Join us to learn how GEAR brings Google AI to every employee and every workflow, every step of the way.

sessions.title: Build an agentic enterprise for the modern workforce
sessions.description: Defining a clear business case for AI transformation is a top priority for today’s leaders. Explore how data serves as the critical fuel for transformation, enabling agentic teams – autonomous “digital colleagues” – to act as a force multiplier for workforce talent on Google Cloud. sessions.title: Build an AI Agent and Configure an MCP Server on Cloud Run
sessions.description: Lions, tigers, agents! In this hands-on workshop, you will build an AI "Tour Guide Agent" for a zoo using the Agent Development Kit (ADK). Your Python-based agent will combine data from a remote MCP server with Wikipedia insights to craft the perfect visitor experience. You’ll learn to separate reasoning from tooling, connect to remote services, and deploy your guide to Cloud Run using secure IAM authentication.

sessions.title: Build an AI Agent and Configure an MCP Server on Cloud Run
sessions.description: Lions, tigers, agents! In this hands-on workshop, you will build an AI "Tour Guide Agent" for a zoo using the Agent Development Kit (ADK). sessions.title: Build an AI threat hunter: Agentic workflows with Google ADK
sessions.description: Stop hunting manually and start scaling with AI. sessions.title: Build an AI-Powered F1 Analytics Agent with McLaren Racing
sessions.description: In this hands-on workshop, you'll get behind the wheel and build a Race Intelligence Platform for McLaren Racing. sessions.title: Build an AI-Powered F1 Analytics Agent with McLaren Racing
sessions.description: In this hands-on workshop, you'll get behind the wheel and build a Race Intelligence Platform for McLaren Racing. sessions.title: Build and govern your Autonomous Workforce on ServiceNow powered by Gemini
sessions.description:

sessions.title: Build and optimize GKE workloads: A master class in node-level performance
sessions.description: Maximizing performance requires deep node-level customization and precise benchmarking. In this discussion, we'll reveal configuration and tooling for optimizing stateless, stateful, and inference workloads on GKE. Discover new GKE APIs that generate pod manifests with industry-standard optimizations built-in. We'll dive deep into benchmarking and tuning Nginx, Redis, MySQL, and preview of GKE new Inference optimzation, while sharing a preview of packaged optimizations. You'll learn to leverage open-source frameworks to reproduce these gains for your unique workloads. Leave this discussion with a performance-tuning playbook and a reference architecture for high-scale GKE nodes.

sessions.title: Build and orchestrate enterprise agents with Gemini and Atlassian Rovo
sessions.description: The future of development lies in orchestrating a workforce of agents, rather than relying on a single one. Join us to witness the Gemini CLI evolve into the universal connector, dispatching tasks to any agent – from custom agents to Atlassian Rovo. We’ll unveil the “agents everywhere” architecture with a live demo of the Agent2Agent (A2A) protocol. Observe the Gemini CLI act as a secure control plane, seamlessly routing tasks to your agents and to Rovo for expert execution. Discover how to build a unified, scalable agent network that breaks down silos between your tools and teams.

sessions.title: Build and scale AI infrastructure with Compute Engine, Hyperdisk ML, and GKE
sessions.description: Providing real-time AI recommendations and processing billions of daily data points requires a foundation designed for scale and reliability. Join this session to explore the technical transition from standard VMs to optimized AI infrastructure using Compute Engine, Hyperdisk ML, and Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE). Learn how top-tier engineering leaders solved their hardest challenges in training and inference. Leave with proven design patterns for scaling mission-critical AI workloads without sacrificing performance.

sessions.title: Build and scale GKE workloads: A master class in node-level performance
sessions.description: Maximizing performance requires deep node-level customization and precise benchmarking. In this session, explore the configuration and tooling for optimizing stateless, stateful, and inference workloads on Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE). Discover new GKE APIs that generate pod manifests with built-in, industry-standard optimizations. Dive deep into benchmarking and tuning workloads like Nginx, Redis, MySQL, and the new GKE inference stack, and get a preview of packaged optimizations. Learn to use open source frameworks to reproduce these gains for your unique workloads. And leave with a performance-tuning playbook and a reference architecture for high-scale GKE nodes.

sessions.title: Build and scale: Launching Gemini AI agents on Google Cloud Marketplace
sessions.description:
Join Promevo CTO John Pettit to learn how ISVs can transform their software with custom Gemini-powered AI agents. Using gPanel as a blueprint, we explore the technical journey of integrating Google Cloud’s most powerful models into existing SaaS architectures. Discover how to package these innovations for the Google Cloud Marketplace to reach new customers and accelerate revenue. This session provides a practical roadmap for the development, deployment, and monetization of enterprise-ready AI agents within the Google Cloud ecosystem.

By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Build beyond the CPU: Native AI and agentic autoscaling on GKE
sessions.description: Standard autoscaling based on CPU and memory metrics often forces a choice: either over-provision resources or risk latency spikes during demand surges. Join this session for an introduction to intent-based autoscaling in Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE), a paradigm that adds automated rightsizing and custom workload metrics as native capabilities. Learn to architect native scaling based on application metrics such as queue depths, agent tool use, or latency histograms, eliminating the need for external adapters or sidecars. And discover how to move beyond generic resource limits to create a fluid infrastructure that reacts to real-time AI demand.

sessions.title: Build connected AI: Orchestrate tools and agents with registries and ADK
sessions.description: Move beyond simple prototypes and build agents that can access your organization’s most critical data – whether it lives in third-party SaaS or legacy on-premises systems. In this session, learn how to use the Agent Development Kit (ADK) with Agent Registry to securely connect your agent to other agents and tools. We’ll cover the full builder’s journey – from discovering and integrating with existing Google and partner Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to building custom MCP servers from scratch using the specification boost add-on to instantly transform any API into agent-ready tools.

sessions.title: Build conversational agents on PostgreSQL and MySQL
sessions.description: Give your conversational data agents a long-term memory. Use CloudSQL to retain context over time, and leverage a dynamic knowledge graph for precise, enterprise-scale management and retrieval.

sessions.title: Build custom SecOps agents
sessions.description: Hunt threat actors, not context. Use the Agent Development Kit and Model Context Protocol servers to build specialized SOC agents, then deploy them in Gemini Enterprise for governance, security, and scale.

sessions.title: Build data-rich AI on GKE: A deep dive with ClickHouse and Character.AI
sessions.description: Expensive accelerators require high-throughput, low-latency data planes to maintain saturation. In this session, explore Google Kubernetes (GKE) primitives designed for stateful scaling to achieve optimal performance for AI and enterprise databases, such as ClickHouse. Learn to architect storage solutions with Lustre and Cloud Storage FUSE to drive peak throughput for training and inference. We’ll demonstrate how storage profiles and attribute classes simplify performance tuning, and how Run:ai Model Streamer and key-value caching accelerate inference tokens-per-second. Leave with a battle-tested blueprint for zero-downtime scaling and a reference architecture for high-performance data on GKE.

sessions.title: Build enterprise-ready security agents with MCP servers
sessions.description: Transform static runbooks into dynamic, agentic defense. Learn how to build and deploy multi-agent systems using the Google Security Operations Model Context Protocol (MCP) server and Agent Development Kit. We’ll progress from “Hello, World!” to complex ecosystems using Vertex AI, the Agent2Agent protocol, and Gemini Enterprise. We’ll also detail how a large organization transformed its security operations center workflows by building its own agents. Discover how you can build model-driven interfaces that allow AI to reason over your existing security tools and APIs.

sessions.title: Build fast, run lean: Accelerate development with Gemini and Cloud Run
sessions.description: Build better apps faster, even with limited resources. Learn how to utilize Gemini in Google AI Studio for rapid prototyping and seamless deployment to Cloud Run. We’ll show you how to set up nimble, automated pipelines that allow you to innovate quickly, scale effortlessly, and control costs. Join us to transform your development process from idea to production.

sessions.title: Build multi-agent systems that actually work
sessions.description:
Multi-agent architectures are powerful but over-applied. Join this session with Anthropic to learn when multiple agents genuinely outperform a single agent – and how to build them with Claude on Vertex AI. You’ll gain insight into the three scenarios where multi-agent consistently wins (context isolation, parallel execution, and specialization), the four architecture patterns with concrete trade-offs, and the context-centric decomposition strategy most teams get wrong. Plus, you’ll explore verification subagents and the pitfalls that undermine even well-designed systems.

By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: Build multihost inference systems with Pathways-managed TPUs on GKE
sessions.description: Serving modern large language models often requires inference to scale beyond a single accelerator host. Multihost inference introduces challenges such as coordinating execution across hosts, efficiently loading large model checkpoints, and maintaining low latency and availability under dynamic traffic. In this session, we’ll share our experience running multihost inference workloads on Tensor Processing Units (TPUs) using Pathways, which provides a unified runtime for coordinating computation and communication across many TPU hosts.

sessions.title: Build production-ready agents on Google Cloud: A guide for architects and CTOs
sessions.description: If you’re an IT leader, architect, or CTO tasked with moving AI from a “cool demo” to a core business asset, this session is for you. We move past the basics to provide an opinionated, battle-tested guide for building, governing and optimizing  enterprise-grade AI agents at scale. We’ll dive deep into top agent design patterns and the build vs. buy tradeoffs that every architect must navigate. Google Cloud partner Ford will share real world ROI insights from their agent production using Agent Development Kit.

sessions.title: Build production-ready and hybrid AI apps with Gemini and Firebase
sessions.description: Learn how to add generative AI directly into your mobile and web apps with the simplicity and security of Firebase AI Logic. In this session, we’ll go over how to confidently move beyond basic Gemini integration and into production-grade deployment. Join us to gain essential techniques for protecting your app from prompt theft, implementing guardrails to guarantee reliable and high-quality model responses, and deploying a cost-optimized, hybrid (on-device/in-cloud) inference model for a smooth and consistent user experience.

sessions.title: Build real-time AI agents with context engineering on Google Cloud
sessions.description:
AI agents are only as good as the data they can access, yet legacy architectures often fail to provide the real-time context agents require. This session explores context engineering: the foundation for ensuring data freshness and quality. We will demonstrate how to unify streaming and low-latency serving on Google Cloud using the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and Vertex AI. Learn how combining Confluent’s real-time data with Google Cloud enables agents to take accurate, autonomous action without the lag of traditional data stacks.





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Build real-time apps with PostgreSQL and Firebase
sessions.description: Build modern mobile and web apps with Firebase’s SQL solution. Learn how to deliver responsive experiences using automatic offline caching, real-time sync, and built-in security.

sessions.title: Build resilient AI: Maximize TPU performance and scale with GKE workloads
sessions.description: Hardware failures and resource fragmentation shouldn’t stall AI innovation. Join this session to discover the Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) architecture that accelerates workload scheduling with modular compute cubes. Dive deep into how to architect a dynamic Tensor Processing Unit (TPU) management layer to recover from failures faster. Learn to reshape capacity on the fly and isolate faulty units without the slow delete-and-recreate cycle. And take away a blueprint for smarter bin-packing to maximize fleet utilization and performance at scale.

sessions.title: Build rich agent experiences with ADK + A2UI
sessions.description: Build an ADK agent that renders rich, interactive UI - forms, charts, and live widgets - directly in a web app using A2UI's streaming protocol. Ship a working agent-powered frontend in minutes.

sessions.title: Build scalable AI-powered web apps with Angular
sessions.description: Learn to build scalable web applications with the latest features and smart AI integrations from Angular. This session covers practical techniques to speed up your development workflow using the Gemini CLI, Model Context Protocol (MCP), Agent Skills, and more. Join us to discover how these tools can transform your development experience.

sessions.title: Build secure-by-design applications for Google Cloud
sessions.description: “Secure by design” extends beyond architecture; it requires cloud infrastructure that actively defends itself.
