sessions.title: Build transactional lakehouses: Zero-ETL with AlloyDB, BigLake, and BigQuery
sessions.description: The era of siloed data is over. The next generation of agentic AI applications requires more than just fast analytics – it needs a transactional lakehouse. In this session, discover Google Cloud’s data architecture in which AlloyDB, BigQuery, and BigLake are unified into a single, ACID-compliant ecosystem and run mission-critical transactional workloads directly with open formats like Apache Iceberg. Join us to learn how to eliminate data movement, maintain strict data consistency, and provide your AI agents with real-time, authoritative data.

sessions.title: Build vertical AI: Architect domain-specific models at scale with GKE
sessions.description: Enterprises are shifting toward specialized, vertical models tailored for specific domains. The core challenge lies in infusing proprietary enterprise data into model architectures without compromising security, performance, or cost. In this session, discover how Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) serves as the purpose-built factory for this new era of capability-aware AI. Learn to architect secure data pipelines and scale hardware-aware fine-tuning and inference environments for industry-specific workloads. Leave with a reference architecture for building secure, high-performance vertical models on GKE that maximize specialized hardware utilization.

sessions.title: Building a high-margin data cloud practice in the agentic era
sessions.description: We are entering a $1T market opportunity for agentic AI services, but enterprise value is often blocked by a lack of access to real-time data. Join us to learn how to bridge this gap using BigQuery and Gemini. We will detail three revenue-generating plays: the "Quick Win" for immediate value, the "Specialization Play" for vertical agents, and the "Transformation Play" for full-scale redesigns. Discover how to monetize your IP on Google Cloud Marketplace and position your practice at the center of the revolution.
sessions.room: Partner Summit Lounge Lightning Talk Theater 1

sessions.title: Building a mission-critical data on-ramp for AI with Hyperscience & PwC
sessions.description:
Enterprise intelligence is often trapped in complex documents, PDFs, images & manual workflows, not readily usable by AI systems. Join Joe Harrington (Head of AI Engineering, PwC) & Chip VonBurg (Field CTO, Hyperscience) to discover how PwC is leveraging the Hyperscience Hypercell on Google Cloud to bridge this gap.

Learn about Hyperscience’s “dual-brain” approach, combining the power of Gemini with the Hypercell’s standardized, event-driven document pipeline powered by Python containers & proprietary, tunable Hyperscience AI models. See how this architecture delivers structured, AI-ready data at mission-critical scale & accuracy.





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Building a scalable agentic AI platform to reimagine enterprise operations
sessions.description:
Find out how McKinsey, Google Cloud, and clients like CBRE are partnering to deploy agentic AI across operations to unlock significant productivity gains and cost savings. Join us to learn how CBRE built a scalable agentic AI platform that automates processes, proactively triggers actions, and facilitates agent-to-agent interactions to reduce costs and streamline operations.

By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: ​​​Building a scalable AI foundation on GCP to reimagine enterprise operations
sessions.description:
Learn how McKinsey partnered with a client to design a reusable atomic agent architecture that scales agentic AI across enterprise operations. See how granular, domain-specific agents are modularized and composed into multi-agent workflows, integrated through enterprise APIs, and governed by shared services. Hear how this structured approach enables phased scaling, reduces technical debt, and accelerates value capture from pilot to production.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Building a voice AI agent that listens, understands, and (most importantly) sells
sessions.description:
Google's Multimodal Live API delivers real-time voice conversations with 600ms latency through native audio processing and bidirectional streaming.

We built an AI shopping assistant that understands products and guides purchases using voice . By combining Live API with RAG, our system accesses product catalogs and knowledge bases through function calling, creating seamless consultation experiences.

This talk shares our development journey: integrating Live API with RAG infrastructure, designing function calling patterns, managing conversation context, and optimizing performance. You'll learn practical approaches to voice commerce, RAG integration strategies, and lessons from production deployment.

sessions.title: Building Agentic Defense with MCP Servers
sessions.description: Security teams should be hunting threat actors instead of scattered context. In this 20 minute session, we’ll build custom security agents to hunt down both. Using a remote Model Context Protocol server for Google SecOps and Google Threat Intelligence, we’ll create SOC-persona agents with Agent Development Kit and then deploy them in Gemini Enterprise for governance, observability, scalability, and security. With customized context for your agents in Vertex AI, you can build a fleet of SOC Agents tailored to your organization’s unique needs.

sessions.title: Building Agentic Defense with MCP Servers
sessions.description: Security teams should be hunting threat actors instead of scattered context. In this 20 minute session, we’ll build custom security agents to hunt down both. Using a remote Model Context Protocol server for Google SecOps and Google Threat Intelligence, we’ll create SOC-persona agents with Agent Development Kit and then deploy them in Gemini Enterprise for governance, observability, scalability, and security. With customized context for your agents in Vertex AI, you can build a fleet of SOC Agents tailored to your organization’s unique needs.

sessions.title: Building agents with Go
sessions.description: Dive deeper into how to choose the right abstraction layer for your AI agent.

sessions.title: Building AI agents at scale with CVS
sessions.description: Learn from CVS as they walk through their journey of building and scaling AI agents on Google Cloud. Taking agents from a prototype to scaled production requires robust infrastructure, and in this session, you'll discover how to achieve this using ADK and Google’s modular AI Agent builder platform.

sessions.title: Building AI-Native Data Foundations: An Agentic Approach to Data Modeling
sessions.description: Is your data truly AI-ready? Organizations possess massive data reserves, yet structuring that data into consumption-ready assets at scale remains a challenge. This session unveils an agentic framework designed to assist data teams in streamlining and scaling the data modeling process. Learn how to use agent-driven discovery for live schema mapping, accelerate the translation of business logic into performant consumption layers, and utilize self-correcting loops that enforce enterprise standards. Join us to see agentic data modeling in action.

sessions.title: Building an Agentic Platform using Ray Serve LLM and vLLM on GKE
sessions.description: Discover how to deploy Qwen model on Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) using Ray Serve and vLLM for high-throughput, low-latency inference. This session provides a guide to integrating an ADK agent for sophisticated chat and tool usage, leveraging TPU-enabled nodes for intensive workloads. Explore Ray native features for autoscaling and fault tolerance while gaining a blueprint to transform LLMs into dynamic "Agentic" systems - a key requirement for enterprises building next-generation AI applications.

sessions.title: Building an AI agent with your own data
sessions.description: Discuss the end-to-end experience of building agentic workflows using AI features in Google Cloud databases. Explore core AI development topics such as vector embeddings, vector and hybrid search, natural language processing, and orchestration. We’ll also cover key technologies such as foundation models, RAG, and MCP.

sessions.title: Building an AI app: A low-code guide for small teams
sessions.description: Build intelligent experiences without a team of AI experts. By leveraging corporate data and Google Cloud databases – such as Cloud SQL and AlloyDB for PostgreSQL – you can easily implement advanced capabilities like natural language interfaces and hybrid search. We’ll demonstrate how to spin up a smart app in minutes with auto-generated code that uses Gemini for queries, image search, and recommendations. Join us to learn how to bring your data to life with AI through simple, low-code development.

sessions.title: Building an AI supercomputer: Scale Slurm workloads on GKE
sessions.description: Dive into the architecture of running Slurm on GKE for large-scale AI training. We will detail the new Managed Slinky architecture and its deep integration with Google’s AI Hypercomputer stack—including Cluster Director and native TPU support. Learn how to combine the raw throughput of bare-metal HPC with the operational simplicity of GKE to accelerate your model training velocity.

sessions.title: Building an Apache Iceberg lakehouse in a multicloud world
sessions.description: Your AI agents are only as smart as the data they can reach. Yet, scattered enterprise silos often block true intelligence. Join us to discover how Google Cloud enables a unified approach to your data estate, utilizing Apache Iceberg as the foundation for interoperability. We’ll explore modern methodologies for connecting diverse architectures, ensuring your AI agents can operate across your entire ecosystem without the friction of traditional data movement.

sessions.title: Building Avathon's agentic SaaS at Google scale
sessions.description: Avathon is the leader in Industrial AI Autonomy, enabling enterprises to achieve autonomous operations at scale across manufacturing, supply chain, and global commerce. Avathon built agents using ADK and Gemini Enterprise, a solution that streamlines global commerce. We'll break down the "Inner Loop" of building expert trade compliance agents and the "Outer Loop" of scaling via Google's SaaS Runtime. Leave with a blueprint for multi-tenant AI Agent isolation and a roadmap to move agentic concepts into production-grade global businesses.

sessions.title: Building conversational AI with databases
sessions.description: Join us for a conversation on AI interfaces, the modern way to build an application or agent interface. We’ll talk about how natural language APIs in Google Cloud databases enable you to build multi-turn chat, conversational analytics, and other conversational data applications. We’ll also cover techniques for translating natural language to SQL queries to simplify complex user interactions and searches.

sessions.title: Building custom agents with Looker MCP and APIs
sessions.description: Go beyond standard dashboards by integrating Looker into the agentic workflow. This technical discussion focuses on using the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and Looker APIs to build and embed custom agents. We’ll talk about tool orchestration, cross-platform integrations (Jira/Slack), and the latest BI developer workflows. Bring your architecture questions and use cases for a deep dive into pushing the boundaries of embedded intelligence and actionable BI.

sessions.title: Building enterprise-grade AI agents: How enterprises scale business with Agentic AI on Google Cloud
sessions.description:
Discover how leading enterprises are leveraging Agentic AI on Google Cloud to scale their business operations and drive innovation. This session features real-life stories from enterprise customers, highlighting practical approaches, challenges, and results in deploying Agentic AI solutions. Learn actionable strategies for building robust, enterprise-grade AI agents, and gain insights into accelerating transformation, optimizing processes, and enhancing customer experiences with the power of Google Cloud’s advanced AI technologies.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Building enterprise-grade customer portals with Gemini Enterprise, ADK & A2A
sessions.description:
The future of customer service is now powered by agentic systems that can reason, plan, and act across enterprise workflows. In this session, learn how Gemini Enterprise enables teams to build intelligent, enterprise-grade customer portals grounded in a unified knowledge foundation and orchestrated through multi-agent workflows. See how organizations can move from simple experiences to production-ready, autonomous portals that solve complex problems across the enterprise.

By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Building modern apps with high-performance NoSQL databases
sessions.description: Address the specific roadblocks of wrangling unstructured data. This session canvasses high-performance use cases, focusing on operational analytics and elevating AI applications. Join us for a technical demo on operational analytics using Bigtable. We will discuss specific strategies to elevate your applications, improve performance, and handle complex data architectures.

sessions.title: Building multi-agent orchestration: Key challenges and solution approaches
sessions.description: A single agent is useful, but coordinated teams are game-changers. Scaling multi-agent systems shifts the challenge from prompting to complex orchestration. This deep dive explores managing state, error handling, and task routing in production. We compare hierarchical, graph-based, and broadcast architectures, sharing battle-tested patterns for Google Cloud. Learn to implement robust recovery for chain failures, design efficient agent-to-agent communication, and secure tool-use via Vertex AI and Gemini for enterprise-scale deployment.

sessions.title: Building next-gen audio-first experiences: Lessons from PlayStation
sessions.description: Speech is the next frontier of multimodal interaction, transforming how users engage with technology. Move beyond basic voice commands and discover what it takes to deploy low-latency, audio-first agents at global scale. In this session, we’ll break down how PlayStation partnered with Google Cloud to redefine their player experience, evolving from standard voice tech to an intelligent system that achieved a massive reduction in operational costs while significantly increasing caption accuracy. We’ll dive deep into the technical architecture behind these results, demonstrating how Gemini Audio on Vertex AI enables real-time multilingual speech-to-text (STT) support and hyper-natural text-to-speech (TTS) cues that improve accessibility for everyone. Whether you’re solving for immersive gaming or enterprise support, join us to get the production-ready blueprint for building voice interfaces that are faster, smarter, and more cost-effective.

sessions.title: Building on non-relational databases
sessions.description: Discuss how to choose a data model such as key-value, document, or graph for an entire application or a specific component of it. Explore non-relational database options on Google Cloud including Bigtable, Spanner, Firestore, and Memorystore, and how to use them for traditional applications or for AI application and agent development.

sessions.title: Building reliable agentic workflows with Cloud Composer and Airflow 3
sessions.description: Go beyond the breakout demo and dive into the practical implementation of the new agentic developer lifecycle. Join this discussion to explore how to integrate the Data Engineering Agent and Airflow 3 into your daily engineering workflow. We will discuss best practices for "shifting left" with local testing in VS Code, setting up secure CI/CD pipelines, and optimizing DAG parsing performance. Bring your questions on using agents for root-cause analysis and share strategies for implementing deferrable operators to build cost-effective, self-healing pipelines at scale.

sessions.title: Building reliable agents
sessions.description: The gap between a working demo and a production agent is architecture, not prompts. This talk examines the engineering discipline emerging around reliable agents: context engineering that treats memory as infrastructure, not afterthought; observability that traces multi-step reasoning chains; and constrained autonomy that favors narrow, specialized agents over ambitious generalists. Drawing from industry patterns and production failures, learn what it actually takes to ship agents that work at scale.

sessions.title: Building the AI-ready and intelligent campus of tomorrow, today
sessions.description: Join this panel of public sector leaders who will share the blueprint for total transformation as they build the AI-ready campus of the future today. Learn how Google’s full-stack approach to AI, anchored by Gemini Enterprise and high-performance computing, is empowering faculty, transforming teaching and learning, accelerating research and discovery, and optimizing campus operations. Discover the technical and strategic roadmaps for creating a future-proof environment that drives student success and next-generation innovation.

sessions.title: Building the future of 3D worlds and interactive play with Gemini
sessions.description:
As generative AI evolves from simple text outputs to complex, multi-modal environments, the boundaries of digital creativity are being rewritten. Join us for a high-energy lightning talk featuring two pioneers at the intersection of AI, gaming, and 3D animation: Latitude and Cartwheel.

In this session, you’ll discover how these innovators are leveraging the Gemini 3 family and Vertex AI to move from content generation to innovation:
Latitude: Learn how the creators of the world’s #1 AI Game Platform are building Voyage, their next-generation AI World Engine. Latitude will share how they use Gemini’s long-context and reasoning capabilities to orchestrate complex game logic, enabling "prompt-to-play" experiences where entire interactive worlds are built in real-time.

Cartwheel: See the future of motion with the team redefining 3D animation. Cartwheel will demonstrate their multi-modal pipeline that translates natural language to motion, video to motion, and applies complex 3D movements to characters instantly. Learn how Gemini powers their "Pose Mode" and 3D-native controls to provide professional-grade precision for animators and creators alike.

sessions.title: Building trust in AI: A discussion on agent security and governance
sessions.description: What are your top security concerns when it comes to AI agents accessing enterprise data? What level of control and visibility do you need to feel comfortable? How do you balance the need for AI/agent democratization capabilities with the imperative for security and compliance? In this collaborative discussion, CISOs and IT executives will examine the multi-tiered security frameworks - integrating identity, network, and content layers - that are essential for securing agentic workflows. Through peer-to-peer dialogue, we will address top security risks and define the level of observability needed to maintain confidence in AI. Discussions will focus on practical methodologies for balancing rapid agent adoption with centralized governance, least-privilege access, and rigorous auditing. Join this group to share your perspective and contribute to the "enterprise-readiness checklist" for the future of AI-driven productivity.

sessions.title: Building Trustable Modeling Agents Using a Neurosymbolic Approach
sessions.description: Enterprise standards are too complex for traditional RAG. This session demonstrates a shift from simple documentation retrieval to Symbolic Anchoring. We’ll perform a technical deep-dive into a multi-agent orchestrated system designed for data modeling. We will explore advanced techniques—including mathematical label segregation and subgraph expansion—and show how a generative Actor-Critic loop provides the deterministic governance needed for enterprise trust. Discover how to enable the next generation of agents that reason, verify, and architect with scientific precision.

sessions.title: Building trustworthy Agentic AI at scale with Google Cloud
sessions.description:
Agentic AI delivers value when platforms make it scalable and trustworthy. This session shows how Google Cloud enables autonomous agents that reduce manual effort, accelerate decisions, and improve operational outcomes. See how enterprises move from pilots to ROI-driven deployments with built-in security, control, and enterprise readiness.







By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Building what's next: AI platforms, agents, and the customer experience
sessions.description: As the conversation shifts from what AI can do to how enterprises build with it, the focus turns to intelligent, agent-driven applications. Join Google Cloud leaders to explore how our models and agentic platforms work together to equip organizations with the tools to deliver more proactive, personalized customer experiences and streamline internal processes, driving measurable business impact and stronger outcomes for your customers.

sessions.title: Built-in defense: The next evolution of Security Command Center for AI-era
sessions.description: Security Command Center (SCC) is built into the Google Cloud infrastructure providing native defense for your most critical assets. Join this session to learn how SCC's line-of-sight visibility  protects your environment across cloud and AI workloads. We’ll break down the complete security lifecycle - implementing preventive controls to stop attacks, identifying high-risk vulnerabilities, and detecting active threats using embedded technology. Discover how the new Cloud Assist capability delivers detailed remediation guidance, learn first-hand from a leading customer, and discover how to secure your next era of innovation.

sessions.title: C-suite change agents: How to model the AI-first culture
sessions.description: AI adoption is now a top-down strategic imperative. Join C-suite leaders from pioneering global companies as they reveal the “secret sauce” for enterprisewide agentic adoption. Move beyond the hype to explore how executives model AI behavior to drive cultural change. Discover how leadership-led autonomous agents automate high-level workflows, turning the C-suite into the engine for operational excellence.

sessions.title: Catching the vibe: Build next-gen AI platforms with Firestore
sessions.description: Transform your creative ideas into next generation AI applications with Firestore. We'll explore how platforms like Antigravity and FlutterFlow build rich, collaborative apps using Firestore. You'll learn advanced data modeling, full-text search, and real-time sync strategies from industry leaders. Discover the latest Firestore features that empower you to turn concepts into reality.

sessions.title: Centralize client and server insights for observability at scale
sessions.description: Your application is only as healthy as your users perceive it. Although Google Cloud Observability excels at server-side monitoring, it’s missing insights from the client’s perspective. Join this session to learn how to use Firebase Crashlytics and Google Cloud Observability together to centralize observability. And take a deep dive into how Yahoo is bridging the gap between frontend and backend teams, creating a single, high-fidelity source of truth for global application health.

sessions.title: Chart your path to compliant and resilient AI with Google Workspace
sessions.description: As global data regulations intensify, enterprises need to ensure generative AI adoption strengthens compliance. Discover how Google Workspace is uniquely engineered to meet the world’s most stringent industry standards, including FINRA, FedRAMP High, BSI C5, and HIPAA, as well as business-resilience regulations such as DORA and OSFI. This session will show enterprise leaders a strategic, compliant path to AI. Learn how customers leverage these platforms to unlock secure, compliant agentic AI usage, accelerating innovation with absolute confidence.

sessions.title: Chat with your data using Conversational Analytics in BigQuery
sessions.description: Discuss the development of data agents that enable natural language interaction through BigQuery Conversational Analytics. We will explore strategies for moving beyond basic translation by grounding agent logic in your organization's specific data assets, ensuring generated results align strictly with internal business definitions. The conversation will also cover leveraging BigQuery AI to project future outcomes and interpret unstructured data to transform hidden information into actionable intelligence.

sessions.title: Choice and control: Unified access and routing with Vertex AI
sessions.description: Production AI requires orchestrating diverse models while managing sprawl and cost. Join this session to explore a unified architecture for scaling your AI. We’ll start by diving into Model Garden on Vertex AI to deploy Gemini, Claude, and OSS models. Then, we’ll operationalize them using model routing with API Gateway. And we’ll demonstrate how to create a single endpoint that lets developers explicitly switch between models via configuration, establishing the foundation for future intelligent optimization and cost control.

sessions.title: Choose the right stack for Go agents
sessions.description: Choosing the right abstraction layer for an AI agent is critical. Join this session to code the same agent in Go using three different approaches: from scratch, with Genkit, and with Google’s Agent Development Kit (ADK). We’ll compare code complexity and maintainability to help you understand the trade-offs of each method and decide when to use each one.

sessions.title: Chrome Enterprise Premium Experience
sessions.description: We’ve all heard the story that the browser is the new operating system, right? To drive secure innovation, organizations must move security controls closer to the user without compromising productivity. And the best place to do that is in the browser. Come and participate in our technical workshop, offering a deep dive into Chrome Enterprise Premium, Google’s advanced secure enterprise browsing solution. This session is for security architects and IT administrators – you’ll learn how to leverage Chrome’s cloud-native architecture to enforce robust Zero Trust principles and benefit from advanced data protection. Laptops provided.

sessions.title: Chrome Enterprise Premium Experience
sessions.description: We’ve all heard the story that the browser is the new operating system, right? To drive secure innovation, organizations must move security controls closer to the user without compromising productivity. And the best place to do that is in the browser. Come and participate in our technical workshop, offering a deep dive into Chrome Enterprise Premium, Google’s advanced secure enterprise browsing solution. This session is for security architects and IT administrators – you’ll learn how to leverage Chrome’s cloud-native architecture to enforce robust Zero Trust principles and benefit from advanced data protection. Laptops provided.

sessions.title: Chrome Enterprise Premium Experience
sessions.description: We’ve all heard the story that the browser is the new operating system, right? To drive secure innovation, organizations must move security controls closer to the user without compromising productivity. And the best place to do that is in the browser. Come and participate in our technical workshop, offering a deep dive into Chrome Enterprise Premium, Google’s advanced secure enterprise browsing solution. This session is for security architects and IT administrators – you’ll learn how to leverage Chrome’s cloud-native architecture to enforce robust Zero Trust principles and benefit from advanced data protection. Laptops provided.

sessions.title: CISO Connect Reception
sessions.description:
Sponsored by Accenture & PwC
After a day of impactful sessions, join us on the veranda for a well-earned change of pace. This is your time to unwind with colleagues and our partners from Accenture and PwC in a relaxed outdoor setting. Enjoy refreshments and heavy appetizers as we transition from the day's insights to the next part of your stay in Las Vegas.

sessions.title: CISO Connect: Security in the Next Era
sessions.description:
CISO Connect is an exclusive gathering of your peers for a day of high-level strategy and candid conversation. This isn’t just another track; it’s a deep dive into the initiatives shaping our industry.

Hear directly from Google’s security leadership—including Francis deSouza, Sandra Joyce, Royal Hansen and Heather Adkins —alongside fellow CISOs navigating the same front lines as you.

What we’re tackling:


Intelligence-Led Defense: Gain fresh visibility into the modern threat landscape and learn how to translate front-line intelligence into executive action.
The Evolution of the SOC: Exploring the shift toward "Agentic" security and how autonomous capabilities are redefining incident response and operational scale.
Architecting for the Future: A strategic look at building resilient systems that can withstand the convergence of AI, quantum computing, and a hyper-connected global infrastructure.
Peer Leadership & Resilience: Candid discussions with top CISOs on driving a security culture that enables—rather than hinders—rapid business growth.

sessions.title: CLI Mission Control
sessions.description: Code, command, launch! Use Gemini CLI to complete the launch sequence steps and watch your rocket take off as you compete for a place on the leaderboard.

sessions.title: Cloud Certification Meetup
sessions.description: Ready to advance your career in the cloud? This meetup is for anyone interested in earning a Google Cloud certification or adding to their certification portfolio. Get expert advice from certified professionals, connect with fellow learners, and discover the right certification path for you. Leave with helpful study tips and maybe even a few study partners!

sessions.title: Cloud Composer: The agentic bedrock for enterprise data and MLOps
sessions.description: Cloud Composer is evolving into the autonomous bedrock for Google Cloud’s data orchestration and machine learning operations (MLOps). Join us to explore the Apache Airflow 3 features brought directly to your local IDE. Discover how our new Data Engineering Agent helps developers of all skill levels generate, troubleshoot, and fix complex AI/ML pipelines. And learn how MailChimp uses Cloud Composer to standardize secure pipelines for hundreds of data scientists, and how Shopify scales Cloud Composer to orchestrate petabytes of data for their data mesh.

sessions.title: Cloud migration forum
sessions.description: Migrating from On-Prem to Cloud can be a daunting task. Gain insights from experienced peers that "already migrated" and share stories. Learn best practices of your own migration journey.

sessions.title: Cloud Native SASE with Fortinet and Google Unified Security
sessions.description:
Ensuring your hybrid workforce stays secure shouldn't mean sacrificing performance or visibility. By combining Fortinet FortiSASE with Google Security Operations, your team gains a unified networking and security hub that scales globally.

Rather than juggling disjointed tools, you get low-latency connectivity via Google’s private backbone and a single pane of glass for continuous threat detection. This integration lets you correlate network events with security incidents in real-time, speeding up remediation and protecting your hybrid estate.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Cloud Run 101: How to get started
sessions.description: Getting started with Cloud Run? Join us in this discussion group to learn more and ask the experts your questions.

sessions.title: Cloud Run Developer Meetup
sessions.description: Connect with fellow developers building and running applications in production on Cloud Run. We'll discuss the latest announcements, new features, and best practices for scaling and managing deployments. This is a great opportunity to share your real-world use cases, discuss challenges you’ve faced, and connect with others who rely on Cloud Run.

sessions.title: Cloud security best practices: Keeping cloud data secure
sessions.description: Join this discussion group to expand your knowledge of cloud security best practices and discover how organizations are securing their cloud data.

sessions.title: Cloud Security Podcast Live!
sessions.description: Join us as we welcome the hosts of the Cloud Security Podcast, Timothy Peacock and Anton Chuvakin, along with a special guest for a live episode. We'll look at how practitioners are securing their AI workloads in cloud, and using AI from the cloud to secure their workloads!

sessions.title: Cloud Storage Rapid: Turbocharged object storage for AI and analytics
sessions.description: Traditional object storage is built for scale, not speed. Why not have both? Cloud Storage Rapid is a high-performance tier of object storage built for intensive workloads like data preparation, training, and inference. Used by some of the world’s largest AI and ML customers, Cloud Storage Rapid (including Anywhere Cache and Rapid Bucket) provides terabyte-scale throughput and submillisecond latency while maintaining simplicity, scale, and cost-effectiveness. Join us to dissect real-world architectures where feeding compute clusters directly from Google Cloud Storage maximizes graphics processing unit, tensor processing unit, and data management utilization while reducing overall complexity.

sessions.title: Cloud TPUs and GPUs
sessions.description: Optimize AI training and inference with Google Cloud’s TPUs and GPUs, the purpose-built accelerators behind AI Hypercomputer.

sessions.title: Code-to-Cloud visibility: The new foundation for securing the AI-DLC
sessions.description: Code-to-cloud visibility isn’t a feature; it’s the foundation for secure development in the AI era. As the velocity of engineering teams increases with the AI-native development lifecycle, the disconnect between where risks are introduced (code) and where they manifest (cloud) leads to missed ownership and slow remediation. This session explores how development and AppSec teams can prioritize based on whether a code flaw is actually reachable or exploitable in production. See a live demo of how code-to-cloud context can be embedded directly into the AI-DLC to start secure by default.

sessions.title: Cognizant Neuro AI: Turning Gemini Into Your Enterprise's Unfair Advantage
sessions.description:
Cognizant Neuro AI, powered by Google Gemini Enterprise, is redefining how businesses transform. In this demonstration, we will digitize a business process real time. Cognizant's scalable decision intelligence layer multiplies Gemini's power with cross-cloud execution, governance, and reusable use case design, making Gemini from a tool to a foundational capability driving your enterprise forward..

By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Commercial underwriting made easy with Gemini
sessions.description: Experience a highly optimized commercial underwriting workflow powered by enterprise AI. This solution automates document ingestion, regulatory auditing, and initial risk triage at scale. Integrated Gemini assistants empower underwriters to query historical claims data and extract precise guidelines from complex manuals, accelerating the quote-to-bind process and driving superior risk selection.

sessions.title: Competencies: Turn customer wins into your greatest competitive advantage
sessions.description: Turn your customer wins into your global signal of expertise. In the Google Cloud Partner Network, Competencies are the signal of deep sales and technical expertise. Join us to build your brand across industries, products, and solutions. We’ll share tips for achieving competency thresholds, unpack the metrics that matter, and show how automated tracking aligns you with program progression and Google Cloud Sales.
sessions.room: Partner Summit Lounge Lightning Talk Theater 2

sessions.title: Complex workflows made easy with Gemini Enterprise agents
sessions.description: Step into the future of enterprise productivity with an in depth exploration of how Gemini Enterprise transforms complex industry workflows into simple and easy to manage agents. In this session, we'll show you how to register and use agents built with the modern agent stack – including Agent Development Kit (ADK), Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocols, and the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and more – on Gemini Enterprise. We'll showcase real world demonstrations of these agents working in tandem with new Gemini Enterprise enhancements in assistant and productivity tools. You'll leave with a clear roadmap for using Gemini Enterprise with these tools to enhance workforce efficiency, foster innovation, and redefine the boundaries of organizational collaboration.

sessions.title: Configure Vector Search in AlloyDB
sessions.description: Unlock semantic search with AlloyDB and Vertex AI. AlloyDB is a fully managed, PostgreSQL-compatible database service designed for your most demanding workloads. In this introductory-level workshop, you will implement vector search to find data based on meaning rather than exact keywords—ideal for complex inputs. You’ll learn to configure an AlloyDB database, load data, and generate text embeddings. Finally, you will execute fast similarity searches to identify related content, empowering your applications with AI-driven retrieval capabilities.

sessions.title: Connect ADK agents to any tool with MCP
sessions.description: Equip your ADK agent with powerful external tools. Connect to MCP servers for code, databases, memory, and more - with a few lines of code using MCP toolset, then watch your agent integrate with your systems and take action.

sessions.title: Connect ADK agents to Gemini Enterprise
sessions.description: Build, manage, and govern AI agents across the organization. Use Gemini Enterprise as the front door for AI tools in the workplace, and ADK to empower employees with sophisticated agents tailored to their roles.

sessions.title: Connect agents across your enterprise with Salesforce and Google
sessions.description:
In the agentic era, agents must collaborate across ecosystems to deliver truly unified customer experiences. Join Salesforce and Google to examine how Agentforce 360 and Gemini Enterprise use the Agent2Agent protocol to securely hand off tasks across vendor boundaries. We’ll also demonstrate how to extend agent capabilities using the Model Context Protocol (MCP), connecting your agents to Google’s remote MCP server to access tools and resources for a connected agentic enterprise.

By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: Connect to Remote Agents with ADK and the Agent2Agent (A2A) SDK
sessions.description: Bridge the gap between diverse AI frameworks with the Agent2Agent (A2A) protocol. A2A creates a common language for agents to collaborate across servers. In this advanced workshop, you will deploy an Agent Development Kit (ADK) agent as an A2A Server and define its capabilities using a JSON Agent Card. Then, you will configure a second agent to discover and control the first as a sub-agent. Master the standards for agent discovery, rich data exchange, and seamless interoperability in this hands-on session.

sessions.title: Context engineering for agents
sessions.description:
Context engineering is the iterative process of curating exactly the information an agent needs —- no more, no less -- inside its context window to guide what it does next. A well-engineered context window is often what enables agents to succeed in the wild. In this talk, we’ll cover common techniques and best practices for building effective contexts, and show how MongoDB provides all the components needed to deliver precisely the right information to your agents.







By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Context matters: Sensitive Data Protection and data security
sessions.description: When it comes to protecting data, especially in critical AI workloads, context is key. Understanding context helps you figure out when you’re dealing with sensitive or unwanted data that needs protection. In this session, you’ll learn how Sensitive Data Protection looks beyond simple keyword matches and uses advanced AI and ML, bringing in new context classifications (such as medical and finance) and image object and theme detection (such as person or face, passports, or photo ID cards) to help better identify and classify data.

sessions.title: Control a Vestaboard with Gemini CLI and MCP
sessions.description: Take your prompts beyond the screen. Check out what happens when you connect Gemini CLI with a custom Model Context Protocol server on Google Cloud to control a physical Vestaboard in real time.

sessions.title: Control the swarm: how to simulate your operations by leveraging digital twins
sessions.description: The modern warehouse is no longer a solo act—it’s a chaotic mix of humans, AI agents, and heterogeneous robot fleets from different vendors. The challenge isn't just automation; it's multi-agent orchestration. In this lightning talk, discover how industry leaders leverage Google Cloud to power digital twins that simulate their entire operations. We’ll explore how this agentic architecture processes millions of operations, assigning the right task to the right agent—whether it’s a human picker, a third-party AMR, or a conveyor system—in real-time. Hear about the blueprint for building a digital nervous system that adapts instantly to traffic, demand spikes, and resource availability.

sessions.title: CPU infrastructure for the age of inference: Lessons from industry leaders
sessions.description: General-purpose compute is emerging as the critical engine for the age of inference. Join this session to learn firsthand from industry leaders who have successfully implemented a workload-optimized approach to power their AI stacks. We’ll cover topics ranging from high-efficiency CPU-based inference to the massive data preprocessing required for modern generative workloads. Learn how to build an AI-ready infrastructure that eliminates bottlenecks and minimizes latency across your entire pipeline. We’ll break down the emerging architectural patterns that provide the flexibility to innovate at scale, so your infrastructure can scale seamlessly without being locked into a single path.

sessions.title: Create and refine a deliverable
sessions.description: Create and refine deliverables with unprecedented speed and customization using the latest features in Google Docs and Slides.

sessions.title: Create videos with AI
sessions.description: Sit in the director’s chair and unleash your creativity with Google Vids. Immerse yourself in our mixing studio where you can produce stunning visual scenes with custom soundtracks—starting with just a selfie or group photo. Discover how the tool allows anyone to quickly create engaging videos with AI.

sessions.title: Creative partnership and brand integrity in the age of generative media
sessions.description: In this follow-up session, we’re hosting a discussion to break down what it actually means to incorporate creative models into your media workflows. We’ll discuss how to integrate Gemini, Veo, and Lyria as extensions of your creative team and share strategies to maintain a unified brand identity throughout this process. Bring your challenges regarding creative control and learn more about how to effectively partner with these models.

sessions.title: Cross-cloud infrastructure for the agentic enterprise
sessions.description: To lead in AI, organizations must evolve their infrastructure and applications for the agentic era - where the foundation is adaptive and resilient. Agentic infrastructure requires service consistency at scale, performance, and security, while optimizing for TCO, sovereignty, and multi-cloud needs. That’s the power of Google’s agentic cross-cloud Infrastructure.

sessions.title: Cross-Cloud Network: An intelligent, governed, performant fabric for global AI
sessions.description: As AI evolves from stand-alone models to autonomous agents, the network becomes the critical integration layer. This session will introduce new capabilities, delivering centralized governance and observability to securely connect agents, models, and tools everywhere – all underpinned by Google’s planet-scale Cross-Cloud Network. Discover expansions to Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) Inference Gateway and eliminate compute silos by intelligently pooling traffic to accelerator capacity, anywhere. We’ll explore the high-performance foundation that makes it all possible: AI-optimized Virtual Private Cloud and GKE networking, engineered to eliminate bottlenecks in massive model training and inference.

sessions.title: Cryptographic proof: Ensuring confidentiality, sovereignty, and control
sessions.description: In the era of AI, security must move beyond simple policy to verifiable cryptographic proof. Join us to explore the next generation of trusted infrastructure designed to protect your most sensitive assets without inhibiting innovation. We will unveil Confidential External Key Manager, enabling you to maintain possession and control of your keys in a highly performant, verifiable, confidential environment. We’ll also demonstrate single-tenant Cloud HSM, a new standard for cryptographic isolation that grants you absolute control over dedicated HSM clusters without operational toil. Finally, you’ll discover how we’re simplifying compliance for regulated enterprises with Cloud HSM for Google Workspace and delivering new resiliency capabilities for Secret Manager.

sessions.title: Customize Antigravity for your organization
sessions.description: Ship features to an enterprise app with zero coding. Learn how to set the rules so Antigravity can handle the execution, ensuring every feature is compliant and production-ready from day one.

sessions.title: Customize Gemini CLI with extensions and MCP servers
sessions.description: Go beyond built-in tools by customizing Gemini CLI with extensions and MCP servers. Get hands-on and connect Gemini CLI to external tools to bridge the gap between the model and your unique needs.

sessions.title: Cybercrime trends: Lessons from the front lines
sessions.description: Mandiant is a leader in cybersecurity consulting and threat intelligence. In this session, we’ll share critical lessons learned from Mandiant’s work on the front lines of incident response. We’ll identify evolving cybercrime trends and get insights from the latest M-Trends report. Join us to uncover how threat actors have been leveraging AI, and how organizations are protecting themselves.

sessions.title: Dashboard agents: Natural language self-service built into Looker
sessions.description: Experience the next evolution in self-service analytics. This session dives into the native Looker capabilities engineered to democratize data for everyone. We’ll showcase dashboard agents, intelligent assistants that enable you to create and interact with dashboards using natural language. Explore new features like the ability to upload Excel directly for ad hoc analysis and a brand-new modeling GUI. Join us to learn how Looker simplifies the journey from raw data to actionable insights in the agentic era.

sessions.title: Data agents for the enterprise: From intelligence to action
sessions.description: Companies store vast amounts of operational data, yet getting answers often requires manual reporting and writing custom code. Our customer has transformed enterprise support operations by building an agentic layer using Data Agents on Google Cloud. We'll demontrate how to build agents with the accuracy required to take action and drive business outcomes. We'll provide real-time dashboards with insights beneficial to the human interests. You'll learn how to build a unified Model Context Protocol (MCP) control plane with secure, standardized agent access to enterprise data, and observability for every interaction.

sessions.title: Data agents: A growth engine for Google Cloud Partners
sessions.description: A paradigm shift is underway: ISVs are no longer merely integrating with the Data Cloud —they're building sophisticated Data Agents directly on our platform. In this session, we explore how this emerging "Ecosystem of Data Agents" serves as a powerful catalyst for partner success. Learn firsthand how ISVs are leveraging Google’s unified stack to power agents that live within their own platforms but reason across the customer’s entire data estate. This evolution transforms the service model, shifting the focus from implementing static software to orchestrating high-value, autonomous data agents.
sessions.room: Partner Summit Lounge Lightning Talk Theater 2

sessions.title: Data at the scale of play: Qiddiya's AI revolution
sessions.description: Qiddiya is redefining urban planning in Saudi Arabia by integrating data from many districts and assets on Google Data Cloud. Central to this vision is "Q-Brain," an advanced system where BigQuery serves as the core engine and Vertex AI with Gemini models powers the intelligence. This session explores how Qiddiya reduced decision-making cycles from months to hours, laying a scalable digital foundation for millions of visitors by 2030.

sessions.title: Data Boundary in action: Production-ready sovereignty and compliance
sessions.description: Google Cloud Data Boundary enables sovereign and compliance-focused organizations in highly regulated sectors via software-driven controls like data residency and Access Transparency. We’ll introduce upcoming product enhancements for end-to-end compliance (including auditing and FedRAMP 20x) and preview a flexible, composable architecture. Plus, industry experts in a customer panel will share real-world implementation stories across the public sector and enterprise segments.

sessions.title: Data economy: Turn your data from a cost center into a revenue engine
sessions.description: Artificial general intelligence (AGI) has leapt from the realm of science fiction into the boardroom, becoming a strategic imperative on every agenda. No longer should anyone question if AGI will arrive, but rather when, and more importantly, if they’re ready for it. Join a C-suite briefing with senior leaders from Accenture and industry pioneers as they share their playbook for the AGI era. Moving from theory to tangible value, you’ll explore the real-world strategies and foundational steps today’s leaders are taking to prepare – and how they’re assessing the opportunities, mitigating the risks, and building the capabilities required to thrive. By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: Data Engineering Agent: Your partner for BigQuery and the open lakehouse
sessions.description: Move beyond simple code generation with the Data Engineering Agent – your persistent, intelligent partner. It automates data ingestion, wrangling, transformations and delivers autonomous troubleshooting for data and orchestration pipelines for BigQuery and the Open Lakehouse. Join us to learn how Vodafone significantly reduced their data pipeline modernization and project development time using the Data Engineering Agent.

sessions.title: Data governance on autopilot: Secure and track your data for AI
sessions.description: You can’t build trusted AI on untrusted data. But for lean teams, manual governance and lineage tracking are impossible. This session will show you how to implement enterprise-grade visibility that runs on autopilot. We’ll demonstrate how Dataplex Universal Catalog can act as your intelligent “brain,” automatically discovering sensitive data, tracing lineage from source to dashboard, and enforcing quality rules across your data cloud. Learn how to secure your data and prove compliance for the AI era without hiring a team of experts.

sessions.title: Data Professionals Meetup
sessions.description: Join other data professionals for an open discussion on automating analytics with AI. Traditional BI is changing fast, and the practical realities of adopting the latest data tech are hard to navigate alone. This meetup focuses on peer-to-peer sharing in small groups. Exchange real-world strategies for improving data quality, optimizing operations, and integrating agents. Share how you use AI and expand your community with peers who are solving the same complex data challenges you are.

sessions.title: Data roles for the genAI era
sessions.description: GenAI is rapidly shifting data roles. In this roundatable, attendees will tackle the specific problem of skill-set drift and collaboratively draft a "2027 Data Engineer/Analyst" profile. We will identify which core tasks are being automated and which high-value skills are important for career growth and leave with a better idea of how to write and hire for the genAI age of data.

sessions.title: Data Validation at Scale: Architecting an AI-Native Validation Engine
sessions.description: When dealing with billions of data points across thousands of tables, manual checks and rule libraries can often be challenging to maintain and scale. This session introduces an AI‑native data validation framework to generate context-aware data validation checks and orchestrate them across your data platform. Learn how AI agents streamline schema discovery, profile data, and orchestrate validation workflows—helping teams transition from reactive debugging to proactive quality control.

sessions.title: Data-grounded support: Build AI augmented agents with CX Agent Studio
sessions.description: Stop building from scratch and start augmenting. This session explores how to use your existing customer data to ground support agents for instant, enterprise-grade accuracy. Join SMEs to discuss a build with AI approach and explore how to leverage your data and native connectors to link CX Agent Studio directly to your CRM and knowledge bases. We’ll dive into strategies for grounding agents in real-time customer history and technical best practices for using tool-calling to safely orchestrate actions across your existing enterprise APIs.

sessions.title: Database Migration Service: AI-powered database migration and modernization
sessions.description: AI is transforming database migrations. Google Cloud’s Database Migration Service helps move workloads to the cloud faster. In this session, discover how Database Migration Service uses Gemini for complex schema and code conversions in heterogeneous migrations, significantly reducing manual effort. And find out how our new homogeneous migration experience for Cloud SQL and AlloyDB offers better automation, connectivity, and flexibility with minimal downtime for same-engine moves. Join us to learn how AI de-risks and accelerates your journey to a modern, cloud-first architecture as you move to the database engine of your choice.

sessions.title: Database Professionals Meetup
sessions.description: A meetup for data engineers, database architects, and DBAs to share insights, discuss emerging trends, and exchange proven strategies for cloud database management. Discuss topics like 1) How to choose a database to store vector data 2) Future of database management using AI agents 3) How to protect from failure and how HA is different from DR. Learn from real-world experiences and expand your professional network!

sessions.title: Deep dive discussion: Moving AI agents to production
sessions.description: Moving agents from prototype to production requires new infrastructure for non-deterministic workloads. This interactive discussion will explore the architecture for operationalizing autonomous fleets. We'll debate the best patterns for implementing cryptographic identities, deploying gateways for governance, and establishing observability for multi-agent traces. Bring your toughest architectural challenges for a candid dialogue on how to enforce "least privilege" and scale your AI workforce securely.

sessions.title: Deep dive into AI agents on Cloud Run
sessions.description: Join us to dive deeper into how you can build AI agents on Cloud Run. We'll discuss how you can move beyond the prototype and scale your AI agents into production with a robust serverless infrastructure.

sessions.title: Deep dive into building apps to cloud directly from your IDE
sessions.description: Vibe coding provides velocity, but operationalizing intent-driven applications with enterprise-grade governance remains a significant architectural challenge. This discussion group will dive deep into the technical mechanics of using Gemini Cloud Assist agents to bridge the gap between source code and compliant infrastructure. We'll analyze the workflow of publishing approved module catalogs and how agentic logic automates identity and access management policies and CI/CD pipelines.

sessions.title: Deep dive into custom models on serverless GPUs
sessions.description: Join this discussion group to learn more about custom models on serverless GPUs.

sessions.title: Deep dive into spec-driven development
sessions.description: AI coding agents are only as good as the context you provide. Join us to learn how to optimize results by formalizing your specs using the Gemini CLI Conductor extension for spec-driven development. This session demonstrates how spec-based context improves performance and accelerates the idea-to-production cycle better than prompting alone.

sessions.title: Deep dive into the evolution of hybrid inference
sessions.description: Let’s discuss the evolution of hybrid inference with Gemini and Firebase. We’ll cover everything from the simplicity of Firebase AI Logic to the nuances of choosing between on-device and cloud-based approaches for a more stable, cost-optimized developer workflow.

sessions.title: DeepMind startup workshop: A guide to new frontier models & tools
sessions.description: Google DeepMind has been dropping new generations of models and tools, but where do you start? In this interactive session, we learn about the latest tools in the landscape, from the latest Gemini reasoning models to media generation models, learn which tools are the right ones for your specific use cases. Join the Google DeepMind team with an overview of the AI stack and a strategy to leverage the latest tech available.

sessions.title: DeepMind startup workshop: Building agents with Gemini
sessions.description: Join the Google DeepMind team to learn how to build intelligent agents using Gemini’s purpose-built APIs. The Interactions API supports turn-based workflows such as CLI tools, background research, and multi-step automation, while the Live API enables real-time streaming for voice and vision agents. You’ll leave with working code and a clear understanding of which API best fits your project—whether you’re building a code assistant or a real-time voice agent.

sessions.title: DeepMind startup workshop: Vibe coding from prompt to production
sessions.description: We are entering the era of vibe coding, where the distance between an idea and a shipped product is collapsing. In this live workshop, the Google DeepMind team will demonstrate a "speed-run" of the modern founder's workflow. Using Google AI Studio and Gemini, they will build a functional application, deploy it to the cloud, and generate a go-to-market strategy—all in the span of a single presentation. Come see how long-context and multimodality allow a team of one to out-build an entire startup org.

sessions.title: Defend Faster: Applied Threat Intel in Google SecOps
sessions.description: Explore the essentials of Threat Intelligence in Google SecOps. In this hands-on workshop, we blend Google Threat Intelligence (GTI) and Mandiant Fusion with third-party STIX feeds to drive proactive defense. Learn how to identify prioritized IOCs, pivot through Emerging Threats, and investigate using the Entity Graph. Whether using native insights or disparate sources, you will gain practical skills to transform intelligence into action.

sessions.title: Defend web, API, and AI services from internet-based attacks
sessions.description: Internet-facing services are prime targets. They encounter a steady barrage of bot, distributed denial-of-service, and now LLM-specific attacks, while infrastructure vulnerabilities make them increasingly susceptible to exploitation. A breach ruins trust. Find out how to strengthen your outer defenses with the latest from Google Cloud Armor, reCAPTCHA Enterprise, and Model Armor. You’ll learn about the latest innovations to help defend your internet-facing services against sophisticated web and AI attacks, ensuring your public-facing services remain available and secure.

sessions.title: Defending against OWASP top 10 for agentic apps
sessions.description: Learn how to use new agentic capabilities together with Google Cloud security tools and Apigee to protect agents and tools from top OWASP agentic risks.

sessions.title: Defending AI Workloads: Capture The Flag with Google AI security solutions
sessions.description: AI models and datasets represent a massive new attack surface—and a new prize for adversaries. How do you protect your most valuable intellectual property in the cloud? Dive deep into the defenses of Security Command Center in this immersive lab session. We will move beyond standard cloud security and tackle the specific challenges of securing AI: Identifying Shadow AI, locking down Vertex AI permissions, and detecting suspicious activity within your data pipelines. You’ll leave this session with practical, hands-on experience to automatically detect and respond to risks, ensuring your AI estate remains resilient against modern threats.

sessions.title: Defending AI Workloads: Capture The Flag with Google AI Security Solutions
sessions.description: AI models and datasets represent a massive new attack surface—and a new prize for adversaries. How do you protect your most valuable intellectual property in the cloud? Dive deep into the defenses of Security Command Center in this immersive lab session. We will move beyond standard cloud security and tackle the specific challenges of securing AI: Identifying Shadow AI, locking down Vertex AI permissions, and detecting suspicious activity within your data pipelines. You’ll leave this session with practical, hands-on experience to automatically detect and respond to risks, ensuring your AI estate remains resilient against modern threats.

sessions.title: Defending the frontier: Protecting AI with Google Cloud
sessions.description: As AI adoption grows, so do the threats. In this session, learn how ISV solutions built on Google Cloud are safeguarding the next generation of AI developments. We will also examine how AI-powered attacks are shifting the security paradigm and how Google is collaborating with partners to prepare for this new wave. Walk away with the insights needed to secure your customers' innovation.
sessions.room: Partner Summit Lounge Lightning Talk Theater 1

sessions.title: Defense-in-depth: Access controls for workloads and agents
sessions.description: In a world where identity is the new perimeter, relying on firewalls is not enough. Join us to examine the implementation of a rigorous zero-trust architecture using the power of VPC Service Controls and Context-Aware Access. We’ll demonstrate how to create secure and granular data perimeters that prevent exfiltration, ensuring that data can only be accessed by the right identity, from the right device, and within the correct network context. Learn the defense-in-depth approach that allow you to lock down your most sensitive data and resources while maintaining seamless access for legitimate users and trusted agents.

sessions.title: Define once, trust everywhere: The semantic layer for governed AI
sessions.description: Stop letting inconsistent data block your growth. Discover how Looker’s semantic layer provides the essential foundation for trustworthy AI for businesses with lean IT teams. We’ll show you how to define all your business logic once, with familiar terms to eliminate inconsistent metrics and ensure governed, consistent insights. Learn how this layer grounds Gemini for Looker, powering safe, self-service conversational analytics that drastically reduce data errors. You’ll leave knowing how to scale your impact without scaling your head count.

sessions.title: Delegate tasks to subagents in Gemini CLI
sessions.description: Assign the right agent to the task with specialized subagents in Gemini CLI. Learn how these agents save tokens and get the job done faster and more efficiently.

sessions.title: Deliver intelligent digital experiences at AI speed with Fullstory
sessions.description:
Apps are becoming adaptive systems that respond in real time. But AI cannot adapt to what it cannot see. While logs track events, they miss the human struggle on the screen. Fullstory provides the digital sight that reveals true user intent. Learn how to turn behavioral data into a proactive AI input, moving from analyzing yesterday’s friction to orchestrating intelligent digital experiences. Grounding AI in human context allows you to close the loop for a self-improving journey at AI speed.





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Deliver price-performance with workload-optimized VMs
sessions.description: Build, deploy, and scale applications on leading performance and price-performance compute designed for speed, scale, and TCO.

sessions.title: Delivering agentic commerce in your pocket
sessions.description: In a competitive, deal-driven industry, personalization and innovation are the ingredients that drive long-term loyalty. Join Papa Johns and Google Cloud to learn how Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience is ushering in a new era of digital service. We'll explore the strategy behind a unified AI engine that seamlessly integrates across mobile apps, web, and drive-thrus. Discover how Papa Johns moves beyond basic automation to proactively ensure every customer gets the best value, delivering a fluid, smarter ordering experience.

sessions.title: Delivery readiness platform: Driving excellence and building a winning team
sessions.description: How do you guarantee project success? By showing up prepared. This session dives deep into the Team Readiness feature in Delivery Readiness Platform (DRP). Learn how to maximize the platform to assemble stronger teams, analyze readiness scores, and leverage the latest agentic capabilities. You will leave with targeted training recommendations to identify and close skill gaps in your organization.
sessions.room: Partner Summit Lounge Lightning Talk Theater 2

sessions.title: Delve into large-scale training with Vertex AI training clusters
sessions.description: Training state-of-the-art models requires a perfectly orchestrated environment, not just raw compute power. Join us to learn how our top customers use Vertex AI training clusters to automate the development of models. We’ll dive deep into how they automate the entire cluster life cycle and use the resiliency features of Vertex AI training cluster to mitigate firmware errors, stabilizing training jobs across clusters.

sessions.title: Demystifying evals at the frontier of agentic development
sessions.description:
Teams without evals get stuck in reactive loops—catching issues in production, unable to distinguish regressions from noise. Teams that invest early find development accelerates as failures become test cases and metrics replace guesswork. This talk shares what Anthropic has learned building evals for Claude Code and deploying them with customers across coding, conversational, and research agents. You'll leave with a roadmap: structuring agent evals, choosing the right graders, balancing capability vs. regression testing, and building a suite you trust.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Deploy agentic workflows using open models on Google Cloud Vertex AI
sessions.description: This workshop introduces a multi-agent approach to solving complex, visual-heavy enterprise tasks. You will learn to use Google Gemma 3 as an agentic orchestrator to plan tasks, call tools, and leverage Nemotron for high-fidelity visual reasoning.

sessions.title: Deploy and govern Gemini Enterprise for your organization
sessions.description: For IT leaders and practitioners who are planning to, or in the process, of deploying workplace AI tools like Gemini Enterprise in their organizations. Participants gain insights into a step-by-step guide to configuring Gemini Enterprise within your organization. Best practices for governance to ensure robust security, privacy, and compliance. Expert answers to any questions that arise during your implementation journey.

sessions.title: Deploy and manage your autonomous SaaS agents at Google scale
sessions.description: AI is transforming SaaS from static code to agentic workflows. Join us to learn how you can use SaaS Runtime, the opinionated platform for building scalable AI-powered SaaS. We’ll demonstrate how to provision your new AI-powered SaaS product to Google Cloud with SaaS Runtime using Application Design Center, an opinionated design assistant with Gemini. Learn how customers are using this AI-ready foundation to deploy agentic applications with built-in scalability and governance.

sessions.title: Deploy and scale agents on Agent Engine
sessions.description: Deploy your ADK agent to production in minutes. Launch on Vertex AI Agent Engine with managed hosting, wire up persistent memory via Memory Bank, run code securely, and trace every agent decision with built-in observability.

sessions.title: Deploying a Multi-Cluster Gateway Across GKE Clusters
sessions.description: Scale application networking with multi-cluster Gateways (MCG). In this advanced workshop, you will enable GKE Enterprise and register clusters to a fleet. You will configure multi-cluster Services (MCS) to provision load balancers for HTTP routing, traffic splitting, and failover. Learn to deploy distributed applications and balance traffic seamlessly across multiple GKE clusters and regions.

sessions.title: Deploying Applications with GKE Autopilot
sessions.description: Simplify operations with Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) Autopilot, a managed mode where Google creates, sizes, and scales your infrastructure automatically. In this introductory-level workshop, you will containerize an application and deploy it to an Autopilot cluster using standard Kubernetes commands. Learn to offload maintenance tasks like monitoring and capacity recalculation. Focus on building mission-critical apps while Google optimizes your cluster’s performance, security, and availability.

sessions.title: Develop a plan or strategy
sessions.description: Define goals, outline steps, and anticipate challenges when direction isn’t yet clear - turning uncertainty into a shared plan of action with Gemini Enterprise.

sessions.title: Develop and integrate AI agents with Google Workspace
sessions.description: The next generation of enterprise solutions is here, powered by agentic AI. Join us to learn how to build, deploy, orchestrate, and share agents tightly integrated with Google Workspace. We’ll demonstrate essential architectural patterns to empower agents with business data and actions – and how to make agents accessible in the specific context and capacity of Google Workspace applications. You’ll leave knowing how to reach new levels of productivity by automating and augmenting collaboration tools for yourself, teams, and organizations.

sessions.title: Developer AI: Tools, tactics, and team adoption
sessions.description: While deploying AI developer tools is easy, getting organizations to use them effectively is the real challenge. Join this session to explore the intersection of modern developer tooling and operational strategy.

sessions.title: Diagnose and optimize: A guide to ML workload observability on TPUs
sessions.description: Diagnosing and optimizing ML workloads on TPUs is complicated and requires visibility from your ML workload all the way to the TPUs. In this discussion group, we'll introduce new capabilities to diagnose workloads on TPUs, including ML Diagnostics platform, Managed Xprof profiling, and Workload Monitoring. These capabilities from internal Google platforms such as Gemini, Search, and Youtube are useful for their workload diagnosis on TPUs. Join this deep dive to learn how these tools can make your workloads run best on TPUs.

sessions.title: Director's Cut: How Google GenAI is Scripting the Future of Film
sessions.description:
This session explores the rise of GenMedia as a core pillar of modern film/movie/media production, offering a deep dive into how Google’s Generative AI models are being deployed at scale to help creators realize previously impossible cinematic visions.

Our analysis focuses on the engineering of the frame, specifically detailing the specialized generative super-resolution and outpainting techniques used to intelligently widen aspect ratios and upscale source material. By synthesizing contextually accurate visual data, these tools allow filmmakers to expand their original narrative canvas into larger and wider canvases without compromising the original cinematography or narrative integrity. Attendees will gain insight into how Google’s unique AI infrastructure enables a truly next-level viewing experience, scaling pixels and perspectives to meet the rigorous demands of the world's most advanced digital theaters and premium large-format screens.

sessions.title: Displace & win: The agentic workplace transformation Playbook
sessions.description: Ready to capture the next wave of growth customers? The "Agentic Era" is your biggest opportunity to unlock untapped markets. Join us for a high-velocity talk breaking down the Agentic Workplace Transformation (AWT) narrative. We will show you exactly how to position Gemini Enterprise and Google Workspace to displace incumbents and land new business. Learn the high-impact sales plays that turn new logos into long-term customers by leading with agentic adoption.
sessions.room: Partner Summit Lounge Lightning Talk Theater 1

sessions.title: DisruptHER happy hour
sessions.description: Celebrate connection and community at our DisruptHER happy hour. Open to all, this gathering is an opportunity to meet inspiring women in startup tech, exchange ideas, and support one another through meaningful conversation and shared experiences.

sessions.title: Ditch VDI bloat while securing apps and cutting costs
sessions.description:
Supporting legacy apps with virtual desktop infrastructure has weighed us all down long enough. But now, with Cameyo, you can replace expensive VDI with lightweight, Virtual App Delivery (VAD).

Join us to learn how Cameyo can be deployed in a couple of hours (not weeks!) to slash your infrastructure costs by 54%, reduce your attack surface, and enforce Context-Aware Access on the apps you rely on.
