The Titanium Intelligence Enclave delivers hardware-attested, "sealed vault" security, ensuring proprietary AI model weights remain cryptographically invisible to cloud providers and platform admins. You'll learn how to secure and train the world's most demanding AI models at scale.

sessions.title: Global Developer Meetup
sessions.description: Wrap up the day with the global developer community! Join peers from around the world to unwind, swap stories about the latest announcements, and make cross-border connections. Whether you’re visiting from Asia, Europe, Latin America, or beyond, this is your space to mingle. Grab a refreshment, find a group speaking your language, and meet a new friend in a fun, casual setting on the expo floor.

sessions.title: Global scale, AI, and new integrations for Oracle databases on Google Cloud
sessions.description: Join this session to learn from leading companies like Macy's, McKesson, and Telus how to bring your mission critical Oracle workloads to Google Cloud. We’ll provide an overview of deployment options including Oracle Database on Google Compute Engine and Oracle AI Database@Google Cloud. You'll discover the latest product launches designed to help you modernize your applications and innovate in the cloud, leveraging deep integrations with Google's AI services for a strong return on your investment.

sessions.title: Go agentic: Build & scale autonomous workflows for startups
sessions.description: Ready to go agentic? In this hands-on workshop, build your own multi-agent system step-by-step—launching individual agents, orchestrating workflows, using MCP for tool abstraction, and scaling with A2A. Learn exactly how startups evolve from simple prompts to production-ready autonomous systems.

sessions.title: Go Developer Meetup
sessions.description: Join fellow developers for a discussion on the latest release of Go and beyond. We'll explore emerging trends, Go's role in the evolving tech landscape, and the challenges and opportunities facing the Go community. Come prepared to share your insights and experiences. We’ll break into small groups to swap stories and share what we're excited about. Bring your insights, your puzzles, and your vision. Come help us define the next era of Go development together.

sessions.title: Go from zero to revenue on Google Cloud Marketplace
sessions.description: New to selling on Google Cloud Marketplace? This lightning talk empowers you to unlock our partnership's full potential. Learn the value of our co-sell programs and discover best practices for working effectively with Partner Advisors. We will provide a clear overview of the journey—from onboarding and consumption tracking, to our "10-step guide" for co-sell readiness. Get actionable insights to accelerate your growth from zero to revenue.
sessions.room: Partner Summit Lounge Lightning Talk Theater 2

sessions.title: Google AI and security: Wherever the mission takes you
sessions.description: For organizations operating across complex scenarios, the mandate is clear: Secure highly dynamic environments, systems, and operations – wherever the mission takes you – without compromise. This session will feature leaders who are architecting a new era of security, resilience, and continuity by leveraging Google AI and security solutions. Join us to learn how leaders are applying technology to gain actionable insights, guarantee service continuity, protect their communities, and advance their missions.

sessions.title: Google AI at Google
sessions.description: Before our AI tools reach our customers, we pilot and refine them across every workflow inside Google. Get an inside look at how we are operationalizing AI to run our global businesses – optimizing everything from our massive Supply Chain to Customer Service, Finance, and Marketing. This panel will highlight the internal strategies driving adoption at Google’s scale, offering a “Google on Google” framework for driving efficiency and innovation within your own organization.

sessions.title: Google AI at Google: Using Gemini for Customer Care troubleshooting
sessions.description: Learn how we transformed the operations of Google Cloud Customer Care using Gemini Cloud Assist. This session covers the benefits of adopting Gemini Cloud Assist in our workflows, showing measurable operational improvements and high-quality results in troubleshooting medium-complexity issues. We’ll share concrete examples of this transformation and discuss future directions for our self-service support capabilities.

sessions.title: Google Cloud developer workflow
sessions.description: The aim is for participants to create a unified "idea-to-runtime" workflow blueprint. This blueprint will utilize Gemini models and agent-based platforms to automate coding, UI asset creation, and browser-based verification.

sessions.title: Google Cloud Labs: Build an AI Agent with Major League Baseball (MLB)
sessions.description: Join this hands-on lab to create an agent that analyzes MLB matchups using the Google Agent Development Kit (ADK). By the end of the session, you’ll build and deploy an intelligent agent on Cloud Run, capable of providing detailed pitcher-batter matchup analysis between two MLB teams. This hands-on lab is ideal for developers and practitioners interested in programmatic AI agent creation and curious about turning data into intelligent, automated decisions. Prerequisites: Participants should be comfortable with exploring Python code, Web APIs, running scripts and commands at the command-line/terminal, and exploring SQL queries.

sessions.title: Google Cloud Labs: Build an AI Agent with MLB
sessions.description: Join this hands-on lab to create an agent that analyzes MLB matchups using the Google Agent Development Kit (ADK). By the end of the session, you’ll build and deploy an intelligent agent on Cloud Run, capable of providing detailed pitcher-batter matchup analysis between two MLB teams. This hands-on lab is ideal for developers and practitioners interested in programmatic AI agent creation and curious about turning data into intelligent, automated decisions.

sessions.title: Google Cloud Labs: Build an AI Sports Analytics Agent with Team USA
sessions.description: Off the heels of the Olympic and Paralympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026, it’s your turn to take gold! Join our hands-on workshop to build an analytics agent that analyzes sports data. You’ll engage with Google Cloud technology and learn from experts who will guide you through exercises and real-world implementations. Prerequisites: Participants should be comfortable with exploring Python code, Web APIs, running scripts and commands at the command-line/terminal, and exploring SQL queries.

sessions.title: Google Cloud Labs: Build an AI Sports Analytics Agent with Team USA
sessions.description: In the spirit of Team USA's success at the Olympic and Paralympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026, it’s your turn to take gold! Join our hands-on workshop to build an analytics agent to analyze sports data. You’ll engage with Google Cloud technology and learn from experts who will guide you through exercises and real-world implementations.

sessions.title: Google Cloud Marketplace: Accelerating the AI agent economy
sessions.description: Unlock the trillion-dollar AI agent economy with Google Cloud Marketplace. This session dives into the latest platform and go-to-market (GTM) initiatives to help you drive sales of your offerings on Cloud Marketplace. Discover how to reach more Gemini Enterprise customers, extend your professional services and service-as-software offerings, and master scaling through the channel. You will also learn go-to-market strategies from a panel of your peers across different stages of their partnership journeys. Walk away with tools to accelerate your growth in the agentic era.

sessions.title: Google Cloud Partner Network — From framework to growth
sessions.description: The new program has launched - is your business ready to capitalize on it? This session moves beyond the framework to provide the strategic blueprint you need to stand out and win with Google Cloud. We will explore the practical mechanics of the new value-based tiers and competencies. You’ll learn best practices for using these tools to signal your expertise and build a deeper brand. Walk away with a tactical 2026 roadmap and the keys to leveraging the new AI-powered automation that reduces overhead and accelerates your speed to market. Don’t just adapt to the new era; lead it by showcasing your deep capabilities.

sessions.title: Google Cloud storage products: The AI-ready foundation for your data
sessions.description: AI transforms innovation. Join Google Cloud executives to explore our storage portfolio’s future, designed to power the full AI life cycle – from model building to inference. Discover how we’re embedding intelligence to build capable agents at exabyte scale, all on a unified platform that simplifies management, governance, and security.

sessions.title: Google Cloud x FairPrice Group
sessions.description: Discover the Store of Tomorrow, a new retail ecosystem where personalized shopping meets intelligent operations. Experience the AI-powered Smart Cart in action and discover how FairPrice Group uses real-time insights from Google Cloud to automate complex store management behind the shelves.

sessions.title: Google Cloud x Mars
sessions.description: Experience the future of candy creation at the Mars AI Snack Factory. Dream up your own confection recipe using Gemini Enterprise and see how Mars uses Google Cloud to improve its product workflows from concept to shelf.

sessions.title: Google custom silicon
sessions.description: Discover how Google’s custom-designed chips – including TPUs, Arm-based CPUs, and quantum processors – deliver cutting-edge performance and efficiency for AI workloads.

sessions.title: Google MCP Services: Connect AI agents to cloud infrastructure in minutes
sessions.description: Stop writing brittle API wrappers. Discover Google’s rapidly expanding Managed Remote MCP Services, which now expose a wide breadth of the Google Cloud ecosystem—spanning Data, Compute, and Geo—as standardized tools for your AI agents. In this session, we will bypass the "glue code" entirely. You will learn to enable MCP endpoints for services like BigQuery, GKE, and beyond, secure them with Cloud IAM, and use Streamable HTTP to connect a local agent. Watch as we turn natural language into secure infrastructure actions (zero client code required).

sessions.title: Google MCP Services: Connect AI agents to cloud infrastructure in minutes
sessions.description: Stop fighting brittle “glue code” and complex software development kits. In the agentic era, AI should work seamlessly with infrastructure. This session will introduce Google MCP Services, which connects to BigQuery, Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE), and Maps using the Model Context Protocol (MCP). We’ll cover how Cloud Identity and Access Management can replace risky API keys, and how to use the Gemini command line interface to switch from checking GKE cluster health to querying BigQuery logs – no integration code is needed. Learn the universal pattern for building secure, cloud-native agents that focus on reasoning. Build faster, stay secure, and let agents handle the Google Cloud ecosystem.

sessions.title: Google Skills for Orgs: The Fast Track to an AI-Ready Workforce
sessions.description:
How do you transition your workforce from AI-curious to AI-ready without the overhead of complex procurement? Join Google’s Senior Product Lead, Jacqui Snell, for a lightning talk session on Google Skills for Orgs.

We’ll dive into how organizations are leveraging no-cost access to world-class training to build internal expertise at scale.

This session explores how companies utilize Google Skills for Organizations at no cost, discover premium learning services, and leverage data-driven insights to accelerate their AI transformation.

We will have time for your questions and feedback at the end of the session, so bring your ideas!

sessions.title: Govern your agents: Architecting a secure agentic ecosystem with Vertex AI
sessions.description: As AI agents gain more autonomy, the stakes for security and compliance are higher than ever. This session is essential for business leaders or IT decision-makers who need to balance rapid innovation with uncompromising security. Explore how to apply core principles of identity, authentication, and authorization to the new world of agents and tools, and how to adopt more advanced agent management capabilities as you scale. Learn how to use centralized control planes, granular access control lists (ACLs), and observability dashboards to maintain a ubiquitous view of your AI ecosystem. And discover how Vertex AI and Google Cloud’s integrated security tools allow you to stay in control and confident, proving that robust governance isn’t a bottleneck – it’s the engine that allows your organization to move faster safely.

sessions.title: Governing agentic state: Architect auditable loans with HITL on Vertex AI
sessions.description: High-stakes financial workflows (e.g., loan underwriting) require a robust Pause/Resume Pattern for Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) to support Human-In-The-Loop (HITL) intervention. This session details an architecture using Vertex AI Agent Engine as the orchestrator and Cloud Run for execution. We cover how to manage state with Cloud Firestore, decouple governance via Eventarc to prevent timeouts, and use OpenTelemetry Semantic Conventions for auditing agent rationale and human decisions for Responsible AI compliance.

sessions.title: GPU virtualization and orchestration for heterogeneous LLM workloads in Kubernetes
sessions.description: Modern LLM pipelines often suffer from GPU waste or contention in Kubernetes. This session explores advanced virtualization to unlock GPU potential. We cover NVIDIA Multi-Instance GPU (MIG), software sharing, and strategies using GPU Operator and custom schedulers. We demonstrate dynamic MIG provisioning, pod optimization, and QoS enforcement. Learn to design scalable, multi-tenant clusters that maximize throughput and cut costs for diverse LLM workloads in production.

sessions.title: Ground agents with Google Maps Platform
sessions.description: Use Google Maps Platform and Vertex AI to transform conflicting schedules into validated, real-world itineraries. The Maps Planner Agent proves AI can go beyond text to reason, verify, and execute in physical space.

sessions.title: Health Data & LLMs - An LLM Playground for Health Customers
sessions.description: Join us for an interactive architectural design session! We'll tackle a common pharma challenge: How can you rapidly and securely deploy a custom GenAI application with access to your proprietary data? Instead of just showing you, we'll build the solution architecture together, live. We'll use a production-ready, Terraform-based codebase for Google Cloud as our foundation. Through guided whiteboarding, we'll map out the infrastructure, data pipelines, security controls (IAM, Networking), and model integration points (Vertex AI, Cloud Run, Firestore) This session is for developers and architects looking to understand the practicalities of building and deploying secure, enterprise-grade GenAI solutions.

sessions.title: High complexity, low time: Lessons from data-heavy GCP migration
sessions.description:
This session presents a real-world migration of a data- and analytics-heavy application portfolio from another cloud to GCP, executed under tight timelines and strict downtime constraints. As a delivery partner, we faced legacy environment with unknown dependencies and major reacrhitecture project running concurrently. We’ll share how we structured the migration, assessed and mitigated risks, and optimized costs—along with concrete lessons learned for architects and technology managers planning large-scale data migrations.





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Holiday-proofing the Estée Lauder Companies' gen AI agents
sessions.description: Learn how The Estée Lauder Companies (ELC) rapidly moved from prototype to a global, consumer-facing generative AI experience. We'll explore the architecture behind the "Jo Malone London AI Scent Advisor" and its platform, Rostrum. You’ll learn how ELC leverages Cloud Run worker pools and a serverless model with Cloud Pub/Sub to handle bursty holiday traffic with 100% message durability. Join us to learn how ELC’s lean team went from zero to production in just days, scaling AI across a diverse portfolio of prestige brands.

sessions.title: Home run AI: MLB and Firestore with MongoDB compatibility
sessions.description: Explore how Major League Baseball (MLB) used cutting-edge AI and Firestore, with its MongoDB compatibility and next-generation query engine, to accelerate facial recognition solutions and build seamless venue admission services that empower their business operations. This session will feature a technical deep dive that provides comprehensive coverage of advanced AI architecture, practical data modeling examples, and sophisticated query techniques. Join us to discover how to utilize these core features to engineer the future of human experiences powered by AI.

sessions.title: How GKE builds itself with AI
sessions.description: Building the future of Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) requires architecting the same agentic workflows we provide to our customers. Join this session to explore the internal architecture that underpins our solution for complex feature discovery, which uses proactive, autonomous agents. Discover how we build and scale these discovery agents on GKE, integrating real-time feedback loops and kernel-level isolation. We’ll deconstruct this GKE-on-GKE pattern, providing battle-tested insights for your own agentic infrastructure on Google Cloud. Leave with a reference architecture and blueprint for building your own autonomous, self-optimizing platforms.

sessions.title: How Go code gets faster and more efficient over time
sessions.description: Your backend should be an asset that appreciates, not a source of tech debt. In this session, find out how Go delivers performance gains through runtime upgrades – like Swiss Table maps and the Green Tea garbage collector – without changing a single line of code. Learn how Go’s simple, readable syntax is ideal for AI agents and AI-generated code. Discover how to build a foundation that gets more efficient over time, with code as friendly to machines as it is to humans.

sessions.title: How Google Cloud and Cyderes Deliver AI-Powered & Context-Driven Security Operations
sessions.description:
Enterprises today struggle with fragmented security stacks, slow investigations, and rising telemetry costs that hinder effective threat detection and response. This session outlines a modern approach to SecOps that combines the power of Google Cloud, AI, and SIEM capabilities with Cyderes’ data fabric platform to drive measurable outcomes for clients, inject pace into operations, and enable continuous fortification. Attendees will learn why managing data through the lens of ‘Detection' and ‘Context' accelerates and enhances threat detection, reduces analyst workload and time spent, and surfaces critical risks before they become incidents.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: How Google SRE AI-driven Ops Intelligence can benefit your Applications
sessions.description: Learn how Google SREs and SWEs deliver leaps in reliability and responsiveness. Get an inside look at how we’ve revolutionized platform reliability with a rigorous, AI-driven "Prevent, Detect, Act" lifecycle into the core of our infrastructure. Bring your real-life experience to bear, and engage in a lively discussion on how AI powered operational intelligence is shaping the Software Development Lifecycle.

sessions.title: How Google's data centers and global networks solved AI-era challenges
sessions.description: The massive networking demands of the AI-era required a fundamental rethink of Google’s data centers and global networking architectures. Explore how Google solved these challenges for services like Gemini, Veo, and Nano Banana. We’ll share lessons learned and new capabilities across global networking, zonal and regional networking, and server-cluster networking. We’ll also discuss innovations in hardware offload and direct memory access networking that you can leverage in Google Cloud and even apply to your own networking infrastructure.

sessions.title: How healthcare leaders escaped pilot purgatory to deliver real-world impact
sessions.description: After years of validating AI’s capabilities through pilots and demos, the healthcare industry is entering a new phase of maturity: value realization. The conversation has shifted from feasibility to scalability. Join us for a candid conversation with leaders in the healthcare industry who have cracked the code on enterprise adoption. They’ll share their roadmap for moving beyond the pilot stage to unlock sustainable ROI across their organizations.

sessions.title: How Hitachi revolutionizes social infrastructure with Gemini Enterprise
sessions.description: Join this session to learn how Hitachi empower frontline workers in energy, railways, and manufacturing with Gemini Enterprise. We will explore Hitachi’s "Agent Factory," a no-code development environment that allows domain experts to create task-specific AI agents without programming knowledge. The presentation also features a deep dive into real-world Proof-of-Concept for Vacuum Circuit Breaker (VCB) inspections, demonstrating how AI analyzes images to detect human errors with high precision.

sessions.title: How Infosys and Google Cloud enabled a major US bank to modernize data & analytics and deploy AI
sessions.description:
A major US bank is undergoing a multi-year digital transformation to modernize infrastructure, enhance customer experience, and boost efficiency using AI and cloud technology. Learn how the bank is moving from legacy systems to a cloud-based, data-driven architecture by leveraging advanced data, analytics, and AI across its operations in partnership with Infosys and Google Cloud.





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: How Inspired Entertainment went from weeks to one click with Gemini CLI
sessions.description: Inspired Entertainment turned the repetitive task of creating new adapters for partners and regions—historically a 15-person-week load for a three-person team, done many times per year—into a single button press followed by a brief review. This efficiency was driven by a scaled enablement strategy where internal AI Champions also used Gemini CLI to build a shared prompt library, automating a complex multi-step journey.

sessions.title: How Levi's is powering its AI agentic revolution using GKE
sessions.description: In this talk, learn how Cloudwerx, a Google Cloud partner helped its retail customer, Levi's, deploy AI solutions, superagents, and agentic workloads with GKE. In highly regulated sectors like FSI and Retail, scaling AI requires more than models; it requires a secure, hardware-aware foundation built for the agentic world and operations. We reveal how Levi's and Cloudwerx leverage GKE as the core engine to architect and deploy production-ready AI solutions.

sessions.title: How NVIDIA saves Snap millions on its experimentation platform
sessions.description: We'll detail our journey, achievements, and insights gained from implementing the RAPIDS Accelerator for Apache Spark across Snap's most substantial data processing pipelines. A significant cost reduction of 80% has been realized on NVIDIA GPUs in comparison to utilizing CPU-only jobs. We are currently collaborating with Google and NVIDIA to further deploy NVIDIA’s Spark accelerator to a broader range of our production workloads.

sessions.title: How OpenAI builds Kubernetes GPU clusters
sessions.description: AI model producers are pushing Kubernetes to unprecedented scales. Join us to learn how OpenAI uses Google Cloud’s accelerator infrastructure for complex, multi-node inference. We’ll dive into building and maintaining massive clusters using the latest NVIDIA GB200 and GB300 GPUs, and cover critical concepts like NVLink domains, RDMA over Converged Ethernet (RoCE) networking, and topology-aware scheduling. Get battle-tested tactics for handling node failures and maximizing uptime directly from the teams operating the world’s largest AI workloads.

sessions.title: How to accelerate AI agents: GKE agent sandbox and pod snapshots
sessions.description: Latency is the enemy of real-time agentic workflows. In this discussion, you'll learn how to eliminate cold starts using Pod Snapshots, a new GKE-exclusive feature that enables full checkpoint and restore capabilities for running pods. We'll demonstrate how to dramatically reduce startup latency from minutes to seconds for both CPU and GPU-based workloads. You'll witness a live demonstration on implementing Pod Snapshots to provision secure Agent Sandboxes instantly, allowing you to suspend idle resources to save costs without disrupting the user experience.

sessions.title: How to quadruple your team's engineering capacity
sessions.description:
Learn how engineering teams can meaningfully increase output by deploying AI agents as part of everyday development work. This session goes beyond code generation to show how teams use agents across the software development lifecycle to handle repeatable tasks, unblock developers, and accelerate delivery. We will explore practical patterns drawn from real-world deployments, including how to onboard agents like new team members and define clear ownership between humans and machines. Attendees will leave with concrete workflows they can apply to improve team capacity, code quality, and developer focus without adding headcount.





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: How to scale Agentic AI for the enterprise: A real life example at Cardinal Health with Genpact
sessions.description:
Ready to move from AI hype to enterprise impact? It starts with process and data as the foundation for scalable value. Join Cardinal Health and Genpact to learn how a Fortune 50 company built a multi-agent AI workflow on Google Cloud to automate a complex financial process. Using Gemini on Vertex AI and orchestration through Cloud Composer, they created a “symphony of agents” that delivers real business results. Walk away with a practical framework for scaling AI across the enterprise with the right governance, strategy, and partner ecosystem.





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: How we build and use Gemini CLI at Google Cloud
sessions.description: Have you ever wondered how we use our own tools to build themselves? In this session, you'll go behind the scenes of the Gemini CLI, where we’ll show you how we’re evolving it from a command line into an enterprise-grade developer agent. You will explore our modular capabilities for complex workflows, specifically focusing on skills and extensions. We’ll provide a deep dive into agent-to-agent (A2A) communication, demonstrating how we use it to supercharge the CLI with local and remote agents. And we'll detail how we address the challenge of scale, ensuring speed and security for Google-scale development.

sessions.title: How we built an AI agent workforce to automate coding
sessions.description: Discover how to automate your engineering workflow with AI. This talk reveals how we built a Slack-triggered agent pipeline using Gemini and Google Cloud to write code, fix bugs, and create PRs. We’ll cover the architecture from issue analysis to human review, sharing real-world lessons on boosting developer velocity without losing quality. Leave with a blueprint to deploy your own secure, integrated AI coding agents.

sessions.title: How Wendy's got to 99.95% availability (and how you can too)
sessions.description:
Wendy's is a household name, but most think of it as a restaurant chain, not a tech company. Under the hood, in the last five years Wendy's has scaled to 23% of orders being digital and running at 99.95% availability. In this fireside chat, VP of Architecture and Engineering David Faircloth sits down with Whitney Lee, Senior Technical Advocate at Datadog, to share how Wendy's built an engineering culture from scratch. He'll dish about how observability, chaos engineering, and going all-in on Google Cloud played a part in scaling a world-class engineering team that drives reliability.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: How Yahoo maximizes GKE price-performance at hyperscale
sessions.description: Join this session to explore the architecture of Yahoo’s global compute fabric and learn how they use Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) to deliver extreme performance without sacrificing price efficiency. We’ll go beyond the basics to show how Yahoo implements elastic capacity models and GKE innovations across the entire compute stack to handle everything from massive batch processing to real-time AI inference. Discover how Yahoo uses GKE to eliminate capacity bottlenecks and minimize waste. And take away technical strategies for building a robust, high-performance platform that scales effortlessly with your business needs.

sessions.title: Humanoid robots in pediatric care
sessions.description: Humanoid robots can offer both presence and utility in pediatric care: they engage patients with natural, real-time conversation and expressive body language, while also moving through the ward to perform surveillance rounds and light logistics (deliveries/pickups) safely. We present how the Mirokai humanoids from Enchanted Tools are built with Gemini Live for low-latency spoken interaction and Gemini Robotics to connect understanding to whole-body behaviors, under strict safety and privacy guardrails.

sessions.title: Hunting for threats against AI infrastructure
sessions.description: Traditional detection is no longer enough. To stay ahead of attackers, you must proactively hunt for threats. Demystify how to build a threat-hunting program from scratch to minimize breach impact and reduce dwell time. We’ll cover how to assemble a team from your security operations center and incident response staff, establish clear processes, and choose the right tools. In addition, we’ll explore several use cases for proactively finding attacks against AI infrastructure.

sessions.title: Hyperdisk: Optimize block storage for AI and enterprise workloads
sessions.description: Choosing the optimal block storage for workloads is crucial for both performance and cost-efficiency. We address this challenge with our workload-optimized Google Cloud Hyperdisk portfolio. In this session, learn how to architect the right block storage strategy for your workload needs. We’ll provide a practical decision framework for matching tunable performance characteristics to specific use cases, ranging from databases requiring high input/output operations per second (IOPS) to large-scale AI/ML data loading. Join us to discover what’s new with Hyperdisk and get firsthand insights from leading customers.

speakers.name: Julia Blankenberg
speakers.company: Clearstream Europe AG, Deutsche Börse Group

sessions.title: Identity and access management in the age of AI
sessions.description: To preempt challenges with AI agent sprawl, organizations need to treat AI agents as an extension of managed identities. This session will highlight identity and access-management principles that are at the focal point for managing agentic AI. Join us to discover how a modern approach to security can turn potential agent sprawl into a structured and secure competitive advantage.

sessions.title: Identity-first security for the productive, AI-powered workforce
sessions.description:
Google Cloud and Okta deliver security and resilience for a productive, AI-powered workforce by unifying identity, access, devices, and collaboration across the modern work stack. Together, we provide an open, Zero Trust foundation that enables people to work faster and smarter—wherever work happens—without lock-in or compromise. We will explore integrations across Android, Chrome, and Workspace, showcasing through real-world customer stories how our joint solutions provide a flexible alternative for the modern workforce.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Immersive training with Live Avatar
sessions.description: Elevate training materials for your organization with immersive Live Avatars that engage in thoughtful discussions and can simulate realistic scenarios for you and your teamates to practice.

sessions.title: Implement Flutter GenUI with the experts
sessions.description: Let’s continue the conversation from our session on Flutter GenUI. Whether you are curious about integrating with your existing widget catalog, wondering about performance implications, or looking for specific architectural advice, this is your chance to ask. We will walk through specific code scenarios and discuss how GenUI fits into existing Flutter workflows.

sessions.title: Implement Google DeepMind innovation within your enterprise
sessions.description: In this session, learn how Google DeepMind develops agents powered by Gemini that help improve performance and complete comprehensive research tasks. And discover how you can use Google Cloud to implement these techniques in your applications.

sessions.title: Improve AI developer velocity with an agentic cross-cloud network
sessions.description: Vibe coding and AI development thrive on service-centric platforms where networking is invisible, agile, and secure. To accelerate developer velocity, platform teams must evolve their infrastructure strategy. This session will introduce new service-networking capabilities for Google Kubernetes Engine and Cloud Run that are designed to meet the unique, high-scale demands of agentic AI. Join us to learn how to build a seamless platform experience that simplifies traffic management, strengthens identity-based security, and provides real-time observability – all while significantly lowering total cost of ownership and empowering developers.

sessions.title: Improve developer velocity using Conductor for spec-driven development
sessions.description: AI coding agents are only as good as the context you provide. Join us to learn how to optimize results by formalizing your specs using the Gemini CLI Conductor extension for spec-driven development. This session demonstrates how spec-based context improves performance and accelerates the idea-to-production cycle better than prompting alone.

sessions.title: Influential Communication: The Power of Speaking with Precision, Presence, and Purpose
sessions.description:
Your ability to influence is only as strong as your ability to communicate. In this compelling session, Nada Lena Nasserdeen—founder of Rise Up For You—reveals how to master the art and science of transformative communication.

Move beyond transactional directives and learn to speak with precision, command presence, and drive purpose. Whether in 1:1s or boardrooms, this session empowers you to connect deeply and inspire action. Stop just relaying information—start driving results through the power of influential communication.

sessions.title: Infra-first data center exit: Cutting physical assets & spend
sessions.description: Uncover the migration approach that saves you money on power and cooling contracts. Unlike traditional migrations, the Google Cloud Platforms and Infrastructure team approaches Data Center Exit (DCx) through a physical-to-digital lens. By linking rack location to GCP adoption, you can systematically "turn down" your data center in real-time, ensuring that as your cloud capability ramps up, your real estate liability and infrastructure spend definitively go down.
sessions.room: Partner Summit Lounge Lightning Talk Theater 2

sessions.title: Innovate faster with Flutter
sessions.description: Learn how Talabat, a leading Middle Eastern delivery platform, unified their development teams by migrating from native iOS and Android apps to Flutter. Join us to explore how this transition removed organizational silos and enabled faster feature delivery across 9 diverse markets. Discover practical strategies for scaling cross-platform development while maintaining high performance for millions of users. Learn how Flutter can help your team move faster and focus on delivering consistent, high-quality customer experiences globally.

sessions.title: Innovating data quality: Wayfair's Cognitive AI Engine
sessions.description:
This session explores the ground-breaking data quality and automation solutions implemented by Wayfair in partnership with Pythian. We will detail our innovative approach to solving complex data challenges at scale, including a new AI-powered document tagging system and the next-generation "Dim Checker" data quality platform. Discover how Wayfair leverages Google Cloud's advanced AI and data engineering services to automate data validation and ensure accuracy across its vast product catalog, driving significant operational efficiencies.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Inside Google AI infrastructure: A deep dive under the hood
sessions.description: Discover the engineering behind the infrastructure that powers the world’s most advanced AI. This session will explore our latest advancements across the full stack – including custom silicon, high-performance networking, and AI-optimized storage. sessions.title: Long-Running Agents: The AI that never sleeps
sessions.description:
Today's AI agents are impressive but often don't run for long - they forget context mid-task, hallucinate when sessions get long, and declare victory before the job is done. What if an agent could work autonomously for hours or even days, maintaining state, recovering from failures, and actually shipping results?

In this session, we'll explore the architecture and patterns behind long-running agents — persistent AI workers that go far beyond single-prompt interactions. Through two live demos built on Google ADK and Cloud Run, you'll see a 24/7 competitive intelligence agent that monitors competitors across Reddit, YouTube, Hacker News, and the web (with historical trend detection powered by Firestore), and a creative coding agent that transformed a large Blender scene into a browser-explorable 3D environment in a single continuous session.

We'll cover the key engineering breakthroughs that make this possible — agent harnesses, persistent memory patterns, self-verification loops, and how Agent Engine's Sessions and Memory Bank provide managed infrastructure for agent persistence at scale. You'll leave with practical patterns for building agents that don't just answer questions, but plan, execute, debug, iterate, and ship.

sessions.title: Modern observability for Cloud Run with Datadog
sessions.description:
Serverless architectures on Google Cloud are easy to deploy and notoriously hard to debug. Because Cloud Run services typically operate within distributed systems, pinpointing regressions requires understanding how requests traverse multiple components. The evidence needed for end-to-end troubleshooting exists within a rich ecosystem of logs, metrics, and traces; the key challenge lies in correlating this telemetry across services.
In this session we’ll showcase Datadog’s unified observability for Google Cloud Run in action. See deployment markers layered directly onto performance data, monitor related Cloud Run Jobs, and follow distributed traces through Pub/Sub and beyond—so you can pinpoint impact, isolate root cause, and resolve production issues faster.

sessions.title: Scaling Gemini Inference

What if you need to respond faster? Join this tactical session on building a high-throughput inference engine with Cloud Run. We share real-world architecture on scaling instances, tuning CPU vs. Concurrency, and surviving "429 Rate Limit" storms. Learn to deal with the quotas and limits, optimize max_concurrency, and architect for massive parallelism using serverless containers.

sessions.description: Securing optimized infrastructure for the AI era can be resource intensive and expensive. Leveraging a global network of full-stack cloud infrastructure adds to the complexity. sessions.title: Scaling in the agentic era with AI Hypercomputer

sessions.title: Scaling inference for reasoning models & agents with NVIDIA on GKE
sessions.description:

NVIDIA Dynamo is an open-source inference framework for large-scale serving, purpose-built to close that gap. By combining inference optimizations - like disaggregated inference and agentic-routing - with production-grade methods, Dynamo maximizes GPU utilization on Google Cloud’s A4X Max, powered by NVIDIA GB300 NVL72.

In this session, we'll discuss deploying Dynamo on Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) and share real-world benchmarks.

sessions.description: AI agents have the power to act on your behalf. Do you have the right safeguards so they don’t put your organization at risk? From there, a Gemini-powered external AI agent in GitLab takes over, reviewing the code and opening a merge request autonomously. Minutes later, a production-ready Python app lands. No handoffs. No bottlenecks. Just secure AI-orchestrated development from idea to deployment.

sessions.description: Unlock the full potential of Google Cloud’s native security features to govern and protect your resources. We’ll also show you how to move beyond traditional access-management challenges. See how Policy Intelligence, through tools like IAM Recommender and Policy Analyzer, helps right-size permissions, while Privileged Access Manager (PAM) enables secure, time-bound elevated access. Leave with actionable strategies to enhance your cloud security using built-in Policy, PAM, and Policy Intelligence.

sessions.title: Securely bring the best of Google AI to every employee with Gemini Enterprise
sessions.description: Gemini Enterprise empowers every employee with Google AI. But how can you keep your business data safe and compliant without slowing down AI-driven innovation? In this strategic session, we’ll detail Gemini Enterprise’s built-in controls for data protection, data access, safe agent execution, and sovereign data boundaries. We’ll also demonstrate how to extend agent security with Security Command Center to implement constraint-based controls that can help protect agents from attack, assess risks to Gemini Enterprise agents, and detect active threats against the infrastructure powering your agents.

sessions.title: Securely build and govern AI agents in Vertex AI
sessions.description: Your team has built AI models and agents in Vertex AI. Now you need to ensure they scale safely and securely. sessions.title: Securely connect your global enterprise with Cloud WAN
sessions.description: Managing disparate wide area network (WAN) infrastructure across global sites is costly and complex, often resulting in poor performance, a high total cost of ownership, and gaps in security, not to mention it hampers business agility. Enterprises need a unified, high-speed, globally available WAN solution with integrated best-in-class security. Explore the latest innovations with Cloud WAN, part of Google Cloud’s Cross-Cloud Network. Cloud WAN is designed to simplify enterprise connectivity using Google’s global network. We’ll discuss new capabilities, ecosystem partnerships, and coverage expansions that allow you to leverage Google’s planet-scale network to connect your global enterprise with reduced latency, lower total cost of ownership, and higher security.

sessions.title: Securing agent traffic at scale: Network enforcement for the Agentic Enterprise
sessions.description:
As enterprises deploy autonomous AI agents into production, security must extend beyond identity and runtime controls to govern how agents communicate across cloud environments. In the Agentic Era, the network becomes the enforcement fabric that translates AI intent into safe execution—controlling traffic, inspecting behavior, and containing blast radius at machine speed. This session introduces a Network Security Control Plane for agentic architectures on Google Cloud. Attendees will learn how cloud-native network security enables real-time inspection of agent-to-service and east-west traffic, delivers Layer 7 visibility for AI workloads, and enforces consistent policy across environments. We will explore architectural patterns using Cloud NGFW, Google Cloud Network Security Integration, and managed, consumption-based firewall services to secure agentic workflows at scale without increasing operational complexity. Attendees will leave with a practical framework for integrating network security into the AI lifecycle alongside identity, runtime protection, and observability—turning network security into an execution guardrail for autonomous systems.

sessions.description: WAFs and DLP use deterministic matching, but LLMs are probabilistic. Join this technical roundtable to debate engineering safety when prompts yield varying outputs. We'll discuss stochastic detection trade-offs, Model Armor latency, and fail-safe logic in agentic loops. Swap strategies on shifting from binary blocking to probabilistic risk management in production.

Bridging intelligence and frontline response, they’ll share strategies for executives on assessing risk and building organization-wide resilience in this new world.

sessions.description: Deterministic automation can fail when policies shift and data is inconsistent. Just as humans rely on institutional knowledge and collaboration to succeed, now your AI agents can too. The Agent Gym framework bridges the gap between static models and autonomous intelligence. Combining Vertex AI Agent Builder with Gemini Enterprise, Agent Gym distills expert feedback into real-time evolution. Join this session to explore case studies on complex finance workflows, where audit trails and undocumented expertise are mission-critical for success.

sessions.title: Serve open models with Cloud Run and GKE

sessions.title: Ship multi-agent systems on Cloud Run

Discover how our open-source foundations support a tightly integrated ISV ecosystem, providing you with a choice of third-party tools for AI safety and governance.

sessions.title: Simplify cloud and AI security for small IT teams
sessions.description: Cloud and AI adoption shouldn’t overwhelm teams that wear many hats. We’ll demonstrate how to use agentic threat intelligence to streamline threat hunting, significantly reducing the burden on your staff. Shift your posture from reactive to proactive with practical guidance on turning insights into immediate action – achieving enterprise-grade security with the simplicity your team needs to innovate and move fast.

sessions.title: Simplify your agentic security workflow development with MCP
sessions.description: Joint this discussion group to learn ways to build custom AI security workflows with MCP servers. Come prepared to share insights with peers in a smaller, more collaborative setting.

sessions.title: Simplify your data life cycle with hybrid storage architecture in Bigtable

We’ll also look at advanced governance through the new access policy framework and fine-grained access control. Join us to learn how to tailor custom roles for complex scenarios and leverage IAM Recommender to achieve automated permission right-sizing. And finally, discover how to secure sensitive perimeters using Privileged Access Manager and principal access boundaries.

sessions.title: SLO math

We'll talk about: - Evaluating SLO for our application based on the cloud architecutre - Did SLO change in the days of AI agents - Reflect on expectations of the customer for service availability - Pros and cons getting higher SLO at scale where each layer achieves a consistent level if imperfect reliability

Join this session to discover how agencies are overcoming critical hurdles in service delivery and operational efficiency, using AI to architect a blueprint for efficient, modern, and resilient systems of the future.

sessions.title: Solve the sovereignty puzzle: Your cloud, your rules
sessions.description:
In the modern digital economy, trust is your most valuable asset. But the battlefield for that trust is invisible and relentless. For decades, cybersecurity was treated as a cost center – a necessary defense against threats. But in an era where data is currency, this old model is failing. The leaders of tomorrow understand that a robust, cloud-native security posture is no longer just a shield; it’s a powerful growth engine. In this session, we’ll move beyond fear into strategy, providing a playbook for building security that both protects your business and powers it. Gain insights into how industry pioneers are winning the war for their data, building unbreakable customer trust, and unlocking new revenue streams by scaling fearlessly.

sessions.title: Sovereign AI

sessions.title: Takeaways from major open source library attacks
sessions.description:
Open source library breaches have made one thing clear: malicious actors are weaponizing trust. Recent malware attacks bypassed detection tools by exploiting the gap between verifiable source code and the binaries pulled from public registries. This session breaks down what happened and how teams can move forward safely. We’ll explore Chainguard Libraries, which delivers rebuilt libraries from verifiable source with strong provenance, SBOMs, and security backports—closing with a demo and live Q&A.





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

This session examines how AI is reshaping attacker behavior, and where risk is concentrating in the cloud as the AI-driven attack surface expands, especially through vibe coding and agent-based workflows. Using real-world attacks and recently exploited vulnerabilities, we’ll highlight what’s changing, what isn’t, and what security teams should prioritize next.
