Join Google SMEs to discuss the "agent quality flywheel" - a lifecycle approach where AI handles evaluations, identifies regressions, and monitors production. We’ll discuss how to set up your team and build a path from prototype to a reliable production agent.

sessions.title: The agentic enterprise: Google Workspace & Gemini Enterprise
sessions.description: To achieve true business transformation, organizations need intelligent systems that enable humans and agents to collaborate across boundaries. Join Yulie Kwon Kim and Maryam Gholami to discover how uniting your data, apps, and AI agents accelerates execution and unlocks capabilities that were previously impossible. We will discuss how Google Workspace and Gemini Enterprise drive tangible impacts to both the top and bottom line, empowering every individual and team to do their best work.

sessions.title: The agentic era of data: Conversational BI agents in action
sessions.description: Join this session to discover the future of data. Explore how Looker conversational business intelligence (BI) agents transform data into a trusted partner. We’ll showcase how our intelligent architecture uses the semantic model for auditable, accurate insights. And we’ll provide a live demo of multi-turn reasoning, agent sharing, and advanced analytics powered by a native Python interpreter. Learn how the API embeds these governed experiences directly into your applications.

sessions.title: The agentic era: Governing an invisible AI workforce
sessions.description: As enterprises deploy Gemini-powered agents across core operations, an “invisible workforce” of autonomous systems is beginning to reason and act at machine speed. This shift creates unprecedented governance, operational, and risk exposure for leadership. This session will explore how leading organizations establish control over this new digital workforce. We’ll demonstrate how Palo Alto Networks’ Prisma AIRS provides a real-time execution governance layer that evaluates intent, context, privilege, and risk for every agent action. Learn to transform unmanaged automation into an accountable, compliant, and resilient workforce – ensuring AI-driven operations scale safely without compromising performance, trust, or business integrity. By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: The agentic revolution: Redefining the data science life cycle
sessions.description: What happens when your IDE becomes your most productive teammate? We’re moving beyond simple automation into the era of intent-driven data science. In this session, we’ll unveil how agentic features in Google Data Cloud are collapsing the boundaries between discovery, engineering, and model deployment. Discover how the new Google Data Cloud Extension for Visual Studio Code provides a unified agentic flow, allowing data scientists and engineers to architect complex solutions through simple natural language. It’s time to stop managing infrastructure and start delivering business advantage.

sessions.title: The agentic ROI framework for lean teams
sessions.description: Think big and stay lean. Small IT teams are achieving massive scale using agentic AI. Discover how autonomous agents on Google Cloud handle complex workflows, allowing your team to focus on high-value innovation. We’ll share practical strategies for maximizing ROI with Vertex AI, proving you don’t need a massive head count to drive enterprise-level impact. Join us to learn how to deploy agents that act as force multipliers, reducing manual toil and accelerating growth. Ready to scale your results and your impact? It’s time to win big.

sessions.title: The agentic shift in software development life cycle
sessions.description: Software delivery has evolved from basic AI assistance to autonomous agentic orchestration. Join this session to explore how Google’s AI Dev Tools, including Gemini CLI, transform the software development life cycle. We’ll examine how autonomous agent development can be scaled in large organizations using the engineering factory model. We'll share a case study of how Wipro reskilled thousands of developers into agent orchestrators. Then discover the specific blueprints and governance frameworks required to scale autonomous workflows across the enterprise while maintaining rigorous security and quality standards.

sessions.title: The agentic shopper: Redefining convenience with AI at Allegro
sessions.description: Join Allegro, Central Europe's leading marketplace, to explore the frontier of agentic commerce and learn how to turn massive product catalogs into highly curated shopping experiences. Powered by Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience, Allegro built an autonomous AI concierge that anticipates customer needs and eliminates the paradox of choice. You'll learn how to transform your digital storefront into a proactive, frictionless shopping companion that redefines convenience and builds profound brand loyalty.

sessions.title: The Agentic SOC: Harmonizing Native AI with Human Expertise
sessions.description:
Without the right foundation, the promise of AI in security often falls short. How do we bridge the gap between raw AI potential and practical, reliable threat detection? This session shows Google SecOps’ native capabilities coupled with Vertex AI to drive specific security outcomes. Join us to learn the evolution of the "Agentic SOC"—where AI agents handle the heavy lifting of context-building and initial response, empowering human analysts to focus on high-value decision-making.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: The Agentic SOC: Where to start
sessions.description: Join this interactive discussion to gain practical insights on getting started with AI agents in your SOC.

sessions.title: The agentic workplace unlocked: how Gemini democratizes AI across your business
sessions.description: Real AI transformation requires automating end-to-end workflows, moving beyond individual tasks. As organizations transition from experimentation to holistic integration, they must navigate complex, real-world obstacles. Join us to see how innovators move beyond feature adoption to achieve success with Google Workspace and Gemini Enterprise. We’ll unpack practical strategies to influence culture, overcome friction, and architect agentic workflows that rewire business outcomes and drive enterprise-wide transformation.

sessions.title: The agentic-first data enterprise: Design & integration workshop
sessions.description: Data remains the hardest part of building AI agents. In this architect-to-architect session, we simulate a whiteboarding exercise to define a target Agentic-First Data Architecture. We apply a structured methodology to map use cases to technical capabilities, evaluating modern cloud integration tools on Google Cloud. The discussion tackles critical design challenges: building end-to-end data foundations and solving intricate integration patterns. Leave with a pragmatic framework to prioritize data and ground Gemini in enterprise reality.

sessions.title: The agents among us
sessions.description:
As AI agents grow more autonomous, we need to know if we can trust them. Agents can be unpredictable, which raises the stakes on every decision they make. This session will explore how to build that trust through the monitoring and iteration of various LLMs – namely Google Gemini models – available via Vertex AI. We’ll examine how observability reveals agent reasoning, while controlled experiments and LLM-as-a-judge frameworks enable scalable evaluation. By implementing continuous evaluation, developers can create a safety net for change – transforming opacity into confidence using Datadog’s observability ecosystem.

By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: The AI attack surface: Defending the modern AI-powered enterprise
sessions.description: Join leadership from Palo Alto Network’s Unit 42 and guest experts for a candid discussion on the 2026 threat landscape. We’ll look at recent trends uncovered in “The State of Cloud Security Report 2025,” and discuss how threats have transitioned from human-led to AI-assisted attacks. Come review the core capabilities required to maintain security and oversight without sacrificing innovation – and gain a strategic framework for establishing intent-based security, moving beyond traditional detection to a model of continuous, AI-native governance and autonomous resilience. By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: The AI stylist: Nordstrom’s new era of personal luxury
sessions.description: The future of retail isn't just digital - it’s conversational, visual, and deeply personal. Join this session to see how Nordstrom is utilizing Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience to move beyond traditional e-commerce into the era of the "AI Stylist." We’ll dive into how Nordstrom’s new shopping agent uses multimodal AI to understand style and intent as intuitively as a human personal shopper. You'll learn how this innovative implementation boosts loyalty and drives growth, and gain actionable strategies for deploying enterprise-grade agentic solution to create a truly differentiated brand experience.

sessions.title: The AI-ready enterprise: Securing access and data in an AI-first world
sessions.description:
As organizations embed Gemini into every workflow, the traditional network perimeter must evolve into an intelligent, AI-aware service edge. Explore how Palo Alto Networks’ next-generation secure access service edge (SASE) protects the enterprise workforce, while Prisma AIRS actively defends the underlying AI models against targeted threats, providing seamless security across Google Cloud. We’ll discuss a new strategic framework for AI governance, moving beyond simple “allow/block” rules to granular, intent-based controls that prevent data exfiltration and manage “shadow AI” usage. Discover how natively integrating Prisma SASE and AIRS with Google Cloud’s global infrastructure delivers a high-performance, zero-trust environment securing every user and AI interaction.

By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: The architect's flight simulator: Interactive test with an AI digital twin
sessions.description: How do you validate cloud resilience before deployment? Static reviews often miss cascading failures. This session debuts a "flight simulator" for infrastructure: a digital twin powered by Gemini. We showcase a live architectural pattern where Vertex AI agents analyze Terraform and IaC to predict blast radiuses and traffic spikes. In this interactive "Game Day," the audience chooses the failure scenario, and we use Google Cloud to simulate the impact in real-time. Learn to build proactive, high-velocity AI reasoning engines.

sessions.title: The architect's guide to reduce OpenShift TCO and fund AI
sessions.description: Funding a scalable AI strategy starts with infrastructure efficiency. Join us to learn how migrating to OpenShift on Google Cloud unlocks the hidden budget needed for AI. We dive into real-world tactics for slashing TCO using custom machine types, storage pools, and Axion processors. Avoid replatforming risks while gaining a high-performance, cloud-native operating model. Learn to build the resilient and cost-performant stack to meets your enterprise demands.

sessions.title: The autonomous ERP: Millions in efficiencies with multi-agent systems
sessions.description: The Autonomous ERP moves beyond simple automation to collaborative Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) on Google Cloud. This session demonstrates how specialized agents manage end-to-end processes, like Procure-to-Pay. Learn to use the Agent Development Kit (ADK) on Vertex AI for MAS architecture and explore A2A and MCP protocols for agent interoperability. We deep-dive into real-time data grounding via BigQuery and others. Attendees gain a blueprint for self-optimizing enterprises that satisfy strict audit requirements.

sessions.title: The BigQuery advantage: AI-powered migrations to an AI-ready data platform
sessions.description: Migrating to the cloud is no longer just about reducing costs – it’s about unlocking business value with AI. This session provides a blueprint for moving your critical data workloads to BigQuery with unprecedented speed. Discover how to eliminate infrastructure management, lower your total cost of ownership (TCO), and prepare your data foundation for the next wave of AI capabilities. Join us to learn how AI-powered BigQuery Migration Services automates the migration journey, de-risking your migration and turning a multiyear roadmap into a fast track for innovation.

sessions.title: The Cloud Security maturity playbook: From noise to risk ownership
sessions.description: Cloud security maturity isn't about how many tools you have, it's about how effectively you use them. In this session, we’ll walk through Wiz’s Cloud Maturity Framework and how it helps organizations scale their cloud security in an era of rapid AI driven development. You’ll hear from a Wiz customer about how their organization was able to gain complete visibility, burn down critical risks, and democratize security — enabling every team to innovate quickly, manage risk, and fix fast.

sessions.title: The content engine: Architecting production-ready flows for media and retail
sessions.description: Marketing teams are reimagining advertising. Media and entertainment players are generating professional B-roll, music, and cinematic video. And retailers are leveraging AI to provide immersive, interactive shopping experiences. In this session, join leaders from across media, advertising, and commerce to discover how they’re moving beyond AI experimentation to deploy production-grade content at scale. And learn how Google’s advanced generative media models – including Gemini, Veo, and Lyria – integrate to power high-end creative workflows.

sessions.title: The developer's platform: Build the agentic AI future with Cloud SQL
sessions.description: Join us to discover why Cloud SQL is the definitive database for app developers. In this session, we’ll explore how to accelerate early development with frictionless ease, using near-instant provisioning and our AI-native toolchain – including the Gemini CLI and managed Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. This agility is anchored by Cloud SQL Enterprise Plus, a platform engineered for uncompromised scale. Learn how to run your mission-critical workloads with confidence, backed by 99.99% availability and intelligent caching capabilities.

sessions.title: The Engine and the Operator: Realizing High-Fidelity Outcomes with Google SecOps and MCP
sessions.description:
Moving beyond generic integration, Google and Foresite showcase the mechanics of a true Agentic SOC. By leveraging Model Context Protocol (MCP), we demonstrate how Gemini agents query partner tools to enrich investigations while Foresite provides the Human-in-the-Loop validation essential for remediation. This session proves how Google’s intelligence engine and Foresite’s standardized operating model turn complex security data into repeatable, sellable outcomes.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: The era of agentic defense: Scaling next-gen MSSP with Google Cloud
sessions.description: Legacy SIEM is out; AI-native defense is in. Discover how Next-Gen MSSPs are revolutionizing security using Google Cloud SecOps and Gemini. This session explores "Agentic Defense"—leveraging AI to automate detection, triage, and response at hyperscale. Learn to transform your SOC from reactive to proactive by integrating Mandiant threat intelligence. We’ll share strategies to reduce MTTR, bridge the talent gap, and scale your practice.
sessions.room: Partner Summit Lounge Lightning Talk Theater 1

speakers.name: Igors Garis Koni
speakers.company: Head of Partner Security Sales, EMEA

sessions.title: The execution gap: Clearing rollout bottlenecks to maximize AI investments
sessions.description:
Global enterprises have made massive investments in generative AI, but many are hitting a wall with enterprise-wide rollout. The technology is ready, but legacy infrastructure, siloed data, and entrenched workflows create bottlenecks that stifle execution and trap ROI in the pilot phase.

Join financial services leaders for a candid discussion on closing the "execution gap. This panel will explore the hard truths of scaling AI, focusing on how top organizations dismantle structural friction - from modernizing compliance to upskilling workforces - to ensure AI investments translate into measurable business velocity and autonomous action.

sessions.title: The future of AI and sports
sessions.description: Artificial intelligence is rapidly driving new innovations across the sports landscape, enhancing athlete preparation, competitive strategy, and fan engagement. Hear from Olympic snowboarding gold medalist Shaun White and two-time major golf champion Bryson DeChambeau as they explore how AI and advanced analytics are redefining peak performance and transforming the face of modern competition.

sessions.title: The future of AI: How startups build competitive moats
sessions.description: As the future of AI takes shape, startups are making big bets on what will matter in the long term. Join leading founders for a real conversation about how they’re building moats beyond the model – what decisions paid off, which ones didn’t, and how they’re thinking about architecture, data, cost, and product today.

sessions.title: The Future of business applications, powered by agentic AI
sessions.description: Agentic AI is transforming business applications from the inside out. In this session, you'll hear from powerhouse peers—leading ISVs and solution providers—on how this technology is changing how business applications are built, used, and monetized in a secure, compliant, and well-governed model. You will also learn how leading enterprises are leveraging Gemini Enterprise in combination with partner solutions to deliver complete, production-ready agentic solutions.

sessions.title: The future of data lakehouse: Open and interoperable for the agentic era
sessions.description: Google Cloud is redefining the open lakehouse for the agentic era.  Join this group discussion to learn how to unify operational data, multimodal storage, and analytics on an interconnected and governed Apache Iceberg foundation. Learn how to enable full interoperability across Spark, BigQuery, and AI services with a singular control plane and unified governance. Discover how to re-engineer your entire data foundation for the speed, scale, and performance needed to power your AI agents.

sessions.title: The future of developer experience is frictionless
sessions.description: We’ve all felt the weight of fragmented ecosystems. It’s time to cut the cord. Featuring industry titans from Atlassian, Datadog, Harness, LangChain, and Google, this session will unveil the next frontier in developer productivity: AI agent interoperability and open standards. Discover how to create seamless, antigravity workflows that let your team move faster than ever.

sessions.title: The future of foundational intelligence: Insights from Google Research and DeepMind
sessions.description: Bridging the gap between research breakthroughs and enterprise adoption is critical for defining future strategy. Leaders from Google DeepMind and Google Research will offer a grounded look at “what’s next” and the tangible horizon of foundational intelligence, providing an exclusive perspective on the next generation of model capabilities and the practical innovations that leaders need to prepare for now.

sessions.title: The future of PostgreSQL
sessions.description: We will explore specific use cases and technical innovations designed to secure and scale mission-critical workloads. Uncover best practices for optimizing PostgreSQL for AI-driven projects, covering vector indexing, resource management for agentic workflows, and strategies to maximize performance without compromising reliability.

sessions.title: The Gemini 3 playbook: Optimizing for quality, cost, and scale
sessions.description: Join this session for insights and best practices to optimize Gemini 3 applications for quality, cost, and scalability, gathered from our collaboration with top Google Cloud enterprise customers. We’ll deconstruct real-world implementation questions – ranging from complex agentic setups to high-volume data processing – and share the practical lessons learned. Learn how to adapt your prompting strategy to get the most from Gemini 3’s capabilities. Get concrete steps to reduce latency and manage token costs. Discover how to design prompts that are robust against production data distributions. Dive deep into advanced use cases for agents, long-context retrieval, and autoraters. And explore methods for updating existing prompts to align with Gemini 3’s standards.

sessions.title: The GKE inference playbook: Optimize cost and performance
sessions.description: Balancing inference latency and cost is generative AI’s toughest challenge. This session delivers the playbook for a high-performance, cost-efficient inference stack on Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE). Explore innovations for scaling state-of-the-art models, crushing cold starts, and maximizing utilization with Ironwood Tensor Processing Units (TPUs) and vLLM. We’ll take a deep dive into GKE Inference Gateway, demonstrating routing based on the service level objective (SLO) across clusters to ensure your application stays responsive – and your budget stays intact.

sessions.title: The Google Cloud database playbook: From agentic AI use case to database
sessions.description: When building generative AI applications, navigating the landscape of modern databases can feel overwhelming. The question becomes whether to use a relational, document, graph, or key-value. The right choice dramatically impacts performance, scalability, and development speed. Join this session to learn how to cut through the noise with a framework-driven approach to Google Cloud’s portfolio. Through real-world scenarios from AI-driven fraud detection to high-scale agentic AI use case, we’ll explore the decision making process and the features that drive success. You'll leave with the confidence to architect your next high-stakes generative AI solution.

sessions.title: The Google way: Scaling delivery with AI-powered delivery navigator
sessions.description: The Google way of delivery is now in your hands, powered by AI. In this session, we'll explore the newest evolution of Delivery Navigator, an integrated delivery ecosystem now available to customers, featuring AI-powered search and agentic delivery methods. You'll learn how the unified framework drives project success and allows you to leverage Google’s collective delivery intelligence through an AI Agent. You'll get insights directly from partners and learn real-world strategies to achieve consistent success at scale with AI-powered delivery.

sessions.title: The governed open lakehouse: Achieve interoperability and unified context
sessions.description: Eliminating the trade-off between open interoperability and manageability is critical for modern data platforms. Join us to learn how to leverage Lakehouse runtime catalog to unify metadata across engines in a serverless way, including BigQuery, Apache Spark, and Trino. We'll also cover unified governance for your lakehouse, enabling out-of-the-box global discoverability, context enrichment and governance, providing active semantic context to support advanced AI agentic workflows.

sessions.title: The human bottleneck: Why great tech fails and how to drive value in AI
sessions.description: You’ve built the future, but is your organization living in it? Most digital transformations don’t fail because the technology is broken; they fail because human habits are hard to break. In this session, lead AI researcher Dr. Fei-Fei Li joins BCG and Google Cloud to reveal the hidden psychological friction that stalls even the most advanced cloud strategies. Discover the science of “making change stick” by aligning technical ambition with human instinct. Join us to move beyond the frustration of wasted investment and learn the practical art of hardwiring innovation into your company’s DNA.

sessions.title: The industry advantage: turning vertical expertise into your competitive edge
sessions.description: In the rush to modernize, many organizations are discovering a critical flaw in their cloud strategy: generic technology applied to specialized industry problems often fails to deliver on its promise. Your business has a unique operational DNA, shaped by decades of specific challenges and opportunities. Why, then, would a one-size-fits-all cloud solution be the answer? It's time to stop building features and start solving problems with an industry-first approach.This session provides a playbook for turning deep vertical expertise into an unbeatable competitive edge. Hear firsthand how leading companies are combining their industry knowledge with the power of Google Cloud to drive real-world results and win in the market.

sessions.title: The infrastructure paradox: Data centers as the agentic AI control plane
sessions.description:
The agentic AI software construct is changing to a flexible model of multiple agents connecting to multiple data sets and multiple models. Designing an infrastructure that offers security, privacy, cost control, low-latency performance, and most of all, flexibility will set AI-powered software developers apart. Connectivity of agents to a rich ecosystem of providers, open and closed models and access to data wherever it is generated will win the day. Hear how Google Cloud customers are utilizing the Data Center as the new Control Plane for Agentic AI!





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: The intelligence layer: Building AI-first customer experience
sessions.description:
The AI landscape is transforming from fragmented experiments to unified infrastructure. Join representatives from Dialpad to discover how 2026 will mark the shift to integrated intelligence ecosystems, and how technologies like Agent2Agent and Vertex AI enable features like AI Playbooks – where AI agents function as a scalable workforce, insights drive exponential outcomes, and customer experience becomes one continuous conversation across voice and digital channels.

By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: The invisible transaction: Architecting the future of frictionless retail
sessions.description: As generative AI evolves from helpful assistant to autonomous shopper, the friction of the traditional checkout page is disappearing. Join The Home Depot and Kroger to learn how Google Cloud’s Gemini Enterprise for Customer Experience is powering agents that understand complex customer goals – from renovating a kitchen to planning a week of meals. Crucially, we’ll reveal how PayPal completes this architecture by securing the “invisible transaction.” Learn how their protocols provide the essential trust layer for agentic commerce, allowing AI agents to safely execute payments on a person’s behalf and turn conversation directly into conversion.

sessions.title: The journey to agentic applications at Spotify
sessions.description: Spotify is actively deploying agentic applications in their cloud infrastructure. Spotify will share their goals and discuss the top of mind infrastructure considerations that have shaped their journey to support agentic applications. In this talk Spotify will share their experience in adopting MCP in their gRPC environment, implementing AI guardrails and managing multitiered identity for agent interactions. Spotify is exploring model serving optimization with inference gateway extensions and across a wide range of runtime form factors spanning ARM, GPU and TPU. Spotify is building this support on top of a highly reliable regionalized network architecture to which they have recently migrated their entire cloud deployment.

sessions.title: The knowledge source: Reliable product docs for AI agents via MCP
sessions.description: Poor documentation hinders product adoption, particularly when AI summaries generate inaccurate information due to flawed source material. To boost growth, the approach to content creation must change, shifting the focus to an AI-first audience. This session will explain how to make documentation a reliable source for Vertex AI agents and Gemini. It will cover the use of Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers and AI-friendly formatting to ensure documentation supports LLMs. Learn how to eliminate friction and provide users with accurate, instant guidance to get faster onboarding, fewer support requests, and a smoother path to product success.

sessions.title: The latest from Google's TPU roadmap: Architecting for frontier AI
sessions.description: Go under the hood of the AI infrastructure powering Google’s most ambitious breakthroughs. In this exclusive deep dive, we’ll reveal the future of Cloud Tensor Processing Units (TPUs), including new details on our latest-generation silicon and data center architecture. Alongside leadership from Google DeepMind, we’ll explore the hardware-software codesign that enables efficient large-scale training and optimal inference. Join us to discover how to use the full power of our TPU roadmap to drive AI innovation.

sessions.title: The migration trifecta: Move fast, shift budget, and deploy AI
sessions.description: For small IT teams, AI readiness is about smart strategy – not starting from scratch. Learn how to use automated tools to assess your VMware landscape, calculate total cost of ownership, and execute low-risk migrations to Google Cloud. We’ll show you how to unlock up to 30% in savings and reinvest those resources into Gemini Cloud Assist and Vertex AI to deploy next-gen AI programs that drive revenue growth.

sessions.title: The new Axion Bare Metal for Arm workloads
sessions.description: This roundatable topic explores optimizing Arm workloads on the new Axion Bare Metal, C4A-metal. We’ll talk through practical implementations for high-performance needs, specifically focusing on automotive tooling (e.g., QNX hypervisor) and Android workloads. Attendees will address hardware-level tuning and leave with a roadmap for deploying specialized Arm-native stacks on C4A-metal.

sessions.title: The new productivity frontier: How AI agents are fueling business growth
sessions.description: The emergence of AI agents represents a fundamental shift from reactive tools to autonomous execution. Join Google experts and industry leaders to learn how organizations are using AI agents in Gemini Enterprise to automate workflows and drive business outcomes. We’ll delve into high-impact use cases and break down the key ingredients for success: a unified agentic platform, deep ecosystem integration, and best practices to go from vision to ROI. You’ll come away with a proven recipe for the agentic era and exclusive insights from large-scale AI deployments.

sessions.title: The new way to use Spark: Intelligent, automated, and lightning fast
sessions.description: Google Cloud is redefining possibilities for building open lakehouse architectures with Apache Spark. Join us to learn about the latest updates designed to help you develop, deploy, and manage Spark workloads easier, smarter, and faster. Explore how to develop and troubleshoot Spark pipelines using Gemini-driven agentic developer experiences. Learn to execute jobs faster with Lightning Engine, use serverless Spark for automated job execution, and build NoOps (no operations) pipelines that integrate seamlessly with Vertex AI and BigQuery. And discover how Lowe’s built their enterprise data pipelines on Google Cloud.

sessions.title: The partnership playbook: architecting a modern GTM engine
sessions.description: How do industry leaders build a joint go-to-market engine for growth? In this fireside chat, executives from Vodafone Business and Google Cloud unpack the blueprint for their strategic alliance. Learn how they co-innovate with data and AI, structure integrated sales motions, and deliver measurable outcomes for enterprise customers. This session offers a rare look inside a powerful partnership, providing a practical model for modern innovation.

sessions.title: The physics of AI: Infrastructure for the next era of innovation
sessions.description: As we innovate at a rapid speed, we find ourselves at the intersection of advanced computer architecture and data center engineering – the new “physics” of the AI era. Join Amin Vahdat to explore the TPU-core vision behind Google’s AI Hypercomputer, alongside Peng Zhao, who will discuss the technology's transformative impact on Citadel Securities and the future of scalable AI.

sessions.title: The priority paradox: Navigating multi-tenant AI on GKE
sessions.description: What happens when your high-priority RL training job and your mission-critical LLM inference spike hit the same cluster at the same time? Building a multi-tenant AI platform is a game of constant compromise. In this session, we’ll go beyond the "perfect" reference architecture to discuss the messy reality of multi-cluster orchestration. We'll share peer-to-peer insights on setting preemption policies that don’t alienate researchers, managing "goodput" during traffic surges, and the architectural shifts required to turn a collection of Kubernetes clusters into a unified, efficient AI factory.

sessions.title: The S3NS universe: Architecting the regulator approved future of sovereign Cloud
sessions.description: Global organizations face a tension between hyperscale innovation and immunity from extraterritorial jurisdiction. This discussion will explore S3NS on Google Cloud Dedicated to achieve SecNumCloud compliance. We'll deconstruct how S3NS -  a French joint venture with Thales - leverages the Google Cloud Dedicated architecture to create a physically isolated universe of Google Cloud. Gain insight into mechanics ensuring zero physical and logical access by Google personnel, with S3NS managing all operations and cryptographic roots of trust.

sessions.title: The self-curation engine: Real-time schema mapping with Gemini and Cloud Run
sessions.description: Retail data arrives from disparate sources with inconsistent schemas. To solve this, we present a serverless Cloud Run agent that uses the Gemini API to automate schema mapping. Triggered by new data, the agent compares raw schemas to a BigQuery target and dynamically generates the required SQL or Dataform transformations. This talk highlights how AI automates the most manual parts of data engineering: schema maintenance and logic generation.

sessions.title: The story of Gap Inc.'s AI powered retail evolution
sessions.description: Gap Inc. is reimagining the retail landscape by grounding generative AI in the human experience. This session explores the journey from concept to market, detailing how Google Cloud’s AI became the quiet architecture behind a more intuitive, responsive, and intelligent brand. Join us for a look at the strategy that turned a vision for transformation into a scalable reality.

sessions.title: The three moves that define an AI-first enterprise
sessions.description:
Most enterprises aren't behind on AI. They're behind on their content. 90% of the knowledge sitting in your organization is locked in static files, invisible to the systems meant to act on it.

The companies pulling ahead aren't buying more tools. They're making Intelligent Content Management the foundation of their AI strategy. That means content systems that extract their own data, agents that execute multi-step workflows, and AI that routes decisions with enterprise-grade security and governance so nothing falls through the cracks.

In this session, we'll break down the three moves that define a truly AI-first enterprise and how Box AI, powered Gemini, is making it real for the companies already living on the other side of that transformation.

sessions.title: The trillion-dollar machine: Inside the race to build the world's AI factories
sessions.description:
What are the costs behind the aggressive construction of AI factories? In this panel, PwC’s Dallas Dolen joins industry visionaries to discuss whether the infrastructure build-out will lead to a new era of productivity or a bubble of stranded assets – and what it truly takes to democratize AI. We’ll explore how Google’s vertical advantage – owning the entire stack, from custom TPU silicon to data centers to Gemini models – defies standard unit economics, and how the world’s largest organizations are plugging into this grid to build their own operational AI factories.

By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: The ultimate guide to Cloud Run: Go from zero to production
sessions.description: Join this demo-driven session to learn how Cloud Run offers simplicity alongside flexibility for running your code. We’ll begin with a few basic getting-started concepts. Then we’ll explore some “How do I...?” scenarios, such as Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) access, startup probes, configuring for AI agents, and handling persistent storage. And we’ll wrap up with the latest features in preview for Cloud Run. All demos and content will be available as codelabs for you to practice with.

sessions.title: The Unbreachable Browser: Stop Zero-Day Exploits with HEAT Shield AI + Gemini
sessions.description:
Traditional security fails against sophisticated social engineering and zero-day exploits. This session introduces the only AI-driven, proactive defense: Menlo HEAT Shield AI powered by Google Gemini. Unlike web-focused or reactive SSE platforms, Menlo and Google deliver network separation via a hardened digital twin in the cloud with 10x greater precision in detecting zero-day exploits. Learn how multimodal AI renders real-time verdicts—closing the protection gap, reducing SOC toil, and ensuring zero threats reach the endpoint.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: The unified pipeline: Multimodal AI across the life sciences value chain
sessions.description: Join this session to explore how multimodal AI integrates diverse data streams to create a unified pipeline, accelerating innovation and precision across the entire life sciences value chain – from early-stage drug discovery and diagnostic development to the global commercialization of medical devices.

sessions.title: Threat hunters unite: A discussion on Agentic defense
sessions.description: Join this discussion group to learn ways to generate detection rules based on emerging threats. Come prepared to share insights with peers in a smaller more collaborative setting.

sessions.title: ThreatSpace APT Hunting
sessions.description: Join us for an immersive session of threat hunting for APTs in Google’s ThreatSpace range. This is not a demo or a lecture heavy session, just a chance for you to build, test, and hone your threat hunting skills. Everyone is able to participate with different levels of guides to support the security curious to security experts. Use Google Security Operations to determine all threat actor activities and use Google Threat Intelligence to provide attribution. Each day will align to a different APT, so join us to see if you can correctly identify all three APT threat actors. Laptops provided.

sessions.title: ThreatSpace APT Hunting
sessions.description: Join us for an immersive session of threat hunting for APTs in Google’s ThreatSpace range. This is not a demo or a lecture heavy session, just a chance for you to build, test, and hone your threat hunting skills. Everyone is able to participate with different levels of guides to support the security curious to security experts. Use Google Security Operations to determine all threat actor activities and use Google Threat Intelligence to provide attribution. Each day will align to a different APT, so join us to see if you can correctly identify all three APT threat actors. Laptops provided.

sessions.title: ThreatSpace APT Hunting
sessions.description: Join us for an immersive session of threat hunting for APTs in Google’s ThreatSpace range. This is not a demo or a lecture heavy session, just a chance for you to build, test, and hone your threat hunting skills. Everyone is able to participate with different levels of guides to support the security curious to security experts. Use Google Security Operations to determine all threat actor activities and use Google Threat Intelligence to provide attribution. Each day will align to a different APT, so join us to see if you can correctly identify all three APT threat actors. Laptops provided.

sessions.title: Timberlake: Keeping BigQuery and Looker *NSYNC'd
sessions.description: Join us for a compelling, fun, and technical deep dive into Timberlake, our new GenAI LookML Syncing project. We'll explore how we're making manual LookML updates a thing of the past, accelerating development velocity, and keeping BigQuery BI Views and Looker models perfectly NSYNC. Prepare to be amazed by the "choreography" of our Cloud Run services, GenAI models, and Airflow orchestration, all designed to make your data dreams "pop"!

sessions.title: Total AI Transformation: How Sanmina powers people, processes, and products
sessions.description:
Sanmina is redefining the AI landscape by tackling three pillars: people productivity via Gemini, process efficiency through agents, and manufacturing factory quality and productivity improvements with targeted AI. Partnering with Pythian, CIO Manesh Patel architected the platforms required to bridge End User, IT, and OT environments. Join us to explore how Sanmina builds, deploys, and scales AI from the corporate office to the factory floor and into the global data center. Discover the unified blueprint for a truly AI-integrated enterprise.

By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: TPU inference: Portability, cost, and scaling for state of the art
sessions.description: Demystifying TPU inference doesn't have to require writing custom compilers. Join this collaborative discussion to exchange strategies for deploying vLLM and other frameworks across Google Cloud hardware. We will dissect real-world implementations, debating the business tradeoffs between time-to-first-token latency and raw throughput, the reality of switching workloads between GPUs and TPUs, and overcoming the production friction of cold-starts and OOMs. Bring your deployment headaches and swap real-world battle stories with fellow ML engineers and platform architects.

sessions.title: Trading in the cloud: How capital markets future-proof their infrastructure
sessions.description: FSI and capital markets face a unique challenge, where trading infrastructure capacity is heavily dependent on economic factors. Financial exchanges must offer open and fair access to markets while providing determinism and regulatory compliance. Join this session and discuss with executives from CME Group and Eurex/DBG how Google Cloud supports their financial markets by providing exchanges and trading firms with highly deterministic compute, AI infrastructure, precision time, cloud-based peering, market data feeds, and observability.

sessions.title: Transform app deployment and management with AI
sessions.description: Modernizing application delivery often leaves “Day 2” operations teams struggling with fragmented tools and manual overhead. In this session, we’ll demonstrate how to simplify application deployments on Google Cloud by using the power of agentic AI to automate complex workflows. And we’ll take you through an end-to-end experience that provides operations teams with robust, out-of-the-box capabilities for ongoing management and monitoring. Discover how intelligent agents can bridge the gap between initial deployment and long-term stability, reducing cognitive load for engineers. Leave knowing how to implement a unified framework that streamlines the entire application life cycle.

sessions.title: Transform cloud operations and management with generative AI
sessions.description: Join us to explore the next generation of AI-driven cloud management. We’ll demonstrate multi-resource intent-driven deployments from IDEs using your private Terraform modules. Discover our feature for quick and deep investigations, which uses trace-based discovery and Cloud Run source code insights for faster troubleshooting. Learn how proactive agents identify anomalies, and how you can safely execute authorized remediations for Google Cloud resources.

sessions.title: Transform community services and outcomes with AI
sessions.description: What does it take to build a truly responsive government? It requires moving beyond simple digitization to fundamentally reimagine how services are delivered. This session will feature leaders who are making that shift happen. Learn how forward-thinking agencies are applying the power of AI to personalize experiences at an unprecedented scale, automate complex processes to unlock new levels of efficiency, and ensure greater access to support and care. Join us to see how AI is being used to power a more efficient government that benefits everyone.

sessions.title: Transform cyber defense: Insights from Mandiant
sessions.description: Why do some security transformations succeed while others stall? We’ll look at the journey from legacy systems to modern security operations through the lens of those who have made the move. Come explore the common pitfalls and the breakthrough strategies that define a successful shift. We’ll discuss how to evolve your cyber defense functions to meet today’s threats. This session will set the stage for a deeper look into modern security, providing you with the vision and context needed to lead your organization into the next era of defense.

sessions.title: Transform legacy healthcare to an agentic AI digital organization
sessions.description:
Discover how Northwell Health is transforming into a premier digital health organization through an AI-native stack. This session will explore how the collaboration with Deloitte and Google Cloud enables a shift from legacy environments to an architecture powered by Vertex AI and Gemini. We’ll demonstrate how Northwell leverages agentic AI to redefine the patient experience and optimize clinical workflows. Join us to examine how these technologies bridge the gap between legacy systems and modern care, and get insights into scaling AI-driven innovation across the enterprise.

By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: Transform meetings into outcomes using Google Workspace with Gemini
sessions.description: Meetings should be engines of productivity, not administrative bottlenecks. In this session, discover how Gemini serves as a proactive partner to transform the meeting experience – from intelligent preparation to automated follow-up. We’ll demonstrate how to use Gemini to instantly synthesize agendas from your existing emails and files, capture real-time action items without distraction, and convert discussions into tangible next steps. Join us to learn how to minimize the logistics of collaboration and maximize the output of every meeting.

sessions.title: Transform static backups with Eon to power Agentic AI
sessions.description:
Stop treating backups as dead weight. Join Eon to transform static BigQuery, GCS, and GCE snapshots into live assets. We will demonstrate how to create a queryable data lake for RAG and agentic AI using your existing data. You will leave with a strategy for automated governance and isolated storage that accelerates your data roadmap without the overhead of traditional recovery.





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Transform workflows with Gemini and the Google partner ecosystem
sessions.description: Unlocking the full potential of AI requires empowering every employee and connecting intelligence to every corner of your business. Learn from leaders at Asana and Intuit who are helping democratize secure AI by integrating their solutions across Gemini and Google Workspace, enabling cross-platform AI in the core workflows we all depend on. Discover how our partner ecosystem is the key to realizing a greater impact from AI.

sessions.title: Transform your passive catalog to active context for AI agent governance
sessions.description: Governance is moving rapidly from passive documentation to active context for agents, introducing the industry’s first universal registry governing tables, models, and autonomous agents. Join this session to learn how to supply the semantic context necessary to govern agent behavior by automating metadata augmentation – for example, generating descriptions, discovering relationships, and offering join recommendations. Discover how to build and transform your catalog for AI into a dynamic control plane for safe, context-aware AI.

sessions.title: Transform your passive catalog to active context for AI agent governance
sessions.description: Join this interactive breakout to learn how to operationalize the shift from static documentation to active AI governance. We will drill down into the specifics of automating relationship discovery and join recommendations, providing a roadmap for transforming your data catalog into a command center for context-aware AI.

sessions.title: Transforming Quest Diagnostics for the future of AI in healthcare
sessions.description: Join us to discover how Quest is accelerating AI transformation to improve patient experience, operational efficiency, and clinical quality by co-building AI solutions with HCLTech and Google Cloud. By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: Turn a physical card into a code fix with Jules
sessions.description: Kick off a fully autonomous code-maintenance cycle with just a card. From planning and logic to implementation, Jules handles the technical debt so you can stay focused on the next feature.

sessions.title: Turn developer feedback into content recommendations with Gemini
sessions.description: Go behind the scenes of a Google Cloud case study using Gemini to decode developer feedback from bugs, support tickets, and social channels. We’ll demo an insights dashboard and an automation system that transforms siloed friction data into actionable product and documentation recommendations. Learn to combine Gemini’s entity extraction with BigQuery Graph to identify developer struggles and automate content updates. Find out how graph-based retrieval-augmented generation streamlines the triage loop between engineering, tech writing, and support by filtering noise, tracking sentiment, and generating documentation requests.

sessions.title: Turn your AI into a local expert: Building agents with real-world reasoning
sessions.description: Join this session to learn how Grounding with Google Maps in Vertex AI turns AI agents into “local experts” with over 300 million places, routing details, and reviews. Whether your app is providing targeted trip planning or offering tailored “what’s nearby” recommendations, learn to customize AI outputs by combining your proprietary data with Google Maps. We’ll feature a “Day Planner Agent” demo that takes you through how to orchestrate Gemini 3 Pro with the ground truth of Google Maps and Google Workspace to solve complex scheduling scenarios.

sessions.title: Under the hood for startups: How Google DeepMind makes modeling decisions
sessions.description: What actually happens between a research breakthrough and an API release? Google DeepMind product managers will pull back the curtain on the trade-offs made while building models such as Gemini, Gemma, and Nano Banana. Find out how we prioritize reasoning vs. latency and long context vs. cost, so you can align your startup’s roadmap with the next generation of frontier intelligence.

sessions.title: Unified Iceberg: Open standards, native performance
sessions.description: Managing Apache Iceberg manifests, optimizing file sizes, and handling compaction all drain engineering resources. We’re solving this friction with a whole new set of features in BigLake designed to help you keep the open source compatibility you need while offloading the hard work to Google’s infrastructure. Join this session for a deep dive into the new, unified BigLake tables that help you build and optimize an open, enterprise-ready lakehouse without compromises and provide a seamless read/write interoperability between BigQuery and OSS engines.

sessions.title: Unified management plane for OTel: Server-side data control and processing
sessions.description: OpenTelemetry (OTel) is the standard for observability, but enterprises often feel forced to choose between the reliability and scale of hyperscalers and the true open data models OpenTelemetry promises. In this session, we’ll introduce Telemetry Router, a managed solution that acts as the missing management plane for enterprise observability. Learn how to move beyond complex client-side management to achieve centralized data control, server-side transformation, and true data ownership. And take away a blueprint for scaling OTel without vendor lock-in.

sessions.title: Unify application observability with an application platform
sessions.description: Join this session to explore how an application platform provides essential and unified observability insights to simplify observing and operating your applications. Learn to move past siloed observability data to leverage telemetry and topology views enriched with your application context, enabling you to operate with confidence and maintain a competitive edge.

sessions.title: Unify data for a strong AI foundation with Salesforce and Google
sessions.description:
A powerful AI strategy is only as strong as the data grounding it. Join us to learn how Salesforce and Google provide the blueprint for a high-ROI AI foundation. We’ll explore how Data 360’s Zero Copy architecture provides instant, secure access to BigQuery and other Google data sources within Salesforce—eliminating costly duplication. See how this trusted data stream fuels Agentforce and Gemini, ensuring your AI agents act on the truth to drive reliable business outcomes.





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Unify full-stack observability with Firebase Crashlytics on Google Cloud
sessions.description: Your application is only as healthy as your users’ perception of it. While Google Cloud Observability excels at server-side monitoring, the client’s perspective has persisted as a gap. Join us to learn about the collaboration between Firebase Crashlytics and Google Cloud Observability to solve for this. We’ll unveil the vision for an AI-native, end-to-end real user monitoring (RUM) solution built directly on Google Cloud’s application platform, including App Hub and Application Design Center.

sessions.title: Unify your tech stack with Dart
sessions.description: Eliminate context switching and accelerate development with Dart for functions. Now, Flutter developers can write backend logic in the same language – and with the same tooling – as their frontend. Join us to build a complete serverless application live, using full-stack Dart across client and cloud environments.

sessions.title: Unifying your defense: Chrome Enterprise Premium & Google Unified Security
sessions.description: To stay ahead of modern adversaries, your browser security must be an integral part of your broader defense ecosystem. In this session, discover how Chrome Enterprise Premium acts as a force multiplier within Google Unified Security. We’ll explore how Chrome leverages Google’s global threat intelligence to detect risks faster, share critical telemetry, and enforce robust policies at the point of click. Learn how to close the gap between your endpoint and the web for a truly holistic security posture.

sessions.title: Unifying your defense: Chrome Enterprise Premium & Google Unified Security
sessions.description: To stay ahead of modern adversaries, your browser security must be an integral part of your broader defense ecosystem. In this session, discover how Chrome Enterprise Premium acts as a force multiplier within Google Unified Security. We’ll explore how Chrome leverages Google’s global threat intelligence to detect risks faster, share critical telemetry, and enforce robust policies at the point of click. Learn how to close the gap between your endpoint and the web for a truly holistic security posture.

Learn how to close the gap between your endpoint and the web for a truly holistic security posture.
