sessions.description: To stay ahead of modern adversaries, your browser security must be an integral part of your broader defense ecosystem. In this session, discover how Chrome Enterprise Premium acts as a force multiplier within Google Unified Security. We’ll explore how Chrome leverages Google’s global threat intelligence to detect risks faster, share critical telemetry, and enforce robust policies at the point of click. Learn how to close the gap between your endpoint and the web for a truly holistic security posture.

sessions.title: Unlock agentic collaboration and productivity in Google Chat
sessions.description: Dive deep into new agentic experiences that are transforming team collaboration in Google Chat. These include Gemini in Chat, journeys across Google Workspace powered by agents in Calendar, Tasks, and Drive, and third-party agents from ServiceNow, Comeen, and more.

sessions.title: Unlock agentic collaboration in Google Chat
sessions.description: Workspace Discussion Group.

sessions.title: Unlock capital with AI: Cardinal Health's high-stakes success
sessions.description: AI offers a powerful new way to transform finance operations and unlock value. See how KPMG LLP and Cardinal Health are applying it to pricing disputes with a game-changing agent on Google Cloud. It helps transform hours of manual discovery into an overnight “dispute dossier,” empowering analysts with instant insights. In this session, learn how to slash resolution times, boost team capacity, and unlock working capital – all while keeping humans in control of the final decisions. This is high-stakes AI in action. By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: Unlock dark data: Enable built-in AI data curation that's simpler and faster
sessions.description: Stop drowning in “dark” unstructured data. New Cloud Storage features transform passive buckets into an active semantic layer, unlocking unsearchable archives for high-priority AI innovation. Through auto annotate, Cloud Storage Model Context Protocol server, and a stealthy new discovery capability, you can now curate data faster to deploy context-aware AI agents and retrieval-augmented generation workflows. Join representatives from L’Oreal and Snap as they share how they leveraged these innovations to dramatically accelerate their AI journeys.

sessions.title: Unlock data insights: Conversational Analytics agents, API, and MCP
sessions.description: Data insights from agents need trust, governance, and scale. This session demonstrates how Conversational Analytics agents let you unleash the value of your modern petabyte-scale data stack across BigQuery, Dataplex Universal Catalog, and the Looker semantic layer. Learn how to feel confident in governed and trustworthy data agents via monitoring and evaluation tools, and how to deploy agents where your users work with the Conversational Analytics API and the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Join us to learn what’s coming next for more proactive and insightful Conversational Analytics agents.

sessions.title: Unlock enterprise data and drive AI adoption with Sensitive Data Protection
sessions.description: Without the right safeguards and controls, AI agents and applications can put your most important data at risk. Join this technical session to demystify our latest data security solutions. You’ll discover how to automatically identify and redact sensitive information in AI training data, secure datasets with customer-managed encryption and security perimeters, and filter traffic in Gemini Enterprise and Vertex AI to prevent high-value data leakage. You’ll also learn how to use data security posture management in Security Command Center to govern the storage, movement, and processing of data across your entire AI lifecycle.

sessions.title: Unlock Google Cloud's migration secrets: Security, speed, and scale
sessions.description: Ready to migrate but daunted by the complexity? Discover Google Cloud Migration Center, a unified and intelligent platform to simplify and accelerate your cloud journey. Learn how our AI-powered tools provide insights into your existing landscape, automate app discovery, and generate tailored migration plans, making the move seamless for one application or thousands. Join us to learn how to migrate without changing IP addresses, explore real-world examples, and learn best practices to de-risk your migration and unlock the full, AI-powered potential of Google Cloud.

sessions.title: Unlock high-performance AI with the new Cloud TPU experience
sessions.description: While Cloud Tensor Processing Units (TPUs) are renowned for training the world’s most advanced generative AI models, their architecture is engineered to accelerate a vast spectrum of complex workloads. Join us to discover the latest updates to the Cloud TPU experience – including flexible new access models, comprehensive observability, and enterprise-grade service level objectives (SLOs) – designed to empower developers and researchers and deliver predictable reliability. Real-world success takes center stage as Citadel Securities shares their journey using Cloud TPUs for high-performance financial modeling. Learn how they conquered massive infrastructure hurdles to achieve exceptional ROI and accelerated time to market.

sessions.title: Unlock public sector growth with Marketplace
sessions.description: Ready to accelerate your Public Sector business? Discover how to leverage Google Cloud Marketplace for rapid growth. We’ll guide you through how the ISV and channel partner ecosystem can immediately get started with Marketplace and the benefits of the two-tier Distributor Channel Private Offer (DCPO) model, simplifying financial and operational complexity. Hear real-world success stories and learn how to partner with Carahsoft’s team to unlock vast services. Join us to streamline your path to revenue and reduce complexity.
sessions.room: Partner Summit Lounge Lightning Talk Theater 1

sessions.title: Unlock the potential of Spanner: A new frontier for your data
sessions.description: Imagine harnessing the legendary consistency and scale of Spanner without limits. In this session, we’ll unveil a flexible new way to deploy Google’s distributed database, putting data where it’s needed for performance, compliance, and peace of mind. Learn how we’re making Spanner more adaptable, empowering you to build the next generation of mission-critical and AI-driven applications in entirely new ways. Join us to discover the future of database innovation that’s breaking down the barriers between your data and your developers.

sessions.title: Unlock your data's true meaning with BigQuery multimodal vector search
sessions.description: Learn how to go beyond simple text matching to perform highly relevant similarity searches on unstructured data – including images, audio, and video. In this session, learn to build serverless indexes powered by Google’s cutting-edge ScaNN (Scalable Nearest Neighbor) technology that scale to billions of embeddings. We’ll demonstrate how to integrate these semantic insights directly with BigQuery analytics to power next-gen recommendation engines, entity resolution, and hyper-personalized user experiences.

sessions.title: Unlocking enterprise actions: Bridge your APIs to AI agents with MCP and Apigee
sessions.description: As generative AI moves from conversation to execution, your agents need reliable access to enterprise capabilities. In this session, discover how to transform your existing API landscape into an agent-ready ecosystem using Apigee. We’ll demonstrate how to instantly create Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers from existing enterprise APIs and “boost” API specifications to ensure high-accuracy consumption by LLMs. Join us to learn advanced techniques for generating specifications directly from API logs, registering third-party MCPs, and securing your MCP servers with robust policies. And find out how Apigee enables your agents to utilize enterprise capabilities securely and at scale.

sessions.title: Unlocking Google Cloud marketing funds: Overview and success tips
sessions.description: Maximize your reach and accelerate your growth with Google Cloud Partner Marketing Funds. This program can help you connect with new customers and expand your business. We’ll walk through eligibility, funding options, and the best practices that maximize your impact. Whether you're an experienced marketer or just getting started, you’ll gain actionable insights to immediately elevate your marketing strategy.
sessions.room: Partner Summit Lounge Lightning Talk Theater 2

sessions.title: Untrusted code, unprecedented speed: High-velocity runtimes for AI agents
sessions.description: The rise of autonomous AI agents presents a dual challenge: scaling agent throughput and safely running untrusted, LLM-generated code. This session will explore techniques for building agent infrastructure that address both performance and security while bringing Gemini’s power to AI code-execution use cases. We’ll demonstrate how to enable subsecond cold starts for massive concurrency, and how gVisor’s kernel-level isolation provides a zero-trust environment to protect your infrastructure. We’ll also examine how LangChain, a leading AI agent platform, is leveraging this architecture to deliver autonomous agent experiences at massive scale.

sessions.title: Upskilling your organization
sessions.description: Join the Google Skills product team for an interactive conversation focused on organizational upskilling. This is a unique opportunity for individuals who are involved in learning and enablement at their organizations, to engage directly with the Google Skills platform team. Come share your experiences, outline your wish list for your organization’s transformation goals, and help shape our roadmap.

sessions.title: Use Model Context Protocol (MCP) Tools with ADK Agents
sessions.description: Unify your AI integrations with the Model Context Protocol (MCP). MCP standardizes how LLMs access external data and tools. In this advanced workshop, you will explore two critical workflows: configuring an Agent Development Kit (ADK) agent to consume resources from existing MCP servers, and building a custom MCP server to expose your own ADK tools to outside clients. Learn to create seamless, bi-directional connections between your agents and external applications using this powerful open standard.

sessions.title: User-journey-first observability using SLOs, Gemini, and Cloud Monitoring
sessions.description:
When your alerts lack context, you lose sight of the user experience. But when relevant context is spread across many sources of record, pulling it all together into a coherent story becomes a challenge.
See how The Home Depot solves this problem with their open source-compatible observability platform based on Cloud Monitoring. Their SLO alerts trigger Gemini to correlate data across disparate data sources and suggest a course of action, tying everything back to the SLO to highlight the impact of outages from a user experience perspective.

sessions.title: Using an Agentic SOC to Lower Analyst Toil
sessions.description: In this hands-on workshop, learn how Gemini is being used in Google SecOps to streamline and eliminate toil for analysts. During this workshop, we will use AI is used in SecOps for natural language search, gathering threat intelligence, analyzing alerts and much more. Attendees will come away with a greater understanding of different methods that AI can be used with Google SecOps.

sessions.title: Velocity & transparency: The new RaMP model for migration
sessions.description: Unlocking Incentives: The New RaMP Model: Explore the major redesign of the Rapid Migration and Modernization Program (RaMP), built to accelerate the journey from legacy infrastructure to AI adoption. This session details the program’s streamlined commercial model, offering predictable incentives for both general and strategic workloads. Join us to discover how the evolved RaMP program aligns partner profitability with customer success—turning migration from a technical hurdle into a launchpad for AI transformation.
sessions.room: Partner Summit Lounge Lightning Talk Theater 2

sessions.title: Vibe coding 101: Navigating the developer experience
sessions.description: Sharpen your focus on the modern developer experience with Google Cloud's databases. This discussion will explore practical integrations using the MCP, Gemini CLI, and Antigravity platform. You'll learn how to optimize development workstreams, resolve integration pain points, and unlock new capabilities for your applications. Join peers to discuss best practices for building the next generation of intelligent apps.

sessions.title: Vibe coding and databases
sessions.description: Share your experiences and questions about using vibe coding to build intelligent, data-driven apps. We’ll cover platforms such as Antigravity, Google Cloud databases where the data is stored, and database integration with MCP and Gemini CLI. Learn how to optimize development workstreams, resolve integration pain points, and unlock new capabilities for your applications.

sessions.title: Vibe coding apps with autonomous multi-agents on GKE and Data Cloud
sessions.description: Software engineering is shifting from syntax to intent. This session will explore the rise of vibe coding – intuition-driven development where natural language is the primary interface. We’ll demonstrate building autonomous agents that execute code and analyze data using Gemini CLI, runtimes, and databases. Delivery Hero will share how they used these patterns to automate their delivery lifecycle and outperform their goals by 10x. You'll leave with an understanding of how engineering roles are evolving and how to build your first agentic workflow.

sessions.title: Vibe coding to production with Vertex AI
sessions.description: This session maps a complete critical user journey that unites the vibe coding of early ideation with the rigor of production engineering. We’ll demonstrate how to use Vertex AI Studio and Model Context Protocol (MCP) to create a workflow where different stakeholders can contribute to an app’s life cycle without friction. Follow the journey of a Vertex AI-powered application from its initial prototype through development, deployment, and ongoing post-launch management of updates. And learn how MCP allows you to inject changes, tune models, and manage versions directly from your preferred environment – whether that’s a design tool or an IDE like VS Code – ensuring continuous improvement for your production agents.

sessions.title: Vibe Coding with enterprised-approved App Backend using Firebase and Application Design Center
sessions.description: Join this session to learn how the new Firebase integration with Application Design Center empowers your app teams to build vibe coded apps with enterprise approved backend. Discover how to deploy and govern Firebase backend resources holistically alongside broader Google Cloud infrastructure within a structured, secure, and AI-assisted environment.

sessions.title: Vibe from code to cloud: Create and deploy apps directly from AI-assisted tooling
sessions.description: Vibe coding transforms development, but can it handle enterprise rigor? Join us to learn how Gemini Cloud Assist can bridge the gap. We’ll demonstrate a complete life cycle – starting with platform engineers publishing catalogs of approved modules, which enable developers to build intent-driven apps. Observe Gemini Cloud Assist analyze code to propose compliant infrastructure, automate identity and access management, remediate deployment failures, and generate continuous integration and deployment (CI/CD) pipelines. Unify velocity with governance – stop fighting over tickets and start shipping with context.

sessions.title: Vibed into reality: Bring your ideas to life with Firebase and Google AI
sessions.description: As we enter the era of agent-native development, Firebase provides deep integrations with Google AI Studio to transform your vibed prototypes into feature-rich, production-ready apps. Join this session to learn how Firebase empowers coding agents to handle the toughest parts of building a robust backend, including provisioning databases, implementing user authentication, managing security, and even deploying apps – all without the need for manual configuration.

sessions.title: Vibing with Gemini CLI: Custom Web AI solutions and shareable skills
sessions.description: Google’s Gemini 3 offers a leap forward in creating technically complex solutions when integrated with standard web-engineering workflows. Join Googlers Jason Mayes, Web AI lead, and Alex Astrum, developer relations engineer, to learn how seasoned engineers can use Gemini CLI to save a staggering amount of time. Mayes will demonstrate Web AI solutions, using LiteRT.js to create a vector search system with minimal effort while maintaining control. And Astrum will cover creating reusable skills that your team can lean on to scale out productivity gains.

sessions.title: Visualizing BigQuery Data with Looker Studio
sessions.description: Unlock insights with Looker Studio by visualizing historic US flight data from the Bureau of Transport Statistics. In this hands-on workshop, you will create BigQuery views and connect them as data sources. You will then build a comprehensive report featuring date range controls and multiple charts. Learn to transform raw data into customized, shareable visualizations that effectively communicate the story behind the numbers.

sessions.title: Web3 startups and AI agents: The future of payments, tokenization, and commerce
sessions.description: Tokenization is taking finance digital. This panel will explore how Web3 startups use AI agents and tokenized assets to power payments, capital structures, and predictive markets. Discover how startups leverage blockchains and agentic AI to build secure, scalable, next-gen financial systems.

sessions.title: What's in the box?
sessions.description: Explore what’s really happening inside AI and LLM systems, and why it matters amid rising costs. As teams move faster with managed models and agent frameworks, spend is driven by token usage, latency, downstream services, and Google Cloud utilization. In this talk, you’ll encounter a practical, cost-first approach to running AI platforms by treating AI tooling like a junior engineer. You’ll also learn how observing LLM workflows and correlating model signals with application telemetry and cloud spend help teams spot inefficiencies, improve user experience, and keep AI innovation from becoming a cost impediment using Datadog. By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow-up for this event only.

sessions.title: What's new for AI on GKE: Training, serving, and agents
sessions.description: The requirements for AI infrastructure are shifting rapidly, moving from frontier model serving to complex reinforcement learning and agentic workflows. Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) has evolved to meet the moment. Join us for a high-speed tour of most critical GKE innovations released in the past year for AI training, serving, reinforcement learning, and agentic workloads. Explore new capabilities designed to make your AI workloads more reliable, scalable, and cost-effective. And take a peek at how Thinking Machines Lab and Baseten are using GKE for their AI workloads.

sessions.title: What's new in BigQuery: The data platform for agentic AI
sessions.description: Discover how BigQuery is redefining the modern data and AI stack. Join this session to explore new capabilities for multimodal analytics and performance at scale. Learn how to accelerate AI innovation by bringing generative AI directly to your data for rapid model building and co-processing. Plus, get a preview of the new agentic experiences designed to simplify and automate workflows for every data professional.

sessions.title: What's new in Cloud Run
sessions.description: Explore new Cloud Run capabilities that simplify application deployment for AI agents and inference. This deep dive demonstrates how to power your most demanding workloads with unparalleled efficiency and flexibility. Join this session to learn how to use the latest serverless features to scale your applications seamlessly while reducing operational overhead. And discover how Cloud Run is evolving to meet the needs of the next generation of AI-driven development.

sessions.title: What's new in Cloud SQL: Drive performance, high availability, and security
sessions.description: Explore the latest innovations in Cloud SQL for MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server. In this session, we’ll discuss how we’re revolutionizing developer productivity and supporting mission-critical apps with uncompromised availability, performance, and security. And we’ll introduce new AI-driven capabilities for automated health management and fleet-wide insights. Join us to learn how Database Migration Service facilitates low-risk moves to the cloud, and gain the essential knowledge you need to optimize your database strategy today.

sessions.title: What's new in Firebase
sessions.description: Ready to go hands-on with modern app development? Move beyond the keynote announcements and dive into the practical "how-to" using the latest Firebase features. This peer-led discussion is your interactive space to share experiences, solve challenges, and bridge the gap between rapid client-side iteration and enterprise-grade cloud power.

sessions.title: What's New in Gemini 3
sessions.description: Take your AI development to the next level with Gemini 3. In this introductory, hands-on workshop, you will explore the distinct strengths of the Gemini 3 models—balancing the deep reasoning capabilities of Gemini 3 Pro with the high-speed efficiency of Gemini 3 Flash. You will gain practical experience managing reasoning capabilities and multimodal inputs, equipping you to build smarter, faster, and more cost-effective AI applications.

sessions.title: What's New in Gemini 3
sessions.description: Take your AI development to the next level with Gemini 3. In this introductory, hands-on workshop, you will explore the distinct strengths of the Gemini 3 models—balancing the deep reasoning capabilities of Gemini 3 Pro with the high-speed efficiency of Gemini 3 Flash. You will gain practical experience managing reasoning capabilities and multimodal inputs, equipping you to build smarter, faster, and more cost-effective AI applications.

sessions.title: What's new in Gemma: Google DeepMind's family of open models
sessions.description: The Gemma family of open models continues to expand, providing state-of-the-art tools to build a wide range of AI applications, from sovereign AI to scientific research to consumer products. In this session, go beyond the models and dive into the practical tools that make them usable at scale. Discover how to experiment with and deploy your favorite open models with Vertex AI and Hugging Face. We’ll guide you through an end-to-end pipeline, taking you from model discovery to full-scale deployment.

sessions.title: What's new in Google Cloud databases for the agentic era
sessions.description: The agentic era demands a unified, real-time architecture for delivering relevant, accurate experiences at scale with your enterprise data. Join this session to explore the latest Google Cloud database innovations designed to modernize your estate. Learn how these advancements enable you to quickly build AI apps and agents with multimodal data, while unifying operational and analytical workloads for real-time insights. Elevate the developer experience for frictionless development and simplified database management with AI.

sessions.title: What's new in Google Cloud's agent platform
sessions.description: Explore the next evolution of Google Cloud’s agent platform, designed to empower developers and enterprises to build, scale, and govern sophisticated AI agents. Discover our new, unified Vertex AI Agent Builder, featuring a streamlined UX and a no-code/low-code Agent Designer to simplify the creation of complex, multi-agent workflows. Find out how our new Agent Registry, coupled with the agent marketplace, enables organizations to securely curate and distribute reusable components. Learn how we’re delivering enterprise-grade governance and quality at scale with a unified governance layer, new agent management capabilities, advanced observability with time-travel debugging, an integrated evaluation suite, and a managed simulation platform to ensure your agents are secure, reliable, and continuously improving. From a richer Agent Development Kit (ADK) with expanded language support to native agent-to-agent communication and a secure code execution sandbox, Google Cloud provides a comprehensive ecosystem for the entire agent life cycle.

sessions.title: What's new in Looker: Empowering business users in the governed agentic era
sessions.description: Trusted data defines the agentic era. Learn how Looker and Gemini redefine business intelligence by grounding AI in a governed semantic layer. In this session, we’ll unveil the latest Looker advancements, including dashboard agents that automate workflows and insights. Find out how to scale expertise and ensure consistency with shared pre-trained agents. Join us for an exclusive preview of Conversational Analytics, semantic model evolutions, and the next generation of embedded analytics. Discover how Looker is pushing the boundaries of data for the AI-first enterprise.

sessions.title: What's new in network security
sessions.description: The threat landscape is evolving faster than ever with AI-driven attacks. Staying ahead requires the latest defenses – do not leave your network exposed. This session will provide a complete wrap-up of Google Cloud’s newest Cross-Cloud Network security features. Come explore the latest in AI-powered capabilities that allow Cloud Next Generation Firewall, DNS Armor, and Google Cloud Armor to address advanced network threats. We’ll also demonstrate a new capability designed to streamline network security operations by assisting with policy generation, recommendation, and simulation. Get all the critical updates you need to secure your hybrid and multicloud environments with confidence.

sessions.title: What's new in Spanner: Enterprise-scale AI, search, graph, and analytics
sessions.description: Discover how Spanner is redefining the future of databases. Join this session to learn how to power agentic AI with integrated vectors, graphs, and search. Explore how to build interactive global applications with geo-partitioning and latency optimizations. Find out how the Spanner columnar engine unifies transactions and analytics, delivering real-time insights without data movement. Learn from leading organizations why Spanner is the database for what’s next, from modernizing critical, always-on, and secure systems to building a new generation of autonomous applications.

sessions.title: What's new in streaming: Real-time data for agentic AI
sessions.description: If AI training is about history, AI value is about real-time data. Join us for a deep dive into Google Cloud’s streaming portfolio. Learn how Anthropic uses this infrastructure for massive-scale model training. We’ll explore major innovations across our managed messaging services, including the introduction of native AI inference within Pub/Sub and enhancements to Managed Service for Apache Kafka. And we’ll cover the latest updates to Dataflow and BigQuery continuous queries. Learn how these services use the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to create a complete real-time data platform for agentic AI.

sessions.title: What's new in the Cross-Cloud Network
sessions.description: The network is the foundation of the AI era, but keeping pace with rapid innovation is a challenge. Falling behind limits your ability to adopt generative AI, agents, and modern apps. Join this session for a comprehensive roundup of all key releases across Cross-Cloud Network, Google Cloud’s global network solution. We’ll cover optimized infrastructure for AI agents, models, and tools; multicloud and enterprise global backbone connectivity; advanced AI-powered network security; and new innovations in self-driving networking operations. Get all the essential updates you need to architect your network for the future.

sessions.title: What's new with Compute Engine workloads and AI-ready infrastructure
sessions.description: Be among the first to learn about the latest Compute Engine product announcements. In this session, we’ll unveil exciting new capabilities to enable emerging workloads and deliver leading performance for your most critical workloads. From workload-optimized VMs for AI and machine learning to high-performance solutions for enterprise applications and databases, discover how our newest compute innovations can transform your infrastructure. We’ll dive deep into product capabilities, share VM selection best practices, and help you match the right VM to every workload to maximize performance and ROI.

sessions.title: What's new with data agents
sessions.description: Discover the latest in data analytics agents. In this session, we’ll explore enhanced built-in capabilities designed to streamline workflows across data engineering, data science, and conversational analytics. Learn to build custom agents grounded in your enterprise data using new developer tools, including the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations. Find out how to access these powerful features seamlessly via the Gemini CLI and IDEs like Google Antigravity to supercharge your productivity.

sessions.title: What's new with data and AI governance: Building the catalog for AI
sessions.description: AI agents are only as intelligent as the data they can access – and only as safe as the governance that constrains them. As you move from simple chatbots to autonomous agents that execute complex tasks, providing raw data isn’t enough. Agents need context: business glossaries, lineage, and semantic meaning. Join this session for a deep dive into the latest evolution of data and AI governance and how you can automatically enrich your data estate with semantic context, turning your catalog into a reliable map for AI.

sessions.title: What's new with Gemini Enterprise
sessions.description: Join us for a comprehensive overview of the latest innovations in Gemini Enterprise, your front door for AI in the workplace. We’ll unveil a host of new capabilities designed to revolutionize your workplace and accelerate business outcomes. Discover the latest platform advancements in agentic AI, new assistance features, an expanded partner ecosystem, and enhanced security and governance. You’ll also get an exclusive sneak peek into the upcoming 2026 product roadmap.

sessions.title: What's new with Gemini from Google DeepMind
sessions.description: Join Google DeepMind for an exclusive look at what’s new with Gemini and the research breakthroughs defining the next generation of multimodal intelligence. We’ll showcase new workflows and demos designed to empower and inspire developers to build and scale agentic applications with Gemini. Discover what Gemini 3’s upgraded model reasoning, expanded context window processing, and enhanced multimodal tool use can enable in Vertex AI. And learn more about the research advancements for Gemini that are driving agent design.

sessions.title: What's new with GKE: A look toward the next decade
sessions.description: For over a decade, Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) has led the managed Kubernetes industry. As we enter the age of agents and massive inference models, infrastructure requirements are changing. Join this session to explore how GKE is adapting to support agentic workloads and next-generation inference, offering unmatched scale for the world’s largest clusters and better compute capabilities through Autopilot. Whether modernizing enterprise apps or building the next great AI model, discover how GKE is evolving to meet the demands of the next decade.

sessions.title: What's new with Google Distributed Cloud?
sessions.description: Unlock the full potential of Google AI in a sovereign environment. This session demonstrates how to deploy the latest Gemini’s models, agentic tools, and workflows within your most secure sovereign boundaries using Google Distributed Cloud (GDC). We’ll dive deep into the infrastructure making this possible, focusing on the latest high-performance GPUs, software breakthroughs, and new tactical hardware with multi-zone resilience designed for the harshest realities. Learn how GDC is transforming mission-critical operations by supporting complex core enterprise resource planning (ERP) landscapes and enabling advanced decision-making analytics on completely disconnected data. Don’t leave your intelligence behind – join us to learn how GDC delivers tactical advantage and enterprise-scale productivity to the sovereign edge.

sessions.title: What's next in AI infrastructure: Scaling for the agentic and physical AI era
sessions.description: As AI expands to autonomous agents and physical systems, the computing infrastructure powering them must be faster, more dynamic, and highly cost-effective. In this Spotlight session with Mark Lohmeyer, you'll learn how Google’s leading AI infrastructure stack—from custom silicon to open software—is powering the agentic and physical AI era. You will get a firsthand look into Google’s roadmap for next-gen TPU, GPU, and Arm systems, and new storage and networking offerings built for training, RL, and inference. Discover how new software capabilities, including AI Frameworks, GKE, and Vertex AI provide the engineering edge to secure, optimize, and scale your agentic and physical AI initiatives. Plus, you'll see how leading AI labs, digital-native, and enterprise customers leverage Google's full stack to drive transformation in their business.

sessions.title: What’s next in IAM: Security, governance, and runtime defense for AI agents
sessions.description: To scale AI successfully, you need trust - and that starts with a Zero Trust architecture. Google Cloud empowers enterprises to build and govern agents grounded in business data, secured by a modern stack featuring Agent Identity, Identity and Access Management (IAM), Policy-based security controls, and runtime defense via Model Armor. Join this session to explore how Google is securing AI agents, and how these capabilities are rebuilding the foundation of trust for the next generation of cloud computing.

sessions.title: What's your next move? Winning with the GCPN technology path
sessions.description: Do you have a solution for Google Cloud or Workspace? Your partner journey is evolving. The new GCPN Technology Path shifts our focus from simple "build" activities to rewarding tangible customer outcomes. This lightning talk showcases the simpler, automated path designed to measure your true impact and accelerate your growth. Join us to see exactly what is changing, how the new model works, and how you can leverage it to win.
sessions.room: Partner Summit Lounge Lightning Talk Theater 2

sessions.title: Why AI fails inside organizations (and how to fix It)
sessions.description:
When AI stalls inside organizations, it's rarely because the models aren't powerful enough. In this session, Dr. Rebecca Hinds, Head of the Work AI Institute at Glean, identifies five critical ways organizations either set AI up to drive real results, or set it up to fail. She shows how decisions about roles, rewards, and workflows influence whether capable AI systems transform how people work—and why overlooking these organizational fundamentals is what holds many AI initiatives back.





By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Why is Edge computing becoming critical for business transformation?
sessions.description:
This session will explore how Rakuten Cloud and Google Distributed Cloud's joint solutions are transforming edge computing in the enterprise and telecom sectors. We will address the following topics:
- Why is edge computing essential for business transformation?
- What challenges exist?
- How are Google and Rakuten Cloud addressing these challenges?


What role does AI play in this transformation?
We also plan to invite a customer to share their experience and discuss how our joint solutions supported their transformation.



By attending this session, your contact information may be shared with the sponsor for relevant follow up for this event only.

sessions.title: Winning together: Seize the agentic AI opportunity in APAC
sessions.description: Join our APAC leadership team and external industry thought leaders as they unpack the region’s strategic shift toward Agentic AI — and its implications for your go-to-market strategy. In this session, we'll outline the 2026 priorities and key market trends to capitalize on the next wave of AI adoption. You will leave with practical strategies for helping customers pivot from 'possibility' to 'production' and accelerate your success in the APAC market.

sessions.title: Winning with AI: Scale joint success and pipeline growth in EMEA
sessions.description: The era of AI experimentation is over; the era of value realization is here. Join Google Cloud EMEA leadership and top partners for strategic market updates on specific growth vectors for 2026. This is a must-attend session to dissect the strategies top partners are using to convert the AI opportunity into a tangible pipeline and revenue.

sessions.title: Women in Tech Happy Hour
sessions.description:
Open to all! Join us in the Community Lounge to celebrate women in tech. This happy hour is dedicated to community building and networking to foster a richer, more collaborative technology ecosystem.

Connect with peers, share insights, and build the professional relationships that drive our industry forward. See you there!

sessions.title: Women In Tech Meetup
sessions.description: Connect with fellow women in tech at this community meetup! Join peer-to-peer conversations about navigating career transitions, breaking into leadership, overcoming imposter syndrome, and building your personal brand. Share real-world experiences with work-life balance, mentorship, and advocating for yourself in the workplace. Whether you're a developer, data scientist, or tech leader, this is your space to exchange insights, tackle shared challenges, and build meaningful connections. All allies welcome!

sessions.title: Workspace Admins Meetup
sessions.description: As the Workspace ecosystem evolves, so does the role of the admin. This meetup is your forum to connect with fellow Workspace admins to engage in peer-to-peer learning, troubleshoot common issues, discuss strategies for AI adoption, hardening your security posture and stay ahead with the latest Workspace updates. Come ready to contribute, learn, and build a stronger Workspace admin community!

sessions.title: Workspace Developers Meetup
sessions.description: Calling all Google Workspace developers! Join us for a lively discussion on Apps Script, the platform for automating tasks and extending your favorite Google apps. From classic scripts to new AI integrations, we’ll swap tips on building solutions that work. Whether you're a pro or just starting out, come connect with fellow enthusiasts.

sessions.title: Your data, your models, your future: The new standard for Confidential AI
sessions.description: Security should never be a bottleneck to innovation. Join us to see how Google Cloud is future-proofing privacy for the AI era. We’ll unveil a comprehensive set of innovations ranging from post-quantum cryptography key management to the expansion of Confidential AI systems across CPUs and GPUs on Google Cloud. Learn how these capabilities allow you to process sensitive data and train proprietary models with the highest level of assurance, protecting your assets against both current and future threats.

sessions.title: Your data, your rules: The verifiable and private future powered with TEEs
sessions.description: Unlock the full potential of sensitive AI workloads without compromising privacy. Trusted execution environments (TEEs) have emerged as a critical technology to address data privacy and collaboration concerns. Learn how to process your most sensitive data within hardware-isolated enclaves, ensuring your AI innovations and datasets remain encrypted in use and exclusively yours. Gain insights from customers on how they are leveraging Confidential Space for new business cases – from enabling a new generation of data clean rooms to helping users verify their identities with online services while keeping underlying information private.

sessions.title: Zero to scale: Rapid development with Google Cloud & MCP Toolbox for database
sessions.description: This session tackles AI's biggest production problem — stale, disconnected data. We explore how the Model Context Protocol (MCP) and Google's open-source MCP Toolbox give agents real-time, grounded access to AlloyDB, BigQuery, and Spanner through simple YAML tool definitions. See two live demos: Prism, a multi-database retail agent that routes natural language to the right database; and a DB Builder agent that designs and extends full database backends from a plain English description.

sessions.title: Zero-friction data science with BigQuery and Vertex AI
sessions.description: Join the group to discuss accelerating data science with BigQuery and Vertex AI. We'll explore how to empower analysts with SQL-based predictions and data scientists with Spark/Python in a unified, governed environment. The group will examine BigQuery Studio and AI-first Colab notebooks, utilizing built-in agents to streamline workflows. We’ll discuss bridging the gap to action by converting insights into interactive data applications.

sessions.title: Zero-friction data science: From raw data to inferencing in the fast lane
sessions.description: Supercharge your data science workflows with BigQuery and Vertex AI. Join this session to explore the unified, governed environment where analysts gain SQL-based predictive capabilities and data scientists get the flexibility of Apache Spark and Python for rich experimentation, model management, and operations. Experience BigQuery Studio and AI-first Colab notebooks, featuring a built-in agent to plan and execute your workflows. And learn how to bridge the gap between analysis and action by transforming insights into interactive data applications.

sessions.title: Zero-ops GKE: How Palo Alto Networks composes secure, scalable systems
sessions.description: Scaling distributed systems requires shifting from manual management to automated orchestration – a transition Palo Alto Networks has mastered. Join this session to go inside the architectural choices powering their high-performance environments. We’ll explore Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) Autopilot for a near-zero-ops experience and the technical implementation of horizontal pod autoscaling (HPA) to handle traffic without over-provisioning. We’ll also pull back the curtain on how they used Workload Identity Federation to replace static secrets. Leave with a real-world blueprint for composing scalable, secure, and lean systems.
